user_reviews:
[{"Name":"My Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-o38aNqhmbPRZUZYMfBXJ4xFkgUX4l-cE6T9emtIIZJWEKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We ordered carne asada burrito, Buffalo wings and chicken flautas. They were all tasty. The carne asada was very meaty but a bit tough for me. Wings were a bit small but flavorful.

I have never seen chicken flautas look like short fat egg rolls before. Deep fried flour tortilla gave it a nice crispness except there was very little chicken inside. Still very good and interesting. I especially love that they had lettuce, pico de gallo, sour cream and guacamole on side. Very rare do you see this combo of topping.

Inside is divided by the bar area and dining area. Looks like a hip place to be after work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4UzP_c-7cfLaw9236zUGq&fid=0x0:0xf5fd208cda7243b3"],"When":"2025-7-11"},{"Name":"Abel Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqPGnytFkY3VTS0aGJU1m77twExXk9qD7kKXoMMiS0Ol6sJLi3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I stopped by when visiting on Friday and this place was horrible. The lady at the counter is super rude. She acted like she was too good to take an order. (Cara de fuchi). Don't know what her issue was. The food was subpar. No flavor and super expensive. People who work there should be grateful customers come in. Maybe if you had better service, the subpar food would be more acceptable. Don't recommend this place at all. Taco Bell would be better and that is not saying much at all. Fuera!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John R (Johnny Reviews)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJ_cbjJKAhqLFZw3pt9-Y-2H8CWVy28sK4XcGm5fNXnhVAKNk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to eat, all around great experience with 1 exception. Parking is packed.

The food:
first off the menu is very nice offering familiar taco shop favorites, traditional Mexican food, and even some more experimental fusion type options. This location also serves alcohol and it feels more like a restaurant than a taco shop but with the convenience of a taco shop. Plus
free chips, this alone makes me want to come back.

Oh and the salsa bar has amazing flavor and range of spice level.

Service:
What stood out was that while the staff was busy making fresh salsa the cook came to take orders with out missing a beat. Everyone working as a team provides great service.

Atmosphere: the only issue is parking. Alot of businesses in this area and barely enough parking for one or 2 of them let alone the 6+ business that use the space.
The dinning area is a blend of taco shop and Mexican restaurant with some secluded dinning area options and even patio dinning.

Final opinion: I will definitely be back and this may take my top spot for taco shops in this area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx_4mlLg&fid=0x0:0xf5fd208cda7243b3"],"When":"2023-5-30"},{"Name":"Julian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJEbVXoWS7trjdPTQ0D91NrPAQxisxOPtZHq8dj4qyIH69Ig=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"If you enjoy soggy roll tacos 5 minutes after you get them this is the place for you, this is the 2nd time in a row my roll tacos came out soggy and not crunchy. Terribly disappointing especially at the price of 12.90 for Roll tacos. Salas Is the only saving Grace","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joe Rose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnc-e-ZeoURtENoFXFUuesc0wR2-JEPtXy4ULBUi1IAiTvs8j1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The burritos are massive and taste pretty decent. Asada was a little overcooked. Definitely a good spot for the price and portion size. The salsas were okay and they have 4 flavors, carrots, and grilled serranos","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICsgarIogE&fid=0x0:0xf5fd208cda7243b3"],"When":"2020-2-3"},{"Name":"Nima Ogabian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlngqiHiOuh9Q66bYWL6G_9yuYdPYBn_QN15gQ-zth6XxD5OQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Me and two of my friends purchased a coke, a beer, and a bowl of consume, and when two of us went in to grab napkins, the lady who worked at the counter said we can take only 1 singular napkin each since we didn’t buy anything. After mentioning numerous times that we did, she still refused to give napkins. Just napkins. Consume and drinks were great, but the service killed my appetite.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lu Boyle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvX7ZVasbHQBmJKvWojT_Xx2fiUfEx3fa9qiGwZTs-Fkpf5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don't know how this place is 4.5 stars. Maybe my experience was a rare instance, who knows. BUT if you're looking for birria queso tacos....THIS ISN'T THE PLACE. Maybe the rest of the food is good but the birria tacos surely aren't. Nothing about these tacos are authentic to queso birria, except the birria lol I will post a picture soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC9sdfPbA&fid=0x0:0xf5fd208cda7243b3"],"When":"2024-3-6"},{"Name":"Kelvin Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3w5p5xI9Sgaj4oZdLl7R_XHHjpO4otuXD3ERo1xBeGNRuU6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Been going here consistently for a year and let me know tell you. One of the best taco shops I’ve ever been too. Food portion and flavor it what gets my attention. 5/5 stars","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICNqYypYw&fid=0x0:0xf5fd208cda7243b3"],"When":"2024-1-15"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"yorgo eid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsYrj59A8gp8hTxKCnmjOKxf_OscGeJUBf2oRSr_l2jtcYfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience at Hanna Garden Mediterranean Restaurant was truly excellent from start to finish. I ordered the chicken shawarma plate, and it exceeded my expectations in every way. The dish was beautifully presented and came with a fresh, crisp salad, perfectly cooked and fragrant rice, smooth and tasty hummus, and tender chicken shawarma packed with authentic Mediterranean flavors.

The portion size was very generous ,more than enough for a satisfying meal and the quality of the food was outstanding. You can really tell that fresh ingredients are used and that care is put into every plate. The balance of spices in the shawarma was spot on, not overpowering, just full of flavor.

What really stood out, besides the food, was the staff. They were incredibly friendly, welcoming, and attentive, making me feel comfortable and appreciated as a customer. The atmosphere of the restaurant was relaxed and inviting, perfect for enjoying a good meal.

Overall, Hanna Garden is a fantastic place for anyone who loves authentic Mediterranean cuisine, generous portions, and excellent service. I will definitely be coming back and highly recommend it to others.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA651PeqZJg8-VfLC6ijlAu&fid=0x0:0x5d3a881e95be90a6"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Crystal Andrade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJff15_C-CsDZQ5rfOYuKkw144xHRLaqPPVM1Hwng6eQxzvEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"1st time here, stumbled across it when I was looking for something to eat in the area and boy was I surprised. Great experience!! food was made fresh and has authentic flavors and ingredients.  Food was absolutely delicious!! Service was also top notch! Definitely will be back with the whole family.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJyIPFdQ&fid=0x0:0x5d3a881e95be90a6"],"When":"2023-6-19"},{"Name":"Alicia Yuan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXsHmyXpvPoEJvPmOw75-4i-2Hmzom6ff2ngMrmH-fxqDS24ce=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Accidentally found this Mediterranean place after going to a furniture store. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jen L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1iWgfOiLOnI656a0RFUrlCE2Ej5IU0_Wnqxx1MERGpNG1Aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dropped by this little shop while waiting for our daughter to finish her nartial arts class in Mira Mesa. The shop was very clean with a charming owner. Sh is very helpful in advising what to order. Since we were a little hungry and knew our daughter would be starving as well, we ended up ordering the party pack with an extra side of mash potatos. We waited for our food for about 10 minutes. The chicken was freshly fried and delicious. We chose the yuzu aoli, sweet and spicy, and spacy mayo sauces. Each sauce was great with the chicken. Mash potatos were creamy and delicious. Fries were tasty as well. Party pack was enough for 3 people with leftovers for my daughters lunch tomorrow.  Budget friendly and a tasty place to eat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICf_7HmgQE&fid=0x0:0xedcf188e9a70babd"],"When":"2025-1-3"},{"Name":"Tania L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9Hk6F_zxzBcRSxOMmMO6XWT7ZJWiAUMMB43ufNE2mmN1CA_1V=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Simple menu, decent price, no frills. We ordered a mixed karaage bento, karaage don, and side of fried gizzards and yuzu aioli. The bento and don are large portions. I recommend trying the yuzu aioli - it has a nice zing and a hint of a kicker.

Karaage was tender inside and crispy outside, had a crunch with every bite. We ended up with leftovers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7vpjSlAE&fid=0x0:0xedcf188e9a70babd"],"When":"2024-8-24"},{"Name":"Joyce Chen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbMCJ-SNeVCX71MFMWEPR6k3vmIelhKNeGiYfVyQDNGljGybSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The uncut chicken is a lot juicier than the chicken in the don. wish the don came with more veggies and radishes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcaHeeOdpfR5LT6rloKiTa&fid=0x0:0xedcf188e9a70babd"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"John R (Johnny Reviews)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJ_cbjJKAhqLFZw3pt9-Y-2H8CWVy28sK4XcGm5fNXnhVAKNk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A great dinning spot for a light meal.

What looks like small portions is actually quit filling. This small place is the place I would eat lunch at every day if I worked near there.

The food: the Korean fried chicken beats KFC in every category hands down. I got the Don which is fried chicken on top of rice with some veggies and an egg. I got mine with the fresh in house Spicy Mayo.

The spice Mayo is so good here, it's practically a food group.

The service was nice. The manager really shined and was truly concerned and focused on making sure every one got their order as fast as possible.

The atmosphere is a a surfer beach house vibe? Very open and calming with surfer decor. Not sure what the correlation Japanese fried chicken has with surfing but maybe it's a thing. The do have high table bar like seating and a very comfortable patio area.

Final result: I want more of this.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx9PP57AE&fid=0x0:0xedcf188e9a70babd"],"When":"2023-6-3"},{"Name":"Jackie M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI54aQQc5CvP2FOjT99bIKlYCDIlGim5bcI-QPzC4Bth3GL9g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I ordered the tender combo, it's just a drink with fries and a few small pieces of chicken tenders, the total was $16.59 with no condiments. The chicken tasted great so did the fries. The condiments are $1-$1.50 each for a small amount. I don't understand why they charge so high for the food especially condiments. This would be better if they just included it wth the meal and added sauce to the chicken or something than it being plain. The fries tasted like McDonald's fries. There were more fries than chicken. Please re-evaluate the costs and add sauces to the meals. Not worth coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3_fj3Ug&fid=0x0:0xedcf188e9a70babd"],"When":"2024-11-18"},{"Name":"Daniel H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLr5VJq66sM95gF0Ow5m1SedgwID55KTVedpuAfqj_WFZlO4_7K=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Karaage was light, moist and meaty. 😋 👍.  I wish they were slightly more crispy.  I had wasabi mayo which has been my go to sauce lately.  However gizzards were a slight disappointment.  It was oily not as light as karaage.

Spicy Tenkatori don was ok.  I would have liked less sauce and it wasn't spicy enough for me.  I prefer the texture of thigh over tender.  For both don dishes, the seasoned egg was just plain and came with only 2 pieces of picked radish.

The cartilage was sold out which was a major bummer; I really enjoyed it last time.  Gizzards were better this time making up for sold out cartilage somewhat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR9oTtJA&fid=0x0:0xedcf188e9a70babd"],"When":"2023-4-25"},{"Name":"Sophia Chu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOk94Q6VQccRXG2SznRnKcUsVeR-DRWQXtmt7WrcOmQT4LNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great chicken and sauces! Nice batter and crisp ones to the fried chicken.

Boneless Thighs - 6/5 must get
Wings - 5/5 tastes great
Tender - 3/5 decent but the highs have these beat
Fries and Thighs - 5/5
Spicy Mayo - 5/5 must try

[{"Name":"Bravo Molina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjF3L-vmRSRXdvj_MJ-kLs0LxsNgIL97qgsUNRHxAfyicRLqp4Tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My first time here and I absolutely loved it! The open, dog friendly space is such a great vibe and I even spotted a cat in an enclosed stroller, which was so cool! The beer was amazing, and I really enjoyed the little pop-up vendor that was on ground.  There was even a food truck conveniently parked outside, perfect for pairing with a cold iced beer. What a vibe! Can’t wait to come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDsQctiUP0Q07OR6yoH0vf3&fid=0x0:0xd8004c04121feab6"],"When":"2025-6-29"},{"Name":"Felicity","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2p0Le-PMxO5_1GXj3OMalG02p3VFpXnWX7rbNEIG07s_X_7Mc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pretty decent hazy IPA. Good vibe. Good quality t-shirts for sale! Came here on a Sunday night, plenty of seats to choose from.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPi5CCGdM3v9n6sXFRfq-R&fid=0x0:0xd8004c04121feab6"],"When":"2025-8-4"},{"Name":"luis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIETcrtxsp_-CA5WlvCKAFaYqQFae_8fl1TRBdf9pSvBJrMaw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great selection of beer! Love the Hazy 👍
Merchandise is cool!
Plenty of sitting indoor and outdoor also plenty of parking","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrgjEty8BIg6A0cKXjvzQJ&fid=0x0:0xd8004c04121feab6"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Robert Spring","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6y4B9s1mI0ZyNCp8B2eWoajVwKBjszRcib_fmNmarGL7djA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tiki brewery success! Nice open area and patio; great beer selection. Tons of cool shirts and posters - to include the Tropical IPA. SD beer must visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDHgO-L4AE&fid=0x0:0xd8004c04121feab6"],"When":"2024-9-11"},{"Name":"A V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8-QRrEe_KMKDz6XVinJQW8N2gwccKMWk0sG8ThfMLcrNQ_13nUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I've had Tora in a can and I loved it. I went there with a small group yesterday and several of us noticed that the beers taste slightly chemical / bitter in the glasses in which they served, I have not noticed this effect in years so it's not common. I suspect it's the cleaning process where they may be finishing with a disinfectant that is not being properly rinsed. It's something other than a proper dishwasher. And for a trivia the DJ was enthusiastic and funny, but shouting into his microphone at full volume and through a PA system the entire night, incredibly loud.   On two separate phones with sound meter testing, the decibel level indicated reached 117dB, according to AI that's enough to create a permanent hearing loss quickly.

There was no music playing and maybe 50 people in the bar, no reason at all to be that loud, my ears were ringing when I left. Although I like Fall Brewing beer and I have enjoyed trivia night at other locations I would not return to this one for these states reasons.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhyJOaqBgIEd5IlP_d7Enz&fid=0x0:0xd8004c04121feab6"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Rusty Gears","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhJC7CqY8TcoJoJOamVXu_Ca6x1TGmzssq-0XsuGErLw5shA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fall Brewing’s new HQ, production facility and taproom in the former Saint Archer brewery location is a great evolution.  It has a very tropical ambiance and during nice weather, has huge roll-up doors open to let the sea breeze waft through.  Large outdoor Biergarten area in the shade.  The whole place just screams “comfortable” and is a popular location for small groups to socialize.  Great diverse food in the vicinity and since there typically is no on-site food, BYO is welcome and commonplace.  One fun fact that sets it apart from other establishments is that the restrooms are spotless and incredibly decorated with examples of some of the most inspired commercial art ever.  It’s like touring a gallery, but without the stuffy art snobs.

There has been a new pop-up sandwich guy there recently.  He is currently exclusive to Fall Brewing as he is just starting out and building a clientele.  It’s called “Wicked Rare Beefs” (no typo), and he sells the most incredible, tender and delicious roast beef sandwiches I’ve ever had.  He makes everything from scratch - BBQ sauce, rub for the roast, etc.  Sandwiches are made to order and portions are very generous - it’s a meal.
Currently, only Friday nights and he sometimes has a second sandwich offering - Pastrami, French Dip, Philly Cheesesteak.  All with the same quality and care in preparation.

Great beers, reasonable prices, fun staff, incredible ambiance.  Easy access just a block off Miramar Rd. Midway between 15 and 805 freeways in the “Beeramar” microbrewery district, so lots of other places nearby to try out as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDrqMCw2QE&fid=0x0:0xd8004c04121feab6"],"When":"2024-7-13"},{"Name":"Rob Lange","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUj5NcBmNwyL0IOI8f9OuizZyBsfy6F8q0plHZC46g22Xlxk1pReg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience on a Sunday afternoon. Tons of space to sit, the brewers were great to talk to about what they recommend and had a nice variety of beers to try. Hoping to be back soon","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELGpp5Hs3bu26gE&fid=0x0:0xd8004c04121feab6"],"When":"2025-6-9"},{"Name":"Karen Mendez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJblZ8SEY3ffMUJhhsNe8A8ozB1EMnjNsCnSRGEyA34HcQuMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a gem! We absolutely loved this place—the decor, the attentive service, and especially their beer options! I particularly appreciated their selection of lighter, less-hoppy beers. It's refreshing to find a place in the city that offers decent options on lagers and pilsners, in addition to the usual IPAs. I especially enjoyed the 'Oh Yeah!'

We'll definitely be coming back for more!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID9-ursYg&fid=0x0:0xd8004c04121feab6"],"When":"2024-3-15"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Richard R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5q5trGJ3itme82ke2tnUhGp84rNcFHbHpMod8lqpEcqfce-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An unexpected find. It seems that “red sauce” Italian places are not big here. There is one on every block on the east coast. After pursuing Italian in La Jolla and fining no parking we wound up here. It is unique and delicious. See the menu but aside from pizza, calzones, and salads you pick your pasta, your sauce, and your toppings. It is all combined in a stainless steel bowl, and then sautéed in front of you. I had potato gnocchi with shrimp and veggies, one (vegan) companion had pesto on spaghetti, and the third an order of meatballs. We did not get garlic knots included as others have said they had. The dishes were hot, tasty, well cooked and the “make your own” was unique and helpful. This would be a do again sometime. The staff was also great and accommodating.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAVtqWYmsiNH42NQCHmYlJI&fid=0x0:0x4968f7c32bbc5dc1"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Shondra J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlP8-654JlqP9dC91EAB4gK741k6Gfq_y_rxQMR-m6C7KjaSyU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tucked away in a modest strip mall, Pastalini might be easy to overlook — but trust me, you don’t want to miss this hidden gem!

The pasta bar concept is brilliant! Choose your favorite noodles, sauce, protein, and toppings to create a customized meal exactly the way you like it. With so many combinations, you could visit over and over and never have the same dish twice!

My latest creation was tortellini with sun-dried tomato sauce and chicken. It was bursting with flavor and absolutely satisfying. Even the small size was a generous portion and came with a side of warm garlic bread.

The menu truly has something for everyone, whether you’re craving comfort food, something light, or just looking to get creative with your meal. Pastalini is a must-try for pasta lovers!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCcswZrSb4b8R0I6YLnIdEF&fid=0x0:0x4968f7c32bbc5dc1"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Paul Gibbons","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIA_vRV7_cHhw9ZxMR1GwWW4SNTo52NQ0HPyPGjWw6SwyXSmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After trying pasta at countless places and being let down by bland sauces, Pastalini was a revelation. I had the spaghetti w/meat sauce, garlic, parmesan, and mozzarella; simple yet executed with precision. The sauce balances acidity and sweetness perfectly, and the ingredients meld into a cohesive, flavorful whole. Proof that careful technique and quality ingredients can turn fast-casual pasta into something exceptional. Wish I had known about Pastalini sooner.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQyW4ISu8FB_UYZgA-w-e1&fid=0x0:0x4968f7c32bbc5dc1"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Payal Patel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHAvulPjenVLGrYndXt7NLUDHv8xXn-btMmutqBKNzCbBoqqw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love Pastalini and come back to eat here all the time. They have plenty of options for the pasta, sauce, and toppings. Personally, I enjoy the baked pasta bowls, which include ricotta and mozzarella. Three garlic knots were also served with our pastas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMOOom67r4lmoaNe9fbDAY&fid=0x0:0x4968f7c32bbc5dc1"],"When":"2025-7-5"},{"Name":"Rod Gullo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLtD8wu7n6TDiPmPMDStJrJi0JUfdEvwuqigiGWadKwQC4Qrw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great customized pasta dishes.  Like Subway for pasta, only waaaaay better.  They have a large selection of pastas, toppings, tasty sauces, and meats to add.  The toppings are all good and fresh, and they have good quality ingredients.  The service is very fast and friendly. Update: Got the spinach linguini with roasted peppers, artichoke hearts, and mushrooms, and added calamari.  Also got the whole wheat fusilli, with artichoke hearts, fresh tomatoes, and mushrooms, and added calamari.  We usually get shrimp, but this time decided to try the calamari.  Big mistake, minus one star.  The calamari was extremely salty; you only tasted salt when you bit into it.  We will never order the calamari again.  We'll go back to ordering shrimp from now on.  The pasta and veggie toppings were very tasty as usual. Update: Went back to ordering shrimp with our pastas.  Sadly the shrimp are now very small. Minus a star. Update: Got basil pasta with shrimp, pomegranate red sauce, artichokes, mushrooms, and black olives; and spinach linguini with shrimp, pomegranate red sauce, artichokes, mushrooms, and roasted red peppers. Both were very good. Update: Got basil pasta with meatball, pomegranate red sauce, artichokes, and mushrooms; and spinach linguini with Italian sausage, pomegranate red sauce, artichokes, Sun dried tomatoes, and roasted red peppers. Both were very good. Update: Got gnocchi with Italian sausage, pomegranate red sauce, artichokes, spinach, and mushrooms; and spinach linguini with Italian sausage, pomegranate red sauce, artichokes, Sun dried tomatoes, and roasted red peppers. Both were excellent! Back to 5 stars!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICy4P3xeA&fid=0x0:0x4968f7c32bbc5dc1"],"When":"2021-1-16"},{"Name":"Kaydence Collins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4MkLYz48lT-5zhiBVdGgn6GwWqvzeKkvxcybx7o0IjR4FjHIH=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"4 person party celebrating my best friends birthday party. The staff let us bring in a cake we're extremely accommodating offered to turn off the lights for us. The food was delicious the staff were so kind. We gave them some cake and they gave us some extra bread before we left which was extremely appreciated 100/10 would recommend. Great service, Great Food, Great Atmosphere, Clean Restaurant. Best experience ever.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sonal Gandhi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaHCgk3-gFwJsIKERkjG0MJlMtbBPJTl_eFs3vq5CyVz_AHniqhA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"All their sauces were delicious. We tried their pesto and sun dried tomatoes sauce. Quantity was good.

Staff is friendly and quite accommodative to vegetarians. They use separate utensils to make each pasta.

Pretty decent seating and an affordable place.

Vegan and Vegetarian friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDDgsf7eQ&fid=0x0:0x4968f7c32bbc5dc1"],"When":"2024-4-7"},{"Name":"Roger Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8-prsT4spdqKCNpSEsk0T5L6i-oeNhiN5i5wD9efhHPBH8g3l=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came in around closing time, the staff are incredibly friendly! I didn't get their name but they were the closing shift front of the house on 11/2, if upper management sees this give him a bonus for his performance! Also back of the house too for excellently cooking the salmon (more on that later).

My friend frequents this store and invited me to try it, the build-your-own pasta feature is reminiscent of Subway: pick your size, noodles, sauce, meats, toppings, seasonings, and watch them build/cook it right in front of you, so there's absolutely no way it's old or been left out!

There's a decent variety of all the items, they even give samples of the sauces if you ask. They let me split the noodle types for more diversity, the sauce probably could as well but that might compromise the flavor profile of your pasta. All meals come with a few garlicky-cheese knots, they're small but pack a ton of flavor! You can even order them separately in a box to take home.

I typically try to get the fish option wherever I go, so I tried the salmon. It adds a bit in cost, but it was totally worth it! The person grilling it seasoned it perfectly (lemon pepper for anybody asking), and was lightly raw - imo the most ideal way to eat and taste good salmon.

From what I can tell this is the only location, which is surprising because it is a fun and delicious experience, plus I wish it was closer so I could visit it a lot more. Certainly a must-go if you're nearby!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC31dnKeQ&fid=0x0:0x4968f7c32bbc5dc1"],"When":"2024-11-7"}]

[{"Name":"puria ghasemi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmwoyvhgiVy4xao4uKrtCGWk7zL0-L2Lvk4_7Ch5yTrLz29Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent quality of food. Wonderful customer service. Very Health-conscious owner. They use sound ingredients for making delicious meals.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyM3guG_NLc90u-xK1oabE&fid=0x0:0x24ad45e92895c4a3"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Crystal Kamada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvOxOWwnV-_kuEe0x5aacDEyzRdZEIzpeGachS-H_Vy0uAzcg57Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This spot is a total hidden gem! How did we miss this when driving by Miramar Rd before?

We were in the area for shopping and appointments and wanted a quick lunch, but then we saw kebab and polo on the menu and ended up ordering enough to take home for later.

They have a great selection of sandwiches and burgers here, but the owners have a Persian and Afghan background so they have a variety of middle eastern cuisine too.

All the meat is halal too, so that means the burgers are extra good.  That burger was exceptionally good.
We got a mix of kebab, and we were blown away by how juicy the chicken was.  It's hard to find chicken kebab that doesn't get all dried out, but the way they do it here is perfect.  Juicy lamb and beef kebab seasoned to perfection.  The Qabuli Polo/Pulao is loaded with chunks of lamb too nestled in all that rice.

The owners are the nicest guys and take such good care of their guests.  The food came out quickly and they even helped us pack it up when we were done. They have plenty of seating inside, nice simple atmosphere for a quick lunch.

We will definitely be back to try more!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQuaCCyAE&fid=0x0:0x24ad45e92895c4a3"],"When":"2025-3-5"},{"Name":"Don Dre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXNAIqjPb4AZ-pNxyI4szw5o5PY1tw2mAwc1aH-SkrAUi-vWvfxyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Co-worker and I go out for lunch every other week. He remembered this place from when he worked down the street from it. So we went here as he remembered it to be good.

Good amount of parking. We walked in and the place itself is dated. The place could use an update. But most people I saw were there for a quick lunch. The staff was friendly and helpful.

The food was priced well. There has been some price increases since some of the other pictures that others have posted with prices. But over all still a good bang for your buck, compared to what you get at other places near by.

For the food I got the gyro with fries. It was packed with meat and the fries were hot and crispy. I forgot what my friend had, I believe a sandwich but he also had fries. We enjoyed our food very much and will be going back soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC7heWkoAE&fid=0x0:0x24ad45e92895c4a3"],"When":"2024-8-17"},{"Name":"Bravo Molina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjF3L-vmRSRXdvj_MJ-kLs0LxsNgIL97qgsUNRHxAfyicRLqp4Tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great little gem here. I love the beef kebabs here. There's something for everyone. Burgers, sandwiches, wraps, plate combos. Beautifully priced and a family friendly restaurant. Highly recommended this establishment.
Oh, staff here is amazing! Thank you.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwxauqzQE&fid=0x0:0x24ad45e92895c4a3"],"When":"2025-3-20"},{"Name":"Sisco Sisco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhVL9nXAD0cH246tOaTXWkmrURtPARqw7NQV_xBU2Xx47Xd6g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Garden Grill House is a hidden gem in San Diego! They serve an amazing variety of sandwiches along with flavorful Mediterranean and Persian dishes that always hit the spot. There’s plenty of parking, which makes visiting super easy.

The outdoor patio is a great place to relax and enjoy a meal, and they also offer many types of hookahs, adding to the fun and laid-back vibe. On top of that, they host parties and birthdays, and their catering service is perfect if you want to share their delicious food at your own event.

Whether you’re stopping by for a casual hangout or planning something special, Garden Grill House is definitely worth checking out!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jess D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5gRx3b13i196cE-afIdE5e2V4ZOn5FXjUv-gf7ofy7pxm_5w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely delicious food! The kebabs are great.

A little story, we happened to be looking for a restaurant on January 1. Many places were closed, but Garden Grill House was open. So we stumbled upon this restaurant, and it was a surprise hit with my family. We have been back 3x in a month. We also had a party here and the platter they made was beautiful (see picture).

I really like the Koobideh. The owners are super friendly and accommodating. 5 stars!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA79Ku6gE&fid=0x0:0x24ad45e92895c4a3"],"When":"2025-2-12"},{"Name":"Benga Adeeko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVevuzepaJRVfAuUc6Jntla079f-Nin_B3X0qlfMGuvz3Z44wk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a hidden gem. Great middle eastern and traditional American food","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZ3qXZhv6Vo-_4NSKQsARM&fid=0x0:0x24ad45e92895c4a3"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Twin Brothers Auto LLC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDikf_m2KrZ--nk3VQQ_DwYmwAasTA2N8xA_kq99b4_Ve_Fw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They are so so so tasty great burgers and kabob plates !! If you’re in Miramar you gotta go","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKRGQfpdgZQHrHpQDaLatb&fid=0x0:0x24ad45e92895c4a3"],"When":"2025-10-4"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had lunch here in a weekday and it was pretty quiet. Our waitress was very nice and heloee us decide what to order with her suggestions. We ordered the dishes she recommended to share and everything was really good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC1L8APuGnVdToQb6wToOC1&fid=0x0:0x4916706167d64da4"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Mitt Mir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVe1PebrOAN4KVFY2Q9a_uLC_csv8aW9_K-LCBwwOtdLW6gZTUupw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Authentic flavors, generous hospitality, and a truly welcoming experience

We recently dined at Orchid Persian Cuisine and was deeply impressed by both the quality of the food and the warmth of the service. From the moment we walked in, we were greeted with genuine kindness and care — the team clearly takes pride in making guests feel at home.

Every dish tasted fresh and beautifully prepared. The lamb shank with baghali-polo was tender and perfectly seasoned, and the chicken and beef kabobs were cooked to perfection — juicy, flavorful, and authentically Persian. The rice was fragrant and fluffy, and the saffron aroma filled the table.

What stood out most was the restaurant’s balance of elegance and comfort. The atmosphere is calm and inviting — ideal for both family gatherings and quiet dinners. The staff’s attention to detail, from presentation to timing, made the entire evening seamless.

This restaurant is a gem for anyone who appreciates authentic Persian cuisine and heartfelt service. Highly recommended for anyone visiting or living in the area — it’s one of those rare places that combines taste, warmth, and consistency beautifully.

Thank you, Orchid team, for a wonderful meal — we’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAaxequ_k3k79qwH8xPop2B&fid=0x0:0x4916706167d64da4"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Jeannie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5l0x3AJc5a9hzIXzQBglfz5adlDaDbkKRipnFEPo3cp93TYs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hands down my most favorite Persian restaurant.  I love their Shirazi salad here so fresh and delicious.  Of course need protein so my go to is the mini chicken plate. Very welcoming atmosphere and customer service is excellent.  I eat here often at the restaurant.  Orchid also offers catering.  They catered my 50th birthday party and the food was plenty and delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBDm3WQKoj26Yqmk4lKli6&fid=0x0:0x4916706167d64da4"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Rozhina Badakhshan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrUw9pc65wn35IXxJfGDGXI47m-5U2twbSs2_paCZ8InMCQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had an amazing experience! The restaurant’s atmosphere was cozy and stylish, with soft music that made the space even more inviting. The staff were friendly, attentive, and served everything with a smile. The food was absolutely delicious, beautifully presented, and made with fresh, high-quality ingredients—you could taste the care in every bite. I’ll definitely be coming back and recommending this place to my friends! The food here is AMAZING! Every bite bursts with flavor and freshness. Truly a must-try—can’t wait to come back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patricia Cohen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLtN7CBinxbcAETLgSlVQ1Mwyz_c5GdHtFFN-B-sAoUvG_qDw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an amazing lunch at Orchid Persian restaurant on our way to take our daughter to the airport on 12/5/2025
I tried the chicken barg which was incredibly tender and now my new favorite! My husband and daughter loved their Koobideh. And my daughter who is allergic to dairy had hers prepared dairy free which was greatly appreciated.
Mike, the owner introduced himself by bringing us their tomato-cucumber salad to try. It was probably the best salad I’ve had and it was so simple but utterly delicious. The food was fresh, flavorful and great portions. We love absolutely love Mediterranean food and Orchid Persian restaurant is the best!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexia Mora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnRtutMQtd21vDl0GQoc6-vcLSGaA3gVkEgXLra4Wo92RBPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an amazing experience! The food was absolutely perfect and the service was just as impressive. Omid, the owner, was incredibly helpful and attentive throughout our visit, always making sure we were taken care of and giving us great recommendations. The atmosphere was warm and welcoming, which made the meal even better. Highly recommend this place—we’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeIFRtZuj4VxkAxiyjs5PP&fid=0x0:0x4916706167d64da4"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"Nara Govindarajan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzrvZcZrx2QuTgshrdcRUrGJXs9Ju90mkL72XuY1LVEOCWQANT0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Family friendly place. The food tasted delicious and perfect portions for kids and grown ups.  Their Appetizers were, especially the ones with eggplants, tasted yummy. Ash reshte: very flavorful. They said that the saffron ice cream was their specialty and recommended that we have it with Baklava: it was heavenly. The ice cream had pistachios and rose petals. Must have dessert!
Overall, if you are in this area, do not miss it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Russ Schnapp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhu0HRJf65RpTW7AdM0JF-XiqkFLVmBCR7HEKZbbYJ96L62B9Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were super pleased to find that Orchid is now serving excellent Persian cuisine at a location that's convenient for us.

For starters, we had a tahdig with fesenjan. It was crunchy and delicious. The fesenjan was a little on the sweet side, but it worked just fine as a topping for the tahdig.

I had zereshk polo. The chicken was tender and delicious, and I'm a sucker for the delicate rice with barberries.

My better half enjoyed the chicken barg, which was moist and flavorful. And the serving size was generous enough that we had to take half of it home.

We finished with tea, baklava, and bamieh. The baklava was a perfect accompaniment to the tea.

Service was pleasant, efficient, and timely.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENK5u8rWt-fLXA&fid=0x0:0x4916706167d64da4"],"When":"2025-6-5"}]

The chicken wings are the best!!
We always get them to go.
Sorry no pics we always forget because we want to dive right in.
The staff are so friendly, they know us and what our order will be.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pk Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4N7X3fFSnn6Cc2RqbLIecPVTFWV7yC-uaxg8_2ya_oZfpKg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent facility and staff, very comfortable seating and nice golf views. Enjoyed!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wendy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvi8iimLtP2PAu9mDHaSeZsZ1Ue4HvUftqjxVrxW7SzHgTdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was tasty, potion sizes were good, service was excellent and the prices were reasonable.  Nice casual atmosphere in the dining room with views of the golf course.  We didn’t have beer or wine on this trip, but the prices for these were also reasonable.  They also had a nice outdoor patio dining area.  We will definitely be returning.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Captive Bolt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtQANPVtKBsEgQMWr2ejp5jejrEvfCerre6Kmp3usbo6LQmYvbjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thanks Miriam!

Food and service were great.
Went there with my daughter after picking up school supplies at the main exchange- we were seated right away, and we received our order very fast.

My daughter had the Club Sandwich (she only ate half- it was a pretty big sandwich)

I had the spicy Philly cheese steak.

Both were very good!

Menu is small, but in a way that less is more. Food was high quality in reference to ingredients and preparation. Service was excellent and rendered with courtesy and attentiveness. Glad to have a better option than Dennys at MCAS Miramar- not that Dennys was bad, but the food served at Fairview Cafe is much higher quality.
Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenna Shaffer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXmOyUFOuP4OOGVFVEXux5WJ2zqNlgWy7YXeqgbL8QK5s4jzjXIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food is good for the price! user_reviews: [{"Name":"Brandon Buckley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJBKqIlYcOMg5jsjOB4pkpxHreUneVL7zloq2j6MVoSGXV7jjBvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is actyally a Denny's. False advertising. They're obviously selling food on Doordash under a different name because they know nobody would buy it if they knew it was Denny's.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dexter Seavello","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJT577kstNYTbqxpBujbWItDx66RXHjldOAaVdcU5mTShGWuA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had no clue the meltdown was just re-branded Denny’s food. Showed up in a Denny’s bag with a Denny’s sticker. Ordered an orange Fanta but received a fruit punch. ordered the Hot N spicy chicken melt combo and the portion of fries was tiny and somehow both undercooked and stale. The chicken flavor was good but the bread was so soggy and dripping with butter and not well toasted it ruined what could have been a good sandwich. Back when I was in high school Dennys food was great at 2am but during the day just go anywhere else. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kalpita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1VHbZ8YyPXYH0_ddhB19ftEZO-hxW_4J6dMTutwvR3vZC73Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had dinner here for the first time while visiting San Diego and truly enjoyed the experience. We ordered dhokla, samosa chaat, kachori, and gobi Manchurian. The food was simple, fresh, and delicious. The mild sweet mint chutney served with the dhokla was especially memorable—one of the best we’ve had so far in the U.S.

Service was quick, the place was very clean, and the ambience felt calm and welcoming. There were no TV screens, just soft, soothing music in the background, which made the overall dining experience relaxed and pleasant. It felt like a mindful space to enjoy a meal with family.

We also appreciated the wide variety of options available, including snacks, meals, and sweets. The staff appeared quiet, courteous, and helpful. The self-service kiosk for ordering was another highlight—very smooth, quick, and convenient.

We loved our experience and would happily return on our next visit to San Diego. Highly recommend this place for anyone looking for wholesome food in a peaceful setting.

The place is also located near the sea beach and it was easy to find a parking lot at around 7:00 pm when we got here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD0ruhiKNrhJ3A_pSn6Zfi6&fid=0x0:0x7311e558bcc91273"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Pravin Asar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDIstCOdGv1iyx2_Tb_ViW5_q_pru3MwD_bii42oRjc4sX2Hho=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Authentic and homely vegetarian food; plenty of options; We came to eat only pav bhaji and missal pav. In addition to these, we had sev puri, pani puri and Shevpuri. Took home Dhoklas and Sabudanna Khichadi.

All items have authentic Indian taste ; just like made at home. The owner Kantaben is super friendly.

Highly recommend.

Unique experience at this location is  the wall decor and pop art posters","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBhLUG5r55sdJSz_AW_MEW4&fid=0x0:0x7311e558bcc91273"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Venkata K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLh0UyfDyhiOZqkk6Un5MKdnAFhujLqXhBqpEo-aUK8Ocgdcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wooww adults n kids all enjoyed this place.! Totally recommend it for anyone looking for quick dinner with not much wait times or delays.

We ordered with kiosk and order was fulfilled quickly as well. We did see that this place could get busy too. Loved the quality of food. Very clean and not greasy at all. Puran poli was good too. If it was bit more thinner it would be outstanding.

Totally recommend this place for anyone looking for a quick bite or light snack or full sized thali.. they also offered snacks for purchase. We loved coffee or masala chai as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDib0m6K2vOLxWgHrnTN_Rc&fid=0x0:0x7311e558bcc91273"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Tejas Joshi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqJ-IrJHABnCtOlwpBD9iiae8Tg_06vuyddpxFH8pwAeNAU9E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I was visiting California from the East Coast and had a serious craving for Indian food. As a Gujarati, I’m picky when it comes to comfort food, and this place genuinely hit the spot. The thali, especially, gave me that real home-cooked Gujarati meal feeling. When you’re traveling and missing familiar flavors, this is exactly the kind of place you look for.

Here’s what I tried:
•	Dabeli (1/5): Very dry. Honestly, skip this one.
•	Dahi Puri (3.5/5): Decent, good balance of flavors.
•	Gobi Manchurian (3.5/5): Tasty and enjoyable.
•	Vada Pav (3/5): Okay, not bad but not outstanding.
•	Chai (2/5): Didn’t really work for me.
•	Dahi Vada (3/5): Average, nothing memorable.
•	Mini Thali (4/5): The highlight. Surti undhiyo, chana masala, roti, Gujarati dal, and rice — comforting and satisfying, especially if you’re craving authentic Gujarati food. Doesn’t have many masalas, it’s very simple Gujarati thali.

Overall, if you’re Gujarati or just missing homestyle Indian food while traveling, the thali alone makes this place worth visiting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADiaNdNurvDJtU42CRUNCN&fid=0x0:0x7311e558bcc91273"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Nishit Shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUI_3OQuS9tb7NQeWk-ulM-mkOdDGBL3_SrQWdQtycL1lthmHc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really nice pure vegetarian restaurant in San Diego. I honestly enjoyed the food here more than any restaurant I ate at in Las Vegas or Los Angeles.

Jain options are available, and the taste is excellent—authentic, fresh, and satisfying.

The team handling is warm, polite, and very responsive, which makes the overall experience even better. Feels like home

Highly recommended for anyone looking for sattvik, pure veg food, especially Jain families","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCig_rZ8j-sU7dH0dWQ5wvk&fid=0x0:0x7311e558bcc91273"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Saloni Khilnani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLFdIt_uO6eNrlpxjIoRGMqOdWQO2eIrEX7-MEAi_YDzfAFSGk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very tasty Gujarati food. The staff is humble and service is also fast. They offer a wide variety of food options.
Must try for indian food.
A complete veg restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAo27uDHb_lyxgxWI_dt84W&fid=0x0:0x7311e558bcc91273"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Pratibha Sareen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEqCw0YAacIDxe3WIZxZ8DFCZOQ4B-axew6nE1WVCoZZWbc9wK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just love their food. Not too rich or buttery like the restaurants where I feel bloating after a few bites. My go to place for when I'm craving "home cooked" Indian food. I got the Harabhara kebab and the full thali and it was enough for 3 prior to enjoy. And make sure to grab a pack of Theplas or paranthas to have set home the next day. I didn't take a picture of the Samosa because I ate the whole thing before I got to the review!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5-3SZv21deiqyKF8lFmDx&fid=0x0:0x7311e558bcc91273"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Efrain Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1K3KtEoikRDKiJIBJ58lZa9oKFAhvQw1C-UD121uZh9ukfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went in for dinner after hearing mixed things and overall it was a decent experience. The place was clean and had a relaxed vibe, nothing fancy but comfortable enough. We ordered a few curries, naan, and an appetizer to share. The flavors were good and felt pretty authentic, though one dish was a bit milder than expected. Portions were fair for the price and everything came out hot. Service was polite, maybe a little slow, but friendly. I’d say it’s a solid option if you’re craving Indian food and want something reliable without a lot of fuss.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Richard Rundhaug","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKivJxTL3Sw0VaFQtMw5Qc4eFiXYPwfUDmBi_l-6qt_UeXtxVq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice and helpful staff. They are quick to serve the guests. The food is plentiful.  For a buffet the food is very tasty as well. I would definitely like to come back and indulge again. The variety was expansive. They had rows and rows of food with an Asian flair to it. The family had a great time having a meal together.  It is an excellent place for the family to gather. I had like two full meals and a full complement of desserts. Even Ole Uncle David enjoyed his meal. Too bad Joe Nastal could not have joined us, he would have enjoyed a meal here as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDaKc_yjmmcF-QfVdLqBLq6&fid=0x0:0xca77bd1a744b8e8"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Hope Langdon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoU6YCI2NxDyOk_gRqaprSgEtscxIl2bJ31HpkTavY03xfZVup=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I had a great time with my family! If it was just off my experience I would give more stars but I have to be honest and reiterate another review here, it did appear at closing that they were taking some of the seafood the oysters specifically and maybe the crab legs and putting them in containers of ice to re use for the next day which is not OK. I did see several reviews mentioning food poisoning so I wanted to note what I saw. However I personally enjoyed everything and thought everything tasted great. They could of checked on our drinks a little more often but when flagged down they were very kind about re filling and they did frequently remove used plates from tables. I will note if you have picky kids who are not used to Asian foods, this was a very traditional asian buffet with not many "Americanized options" for kids. There was no pizza, no breads, they did have fries that unfortunately were burned. However my kids still ate, they were happy and entertaining themselves at the make your own Smores station. So just know when you come that its Very much all asian food and if your pregnant or immune compromised maybe be careful with the cold seafood and stick with cooked options so you dont have to worry about potential reuse. Overall we did enjoy our time and honestly the money felt worth it for us, BTW you can check the site for printable coupons.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwIrY1ud9GntAbgcl9gJha&fid=0x0:0xca77bd1a744b8e8"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Emily Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRv7cjWM48PeuaBHNW7xRytnamhZJsrt__zcoZWEPYmunsRZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fabulous value for the selection offered. Especially the seafood. We would easily have spent more at a regular dine in seafood spot compared to here. Quality is consistent. The food is flavorful and tasty. My kids love the dessert here: tons of different flavored ice cream, s'mores station, chocolate fountain. Great location for families. Service is always excellent too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlRVX2Vfx97ctBwHnml4jv&fid=0x0:0xca77bd1a744b8e8"],"When":"2025-8-10"},{"Name":"ARNEL DELEON","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJF-a_BpBQjHPyZ3tzsFjTQcNIcBb4GV0rVt7l89mR9m4K1CQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's been a while since I've dined here.

Decided to drop in for lunch and was surprised how good the food was.

Service was excellent from Emily. She was friendly and very accommodating.

I couldn't decide what I wanted to eat such as a burrito, burger, etc. So I ended up here by default.

I ended having sushi, hot and sour soup, peel shrimp, mussels and teppanyaki!

What diet!? Lol

I did not have any dessert because I already adjusted my belt...

Price, value, selection - am excellent option when in the area.

I wouldn't hesitate to dine here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBYZBChnwb13dkuO22kEOa&fid=0x0:0xca77bd1a744b8e8"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Blue & Green Traveling Team","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1XnAfa6bmq_GN97CCvw4_cjNiM5kkOO-jit8NLF3RWTNI8QXTNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food was okay. Not the best selection and crab legs were horrible tasting. I'd say it's an okay place to dine, but it's not cheap for the kind of food they are serving!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlnslfvUcrFIntryn9z2FQ&fid=0x0:0xca77bd1a744b8e8"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Queenie Quynh Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3xrAZZw6Xd3sVxtv_FBivbJeisOV92iHlGgB8UWWf9cjsEKhwHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The place look ok from outside. Service is very good. The seafood is not fresh. Most of them cooked from frozen. Low quality of food, not to compare with price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBwDDMcz91qXlGhnRuM7I8O&fid=0x0:0xca77bd1a744b8e8"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"Jackson Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJK6kQH9R1N_Y4w7VLjglljZArptPUZMCIcaKtIST0Qwlh9Qg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just had dinner. Definitely worth every dollar. AYCE crab legs and oysters for 30 bucks. Both the hot and cold crab legs were full of meat to the shell and not salty like other places. And the cooked oysters were huge too and delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEIm47aedm9r_zAE&fid=0x0:0xca77bd1a744b8e8"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"Sungui Jiang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqaHEmNmltM5HQnz8FGtHuaRdoBOlJdC515oh8yA8mjIUH7A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome food with a wide selection and fresh too. Favorites were the seafood. Crab legs were massive and full of meat. Not salty too. The salmon sashimi was so buttery and the ikura sushi was yummy. Friendly staff and fast service. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCexCMPe7dJLlkS2SHCkdrP&fid=0x0:0xca77bd1a744b8e8"],"When":"2025-6-22"}]

[{"Name":"Stissy S•","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHBpZwkXkui0JCTbpOEnm-GAX78_f_UuCeEdPGfEQx1zaYIcPH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I decided to stop by for happy hour deals. The price and portion sizes are very good. I enjoyed the poke nachos but the tortilla chips were stale. I like their fried calamari with the two dipping sauces they provide. The garlic chorizo clams were a little bland but it smelled good!

I recommend trying their ciopinno because it was so flavorful and delicious. The garlic butter seafood boil was too bland so I regret not getting the Cajun sauce. The garlic butter prawns were not what I expected. It had a sweet chili sauce flavor instead of the basic garlic butter flavor. It needs more garlic and salt. The side of rice it came with was so dry too. The shrimps were a little overcooked but they were a nice jumbo size!

I tried some of my husband’s Cajun white fish tacos and it was good but nothing special. We got a lot of food to go and I didn’t take a pic of everything.

I would return for the ciopinno and happy hour deals.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuw-DgEi3FCT3-L5VI1DJG&fid=0x0:0x9a48b8f332a4ffbc"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Qc Yong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsPiq9Ry9WYP98L1XwJ_SrULwtaI4tlx-NFfKOj1cXzaMOdOI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very generous portions, particularly for quinoa bowl. Taste very good in general. A bit under-seasoned for quinoa bowl but you can always add salt. Very crispy calamari. Very happy with the meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDK2kRzAHAa1uPkuwRm7MZW&fid=0x0:0x9a48b8f332a4ffbc"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Richard Stark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwaPwvLWJMPpJgQp77TBd8TzEQ8TBf-Zup9AV4iWlwcNb9o2c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent staff, clean and fun atmosphere. You forget you are at a little strip mall and just become absorbed in the light decor and  flavors. Oysters, Korean chili Barramundi (kindly recommended by the staff)and Poke are first class. Conversation at the table was all about the food, insisting others taste your plate and complimenting the value and quality. Don’t miss the local soda fountain and condiments in the back. What a gem","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9XMi_E8bcT9P6aDKNG9H1&fid=0x0:0x9a48b8f332a4ffbc"],"When":"2025-8-8"},{"Name":"Lynzi Coffey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8jfcdSRtM-tGD2p0_DjFmzkNEnCV0HCIkAGH_0rW3OLFk-YQkCA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Their fish tacos are delicious! You won't go wrong with either the grilled or beer battered. The grilled zucchini was completely unexpected and so good! So flavorful! Great atmosphere, friendly and helpful staff, all around winner. Worth the trip and bonus, so affordable!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTAdl74QJ8tnHRxq0F8SOd&fid=0x0:0x9a48b8f332a4ffbc"],"When":"2025-7-7"},{"Name":"JJ Sullivan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxYCyOpVpr1Mlxt2WwPXSyC2g_zok5x8TBf_rPd6n0SgPWANON=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was great. You gotta love seafood they do have a few chicken options. The prices for seafood were great! Place was pretty busy. You order at the counter and then sit down and they bring it to you.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDe1dNp__7NFjxZfVJPiULy&fid=0x0:0x9a48b8f332a4ffbc"],"When":"2025-9-7"},{"Name":"BaoChau Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKpQ0EK_3T-sL8-3CHVdqUNet0Ihgm8ncQppI63jK44JHFYJuU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My friends and I had lunch there - the seafood cioppino, quinoa salad and poke on crispy rice served on the outdoor patio. All were delicious! We ordered them as shareable dishes and were happy with the freshness and portion sizes. My two friends thought that it was so good that they came back with me 😂 10/10 would come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqI_HtPSpt--58vuhfYfqM&fid=0x0:0x9a48b8f332a4ffbc"],"When":"2025-9-9"},{"Name":"Christine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWz1dvAOaA5XL5q71xHDbawsfTCUBHv2MUclIZlGUvC6Sq4geuX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My teen daughter and I tried this place for the first time. We didn’t know what to expect but the staff greeted us and gave us ample time ti check their menu. We ordered Shishito Peppers, Quinoa salad with shrimp, clam chowder, and shrimp & chips. Surprisingly the price is reasonable, the food is made fresh and so delicious! Service is top notched, I observed the staff and they were constantly cleaning yet readily available when needed, and making sure the place is organized. They get things DONE! Will definitely return to try their fish tacos!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAkrGLtgE&fid=0x0:0x9a48b8f332a4ffbc"],"When":"2025-2-7"},{"Name":"Shawn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWy0MuDbn-LUjid7TibExRT3QrLM77Q3LnhFK2_7m02I-fgduUz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything is great here! The food is delicious and the service was fast. Their happy hour is also incredible value. We had the poke nachos, calamari, and fish tacos.
It was all fresh and we appreciated the generous portions.

It’s also a bonus that they are part of the local Scripps Ranch community - the quality of their ingredients and prices reflect that.

The menu is well thought out and super clean. They put on the basketball games for you as well. Will definitely visit again and highly recommend checking this place out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAzvv_Og&fid=0x0:0x9a48b8f332a4ffbc"],"When":"2025-2-9"}]

[{"Name":"ARNEL DELEON","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJF-a_BpBQjHPyZ3tzsFjTQcNIcBb4GV0rVt7l89mR9m4K1CQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"There is always some sort of celebration taking place here when I dine in.

The food is good if you know what to look for.

In terms of nigiri, sashimi, sushi and steak. At times the crab is very savory, other times it's disappointing but depends on the time of day when you visit.

Service is always great. The servers try their best to keep customers happy by replenishing drinks and clearing used plates.

The kitchen staff brings out fresh food as it's cooked to keep a solid rotation of a variety of food options.

Been coming here since their grand opening and I'm glad to say their quality hasn't dropped off one bit.

I'll be back again for sure.

Remember to tip well!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDLV-CgZ_XGlYDGZ-f227eo&fid=0x0:0xda55d3a26c6ae934"],"When":"2025-8-28"},{"Name":"Momo Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGFwqPw_kZKXRU2rnAA1Sk_koYilp8-PD1FKKySSZEoyDVfHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Natsumi is a buffet restaurant that offers great value for money when it comes to sushi and seafood. If you're looking to enjoy a wide variety of seafood and sushi without breaking the bank, this place is definitely worth the price. The freshness of the ingredients appears to be quite good, and the menu features a fusion of Asian flavors, including Japanese, Chinese, Korean, and Vietnamese dishes, as well as Filipino street food like fried bananas.

The sushi selection includes: poke bowls, assorted sushi rolls, freshly sliced sashimi, and more. The seafood options feature: crab legs, fresh shrimp, oysters, and others. For soups, there are choices such as egg drop soup, hot and sour soup, and miso soup. The dim sum variety includes: shumai, dumplings, sesame balls, and more. The hot food section offers: steamed fish, orange chicken, salt-and-pepper crab, honey walnut shrimp, rice, noodles, and other dishes.

Note that drinks are not included in the buffet price. Although the staff may not be particularly smiley, they are efficient at clearing plates—often tidying up the dining area quickly while you're getting food. While the decor may not be particularly refined or modern, the pricing is very reasonable for a buffet:

· Lunch (11:00 AM - 3:30 PM): $18.99
· Dinner (after 4:00 PM): $31.99 / $33.99","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBLjC3Cn6a0wMDZ9lZ1lt8H&fid=0x0:0xda55d3a26c6ae934"],"When":"2025-9-18"},{"Name":"Derick Foster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfL8hHIt-DM9jHAS0muYLDs_8BPrTPgnLDIcJyvd6ifE0WzS3H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"You gotta love seafood to visit this place, but look they have so many other options as well. My point is that for the price is a great place to eat seafood (Crab legs, Oysters and Clams), lots of sushi and sashimi options as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBChOJfb2LHseZBdOJsePy&fid=0x0:0xda55d3a26c6ae934"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Prasenjit Saha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfpJciSD72pRu23vFeYP8x6Q2wirVttb3-drBXtcgDKosbAyoefQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried the buffet! They have a lot of options and it was very busy, even on a weekday. Overall, it’s a good spot if you want to try a variety of seafood.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAEfU3PDETdywWpM4uq2hnq&fid=0x0:0xda55d3a26c6ae934"],"When":"2025-11-19"},{"Name":"Puddingstone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTR5kZJFEnfFpVHpx9Vsxv-8kYayw42WkFQOh_c8eBpx8ETdz9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very outdated interior, the service is great and it's all about your own perspective. Yes they come by often and take your plates away but they're not rushing you, I take it more that they are trying to make space for you. Stafford super kind and helpful, selection is decent for the price point. Very late 80s early 90s Vibe with the decor but it's about the food, right? My only negative is the broccoli floating in froth milk. Your brain tells you it's whipped cream, but it's definitely not.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAq05h793jPLZ24AcZkI8Mj&fid=0x0:0xda55d3a26c6ae934"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Aunty Esther","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1zyYW0KKGvi1ynRI-Be7baNPsJdF7R8m1X4Eh_LKfX2OIe-GZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Aunty Esther here, please take it from me. Natsumi Sushi & Seafood Buffet is the place you want to be at for lunch/ dinner. The minute you enter, though it may be crowded, you will still be greeted with a warm welcome greeting. Seating may take a few minutes due to their popularity. Foods are always warm and fresh and greatly satisfying. Table wait staff are always fast to assist you from serving/refilling drinks, clearing/cleaning floors, and yes, they will assist you with picture taking and birthday singing. Try a little bit of everything you wish to try to get a sense of how the food tastes like. Trust me, you won't be disappointed. Make reservations in advance for your large family gathering. Like I always say, tell them Aunty Esther sent you..lol","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo_bDF6QE&fid=0x0:0xda55d3a26c6ae934"],"When":"2025-4-28"},{"Name":"Quentin Oswald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWv4hyRPC9uOaflguEpOyMQtc9_uv59kHsu5hmaGXVy7-I2103grQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Truly authentic Asian buffet! Limited selection of warm food, unlike others, but each dish was amazing! The quality of the warm food, sushi and crab legs were on point.

Thei service was impressive. From those greeting youz to the servers, and table waiters. They were all very attentive.

Highly recommended! Will come back again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Khalid Omar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUsbe3jb84oV6vmNjPoJhyhgCp5XxJH3JrFAHjvloOrBtEDhiZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Restaurant serving sea foods, including Japanese, Chinese and Mangolian selective food.
Speciality revolves around sushi, sashimi, Chinese fry and Mangolian BBQ.Can add oysters and crabs.
The food is delicious ( though some dishes may not be liked by Muslims); the service is efficient.However, interior decoration needs to be modernised.People from nearby offices/ shops have their lunch here.Generally remains busy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAXv_YWI_Awwoz5NtW8mieN&fid=0x0:0xda55d3a26c6ae934"],"When":"2025-12-6"}]

[{"Name":"Momo Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGFwqPw_kZKXRU2rnAA1Sk_koYilp8-PD1FKKySSZEoyDVfHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is truly unique — it’s a Korean + Japanese fusion–style shabu shabu, and quite different from typical Japanese shabu shabu or hot pot. They offer a soy-marinated crab (ganjang gejang)–inspired broth, which already sets them apart, and it comes with a bowl of their signature rice. The plating and tableware feel very Korean, so the moment you sit down, it really feels like you’re having a Korean-style hot pot. At the same time, the ingredients and overall balance lean more Japanese, and the fusion feels very natural rather than forced.

This is an à la carte restaurant, not all-you-can-eat. Three of us spent about $170 total (around $56 per person), and we were extremely full by the end. 🥩 The meat selection is extensive and high quality. We ordered a small plate of wagyu, a large 32-piece beef platter, and lamb — all were fresh and well-cut. Vegetables are included, which is a nice bonus. We also ordered Japanese skewers, including beef tongue, chicken heart, and pork belly. Everything was cooked perfectly with great seasoning, especially the beef tongue and pork belly — definitely not an afterthought.

🍤 For the appetizer, we chose the garlic shrimp, which was incredibly fragrant. The shrimp were large, juicy, and loaded with garlic flavor, especially good when dipped in sauce.

Each person gets two dipping sauces: a sesame sauce and a soy-based sauce. I personally preferred the sesame one — slightly sweet, very smooth, and perfect with the meat. Service also deserves a shout-out: the staff constantly checked in to see if we needed anything, whether we wanted more broth, and how the food was. Since it was a holiday, they even complimented us with an extra bowl of meatballs, and to finish, they thoughtfully served ice cream for dessert. Overall, the dining experience was excellent 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7ijXQvXvA3t7M6jgKtRAR&fid=0x0:0x55e3e00bdfe8b16a"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Becky Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV97e1nMZAtmvGjInP68oa9Ln9idmYV60CTjuUxLdc4jkL5Hx1l=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came for the lunch special and honestly, it's not that great of a deal. It's only ~$4 cheaper and comes with green tea (which I don't drink, so it was wasted on me). I will say that the service was truly exceptional - everyone was so nice,personable, attentive, and explained everything so clearly. The meat was also noticably high quality. Their portions are also generous. (With free rice/veggies refills.) Would recommend coming with a group so you can mix and match different meat options.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBz7ev58qeshbFOg2ZADxGh&fid=0x0:0x55e3e00bdfe8b16a"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Jeana Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrJXqYcdEzcXmBqaHYGJLc82mnuDRVetCHrMeFd1BKv0taXR5-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good food, fast service.
We are usually seated right away.
Food comes out fast and they always check in on us.

The appetizers are really good too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1wNqzrPdcPpPX8EQPNJr_&fid=0x0:0x55e3e00bdfe8b16a"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Angela Zapanta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdXaCg-KxZ7QFIrKYqAhEWfRszmGfRwwWxHfXUR_H2MzOKeGMP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had such an amazing experience at Mokkoji! The servers were extremely attentive (Our main server was Tri, and he was super nice) — they made ordering super easy, suggested the best way to get more bang for our buck, and went above and beyond to make sure we were taken care of. They even gave us a big table so we didn’t have to wait long, which we really appreciated.

The food was absolutely delicious — the meat was high quality and so flavorful, and the unlimited veggies, rice, and condiments really tied everything together. Everything tasted fresh and perfectly prepared.

Overall, incredible service and top-tier shabu! Definitely coming back soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWeoT1sIqLFv8caity62zP&fid=0x0:0x55e3e00bdfe8b16a"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing dinner at Mokkoji Shabu Shabu Bar in Mira Mesa! For those of you who don’t know Shabu Shabu is Japanese hot pot. We ordered the surf & turf set sampler for two and chose the seafood platter with lobster, salmon, scallop, shrimp and ordered the New York cut for beef. It also comes with a garlic shrimp appetizer. Everything tasted incredible. Great vibe and atmosphere, all the staff were very friendly and accommodating with our questions, and the food comes quickly. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCicG3ZMqIOBvTLvXLrfaL-&fid=0x0:0x55e3e00bdfe8b16a"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Darren Wei","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAjyetbOUTTzoS9W5EElNrdmpbTNu9tGVxfXgBou4hlV3PJV0YIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here with some school classmates looking for good food to fuel our brains and brawn. Loved the visit, would definitely come again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCoqFSul6IAgznp9zL-StbB&fid=0x0:0x55e3e00bdfe8b16a"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"PikaChua","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuxyfN9-K9NNfdq5IoGmFdbI-7tXgRMsvKAP3NN9DkIL6Ck6eU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Give Haven a big raise!!!!!!!!
