We started the night with ordering our beers at the counter but quickly moved outside to sit so we could hear each other talk. It was very laid back and nice sitting outside in their large patio area.\n\nWe placed our food orders via a QR code. Food was delivered to our table without any issues.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDl038i2levmKa1Nk2ccAEn\u0026fid=0x0:0xa53e7be83605c68d"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Marc Long","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJpv-_1Wx7P3PZ6sCJpCak4gAstkwhV5WAubwkmvofLLkfuwyTj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent bar! a must! Good mix crowd. Bartenders go over the top to give great service. super friendly  shout out to the best friendliest bartenders, Stephanie, Lauren , Megan, Rain, Diego, the best service you can get. they make you feel at home even if it's your first time being there.  Food is over the top. Some of the best wings I've had in a long time. THE DRINKS ARE ON POINT!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Valeria Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvTcQFS6LyLY6-8NGwDegXI0590Ciru67fW2v-3kZoyJ5rew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can't rate the food. By the time we arrived the kitchen was closed. We had eaten beforehand. But the brewskis were great! First time here. Didn't play in the arcade. We hung out in the patio. Nice atmosphere. Honestly, when we arrived, I thought i had made a wrong turn! When you arrive, don't worry, the strip club totally threw us off too . Followed by the dry cleaning right next to it lol This place looked sketchy at first , not going to lie. It was a great night tho. There's a few pool tables inside. Games on both ends of the bar .  If you're looking for a Dave n Busters vibe, this isn't it. This place is more lowkey. The introvert in me was pleased. Not overwhelming. Give this place a shot!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Cheng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxIGO4if0uE-UJv6--O_HLILm0oMWguFA_lARgDzEVWIzVmDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The bartenders are so friendly. I really like the orange blossom drink and the spicy cucumber margarita. I like that you can play unlimited games for a time period. Makes things easier.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAuHicOTkAG8HJryuwKufI_\u0026fid=0x0:0xa53e7be83605c68d"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"jenna bandinelli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwFrJZQfiA7hn-aTRM-zSwkB2U4IaSQLqiSm6RVdvRtO3vN2cg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This isn’t your average skimpy bar food. They really feed you here, and for a good price as well. They have such great selections on the menu.  The food comes out looking and tasting the same, every time. The cocktails are super tasty. I’m always satisfied after leaving this place. The chicken kabob plate is my favorite. So delicious!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ3O2O-wE\u0026fid=0x0:0xa53e7be83605c68d"],"When":"2025-3-2"},{"Name":"Shannon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJy1nP_uKc5vGEpgSXMyI2NMHeWMK8qxwu_h-kzNC2OYH3DEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"really love this place, it’s super fun and the games and drinks are really affordable! i’ve been here a few times and it’s always super fun, but tonight i went to get another drink at 1:10 (they close at 2 and i was playing games next to the bar and never heard last call) and they told me it had already happened. i understand closing early if no one is there, but there were around 30 people inside. i know i got drinks right before 1:30 last time i was there so it was a little disappointing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan Needham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKLbpxVrYSV1usayPsrAJ7RJwniTfqnVKqXFEcc2OzfTaLuuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The drinks are great price for SD! It’s super busy and seating is essentially outdoors and the bar top. Tho it can be rather loud on a Saturday inside. Food service was fast, and the bartenders were very attentive. If I didn’t get salmonella from the restaurant prior I would have loved to stay lol. Salmonella and cocktails do not mix..I’ll be back on a weekday to retry","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stevi Kreger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVgjMku5zgCeBL89kXsTwy0ASxm2iuCzGDiIOYnoJ4_HEpjg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Came for drinks, the place was busy and the bartenders were drunk and complaining about the drinks we were ordering because they did not want to make them. Told us to read the room and order something else. (We ordered a shot with 2 ingredients)I’m a bartender myself and would never be able to be so lazy or have such a bad attitude. There was only two of them and they kept saying they were “unprepared”. Regardless we waited in line like everyone else and were patient and were then approached with attitude. She could have made the drink we ordered in the 15 minutes she spent arguing with us. Cool place needs better trained staff/bartenders, or sober ones because the one yelling at us, older dark headed woman was stumbling behind the bar and slurring her words. 12/22/25","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Carol B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6eRfZkpiRTc4dPnwhnedvnr1iDJuZqML8xBc2fCoE1PWxhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at Abbey’s Texas Barbecue. The food was delicious, full of flavor, and clearly made with care. The wings were absolutely amazing and easily the best I have ever had, perfectly cooked and incredibly tasty. Friendly service and a welcoming atmosphere made everything even better. I will definitely be coming back and highly recommend it to anyone who loves great barbecue.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAdsIXUKfR12YXQEpUUo2wS&fid=0x0:0xbe07708e011daa0b"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Camille S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkioWafI8kFVU-c2lA_O-KRnO1gg6fqZfcKEYegSZn1Q11Lzbp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are not professional critics, but the amount of times we said "it's really good" speaks for itself! Abbey's Real Texas BBQ is the real deal, bringing authentic, slow-smoked flavor to San Diego. The 18-24 hour cook time for their meats is truly evident in the final product.

Our favs:

-Beef Brisket: Incredible tenderness and a deep, smoky flavor. A must-order.
-Pulled Pork: juicy, perfectly seasoned
-Brisket Tacos: a MUST HAVE
-Pumpkin Cheesecake: so rich and creamy!!!

If you are looking for genuine, high-quality Texas BBQ in San Diego, make Abbey's your next stop. Excellent food, great lunch specials, and will definitely be back!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnBnnehUG2LC_eqYHr6Bsu&fid=0x0:0xbe07708e011daa0b"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Brandon Nolte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtoI3lwUCA8iBkLYqFo-PJFi8nZL1hASn6zauNOtNn1h7iNciedg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Really solid BBQ. The brisket was fatty and full of flavor, and the ribs had a nice smoky taste with tender meat that nearly fell off the bone. The coleslaw could’ve used a bit more vinegar for balance. Wings were not gluten free, so I didn’t try them.

Staff was super friendly, though parking was tight with lots of towing warnings. My current favorite BBQ spot in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCmWOP4FwBNV8ue244eJDNB&fid=0x0:0xbe07708e011daa0b"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Quyen Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhpzDqrenbnfTqvQQ6QM6gCBijUPhxTgLZgHGDbELJkgj-7qOB-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time here. We got the N1 Sampler Plate that comes with two sides. We chose mac&cheese and fried okra. The beef brisket was fatty and fork tender. There was a hint of smokiness in the meat and the bark was really tasty. The pulled pork was not dry. Both meats went REALLY well with their house made Carolina Tangy Gold sauce (a tangy mildly sweet honey mustard). Their house made bbq sauce was tangy and slightly sweet. The ribs did not fall off the bone but it was juicy and tasty. The chicken was slightly dry but chicken was smoky in flavor especially the skin. Their mac and cheese was very creamy from the beginning of the meal to the end and had a slight kick to it. The noodles must have been al dente because it held up really well. The fried okra was perfectly crunchy on the outside and soft on the inside. The corn bread was soft and buttery it had something like a sweetened bottom, did not need anything extra on it. Shout out to Mark for the fantastic service despite being slammed during the holiday lunch rush, he ensured we weren’t forgotten and even gave us some extra attention. We are definitely coming back to try more!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHxP_EYZOhRQx85D7xvVul&fid=0x0:0xbe07708e011daa0b"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Internal Dandelion","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYNMuSYkaSQ2dSFIfHQ-u04JSR4vNtjvlmf3vYr45k3pYx_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I've been here a few times and it's a good spots to visit for BBQ. The brisket is really tender and not too smoky, but I know others may want a bit more. Portions were decent but the wings were a bit dry for my taste. One thing that's cool is their Texas Chainsaw Mammoth Sandwich. It which was HUGE and if you can eat it within their timeframe you can get on the Wall of Fame! Overall, it's a good choice for BBQ in the city.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDy0yN3dUjNYH7X7oWF8WcU&fid=0x0:0xbe07708e011daa0b"],"When":"2025-9-18"},{"Name":"Olympia Balcázar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbnFd_KyGorLKS5T_Kwrt_7M-0Ju3altZEzqdZi7awfh6QPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food was okay nothing special to what was expected due to such positive reviews a bit disappointing. Everything was dry except for the chicken and the Mac and cheese was delicious. Baked beans were undercooked and very tangy and the brisket was unfortunately very dry. Overall food review 5/10. Atmosphere wise 3/10 a worker was sweeping and swept under our table while dining and swept our feet with broom. Not very pleasant as we felt like we were in her way. Something that could’ve been done prior to opening rather than while customers are eating. We ordered burnt ends to which we never received and most likely they didn’t put our order in correctly. Mid food mid environment","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAKXhRne0-q9hiepbHkEwh2&fid=0x0:0xbe07708e011daa0b"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Nicole Sid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpE6fsjrhhe1pYgnwsQ0jiV1cIpUxy4D__sEUOBy1Jf4sSAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ended up at Abby’s Barbecue by chance for my partner’s birthday after another spot we tried was closed, and I’m so glad it worked out that way. From the moment we walked in just about 40 minutes before closing the staff could not have been more welcoming or kind.

We tried to hurry since we saw they were closing, even asking for to-go boxes so we could do the birthday cake outside. Instead, one of the staff members (I believe the owner’s son) encouraged us to stay and not rush. He shared that he had just turned 32 himself and then went above and beyond getting on the speaker to have everyone sing happy birthday. It was such a thoughtful and genuine gesture, and it really made the night unforgettable.

On top of the incredible hospitality, the food was absolutely phenomenal. Every bite was delicious, and you can tell the care that goes into it.

I can’t recommend Abby’s enough. If you’re looking for amazing barbecue paired with genuine kindness and hospitality, this is the place. We’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAel6RKWWyMCaU9mJZjyZyw&fid=0x0:0xbe07708e011daa0b"],"When":"2025-9-8"},{"Name":"Brittany Gilbert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLx8TtJtYQaOhEThibb14T5azj1S_bv7TWTUjI5cAnhZKatmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For my first time here, I tried the smoked turkey plate with cornbread (yummy!), onion rings  and mac and cheese. The turkey had a great smoky taste and the Mac and cheese was a good combo a creamy and cheesy. I prefer super crispy onion rings so these weren't for me but still tasted good. My husband had the smoked  chicken wrap, which was super delicious as well! The owner had great customer service and made sure we were happy with our meal. I will definitely be returning!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtzeh1TdTEOeAoyepikY7B&fid=0x0:0xbe07708e011daa0b"],"When":"2025-7-20"}]

[{"Name":"Dawn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCWLTBFiXcJVuoU_JZpUWFTzylTcpSDmvcthmw9mJ0WW3ZmHCm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Chicken and Pork Gyros were delicious, but that Tzatziki is going to be the end of me.  I could eat it by the gallon!

The pork was crispy and full of flavor.  The Chicken Gyro was my favorite.  I love the seasoning on the chicken and it was so tender.  Everything seems so fresh and like the best home cooking.

I like the Tzatziki better than any I’ve tasted.  Everything is finely chopped, so the texture is nice.  And it's packed with fresh herbs.  I am still doing the Happy Dance about it long after it's gone.  One thing I will say is that it has lots of garlic!  I love that, but depending what you'll be doing after...  And you can get a nice large container of the delicious Tzatziki that comes with Pita Bread.

How many large containers is too many?  Asking for a friend.  😁","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMDCv_30j6b0Ww&fid=0x0:0x31e023f971091a43"],"When":"2025-5-13"},{"Name":"Kayla Kloster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKf2dg0CBv8UuTOgXnDg0APLT-kU7y9vxdp52BKQutSg_FAWg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"SO GOOD! The beef gyro was amazing,
a ton of meat and great flavor! The service was also excellent, extremely friendly! Chefs kiss","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD72FpSFjQgso4W2rGDb5z2&fid=0x0:0x31e023f971091a43"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Doug Shelton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKGiMv6euKw-Qy1s8G4nkpWih94mq_8SF1Hh6JiUCzJL2X7UJ3sw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This no frills Greek eatery has delicious Gyros. What's even better? The best French fries in existence. Large, steak fry proportions, golden and crispy on the outside, fluffy within, and not greasy at all. For an extra treat, try the blue sage iced tea. It's aromatic and refreshing and unlike anything else you'll taste. I come here every chance I get.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKXmv46i366dKw&fid=0x0:0x31e023f971091a43"],"When":"2025-5-17"},{"Name":"Penelope Mugar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2EiBsfl3bCOLIGWY70pAtiUOfcf5Mb91zHkPX-djqCT-2b5jbLA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best hummus and lamb/beef gyro i have ever had, the spanakopita was sold out, the falafel were crispy and so perfectly hot!! The portions are also very nice, the garlic and spicy sayces and tzatziki are so good with everything!! The fries are gigantic also!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesus Blanco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYOzQAP5wsczcMK7ryRJ6QObnP7-6vj3Jh-XLyQugZ1z0kIFY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"$40 dollars for this plate to expensive.  no flavor very dry out food, chicken to white completely raw!
I don’t know how people’s like this kind of food! Very bad taste. Definitely not coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBW-5nvnpfZiLJQnKaqY_GX&fid=0x0:0x31e023f971091a43"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Rachel Chastanet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfgpWjFVA0tzhhF43zemAWSc-NGzRbivmpATl4Cg_EXM45q3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a tiny hole-in-the-wall place but the food is soooo good!  There is a small indoor eating bar and four outdoor tables. The bathroom is 20 feet away in the strip mall and requires a key but is clean and nice. Of course they do take out and chowbus and iMenu if you want to eat at home. The picture is of a medium Gyro Fries and is was amazing. The Gyros were also great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI7JWfHA&fid=0x0:0x31e023f971091a43"],"When":"2025-4-8"},{"Name":"Ethan Navarro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKt2S5Oro2IRxZt3ua5uTDaZF92rgJSn-PN9Bdvz4v-lZ3dUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food, great prices, great service! As someone who’s been to Greece, this was so incredibly delicious and honestly one of my favorite places to go now! I tell everyone to try it especially because you are welcomed with such great friendly people!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D “roydon”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4m5Y_yZMXVPfwl4Z6zl_td2gdFQ0pPI0loVZcZMgkPYkb20Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best giouvetsi I ever had (same as Crete, but double portion size)! Avgolemono soup is great too! Ask what’s on their “secret menu”
Not a lot of indoor seating, restaurant opened during Wuhan shutdown, so started out as To-Go. Now it’s definitely a Go-To!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOL4qY-ty-qZjwE&fid=0x0:0x31e023f971091a43"],"When":"2025-6-10"}]

[{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great spot with reasonable prices, likely catering to local workers. The place is clean with plenty of outdoor seating. We tried different breakfast items and coffee, and everything was delicious. I loved the cheese and spinach omelet—super soft, with lots of potatoes on the side. My Aloha Latte (less sweet) was also excellent and comforting. Friends enjoyed their croissant sandwiches too. Friendly service, with staff all smiles. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXhIbvxQE&fid=0x0:0x71e66b70a25a2589"],"When":"2024-10-24"},{"Name":"Dmitriy Kotov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiDOV89x8JX6flJfVSF-aHmN-akXVNum5LLHzUpFrgXWuuWwUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is not the first time I come here, and by my arrival, after the rain, all the tables and benches were dry, and the food is tastier and tastier every time!

This incredible healthy breakfast, which was put together for me according to my special preference, captured all my attention;

and the taste buds just went crazy with this taste! At the same time, I know for sure that if I want natural food - I come here!

I also want to add about the girl who prepared this breakfast for me, who felt with all her heart the importance of how I want to taste exactly what will bring me truly heavenly pleasure!

And she managed to do it, moreover, in the process of preparing breakfast - she went outside and a couple of details that she clarified - made my breakfast even more delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx7eGf9QE&fid=0x0:0x71e66b70a25a2589"],"When":"2023-5-23"},{"Name":"Gregory Armstrong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbP-IEWF_U4FFW0NAwRpi6AAiLZ4I9B03cjOT99edlfVE_7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Walked in and was met by a cutie pie with a wonderful smile. Got better from there. French toast and  breakfast burrito were cooked to perfection and tasted even better than they looked.
Companied with a fresh glass of OJ and homemade desserts. Outside seating was peaceful and has light music (@ just the right volume) in the bacground.Two thumbs up for the place (wish I had more thumburrito","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtJUSPhmPTyIaeI7E2k18b&fid=0x0:0x71e66b70a25a2589"],"When":"2025-6-26"},{"Name":"Veronica SanDiego","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPLYrXPLmNyEMvXAGngoYkRT0nFBkgt4lWcCzlyeYuMpuVSKmY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent food and service! The habanero salsa makes the breakfast dish sparkle alive and the turkey sandwich has a super flavorful yet delicate tasting garlic aioli (you can go back to work and not have garlicky death breath). Definitely coming back again! And as a bonus, the prices are budget friendly :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We visited Thyme for Lunch for brunch on a week day. It was pretty empty when we arrived around 10am but soon got busy at lunch time. This restaurant is in an area with many businesses around so I imagine that's a lot of their customers.

It's a cute restaurant with an open kitchen. The cashiers were nice and checked on us often.

I ordered the Verde chilaquiles and it was ok. The tortilla chips were thick, nice and crunchy. They weren't soggy and smothered in salsa. But it was pretty plain. I put on more salsa and that helped. It came with (dry) refried beans and rice.
My friends ordered their 2 eggs plate and it was humongous. They didn't finish theirs. Another friend ordered their acai bowl and she liked hers. The green machine smoothie was good too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnrsyaKA&fid=0x0:0x71e66b70a25a2589"],"When":"2024-9-26"},{"Name":"Kristina Santiago","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMTciKHeMkb0mKRxnZEQXdstb9yHPJ0KxgmMiCFeaUVwT1UgLBdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Friendly staff, fresh tasting sandwiches, good portions and good prices! I lost my sense of taste again :''( but it's slowly coming back so the review on taste is my husband's feedback. He really liked his Italian sandwich and felt satisfied after his meal, which is rare at this price point. As for my tuna melt, his response was "I liked mine better". Couldn't elaborate past that lol but I'm sure it was good because he said we could return another day","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDB_bKweQ&fid=0x0:0x71e66b70a25a2589"],"When":"2023-1-26"},{"Name":"Chris M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUx3Li2PR1P0kpKgc328AqR2nHOPjzqrhH55XqoZn9LzME90zLl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"☕️🥓🍳🥔🥑 Thyme is simply exceptional! Their hot breakfast (eggs, perfect bacon and potatoes) keeps me coming back week after week. The quality and flavors remind me of home cooking, and the prices are very reasonable.

The staff is amazing and overly accommodating. Plus, they serve Caffe Calbria espresso/coffee, accompanied by a relaxing atmosphere with nice music. There's no better way to start my day.

Top it all off with… with orange slices🍊 and a home-made salsa 💃🏻 that leaves you unable to eat food without it. 😂

Maybe Thyme for a few more locations?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxjfmV5AE&fid=0x0:0x71e66b70a25a2589"],"When":"2023-5-23"},{"Name":"Weon Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9otBnCdhLM4-75O8MEcbamovuJYPsbWlSIHgpkTBgDGsLRIYNQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Thyme for Lunch Cafe is famous for many different kinds of sandwiches.

When you order sandwiches🥪 , you can get salad 🥗 or pasta.

I enjoyed "BLTA"(bacon 🥓 , lettuce , tomato🍅 and avocado🥑)
It was tasty.

During lunch time, many people are  in and out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRkYrWEw&fid=0x0:0x71e66b70a25a2589"],"When":"2023-4-27"}]

[{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Stumbled upon this little restaurant in Miramar when I was in the area. Came in for a late lunch and the place was empty. There was a musty smell and I think it must be because the building is old. But the restaurant was clean and service was quick.
I ordered my chicken,beef, and veggie combo rice bowl to go. There was a lot of food and the price was very reasonable. Good place to grab lunch on the go.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqma07nEvglhecVjtL8uCL&fid=0x0:0xaa4341cc46dbbc8c"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Paul Gibbons","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIA_vRV7_cHhw9ZxMR1GwWW4SNTo52NQ0HPyPGjWw6SwyXSmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible! Started with the beef bowl, then tried chicken, then spicy BBQ pork. All absolutely slammin! Even the rice is above average! In an out in 5 minutes! Eat here 2-3 times a week now.You know those chicken places that had the lines of people waiting for them, well this is the first place I’ve been to that would justify something like that.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCopojMWw&fid=0x0:0xaa4341cc46dbbc8c"],"When":"2025-4-16"},{"Name":"Sam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXrRCC4MT-gxGQYR5tAVxjE4p8PNoj1KdOSWedo5x6llbYwerS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I keep seeing reviews about great value but Im having a hard time understanding why?  The portions are mediocre and the bowl cost $10.  However it does taste pretty good, but portions need some work.  This place could always add more rice, veggies, or even peppers to the bowls.  But they would have to purchase larger bowls because these are fairly small.

Also I was still hungry, so I added an egg 🍳","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICWg4SXKg&fid=0x0:0xaa4341cc46dbbc8c"],"When":"2022-3-5"},{"Name":"Daygo Eats","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4jtYsSLgiMs-RHR0m_Q2qe5P2yhAWSpCuzApxylGpJCe17-dooQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a cute hidden gem for some tasty teriyaki chicken and other assortments alike. The restaurant itself is relatively spacious, and it doesn’t seem too packed out although take what I say with a grain of salt since it’s Tuesday at 2 PM. But regarding the food, the chicken is cooked well and the sauce is flavorful; I mean it’s teriyaki chicken so I’d hope that the sauce would pull the meal together. The rice isn’t anything too special, and the meal tastes yummy but almost homemade like mamá whipped up some chicken thighs into “her version of teriyaki”. I asked if the chicken came with skin, and was pleasantly surprised to know the chicken already comes skinless+boneless which is always a blessing if your ordering teriyaki chicken specifically. I got myself the bowl value meal which came with my chicken and rice bowl, as well as a value soda aka just a can from the fridge. They had the cokes (reg, diet, zero) and other more notable sodas like reg. and diet root beer and sprite, y’all get the idea. It’s a really cute spot because you can tell it’s local and not a chain type place. The service is also really good, the girl was so sweet and it almost seems like she likes to work there which is soo refreshing since I feel like oftentimes the best places will be having the worst service. They also served me my food in like 30 seconds which I have to say definitely had me impressed. I got here at like 1:50 and I was out by 2:06 and half that time was me taking pictures and editing the menu to put their “updated” prices. Basically beef bowls cost a little more but roughly y’all finna pay like maybe 12ish bucks which is really nice for a proper meal made with love. Can I say this is my favorite teriyaki place…. No but it’s really good and I say it warrants a try from everyone at least once. It’s fire for being in Mira Mesa, but I come from Chula Vista and La Cochinita will ALWAYS be the teriyaki chicken winnerr. They didn’t make it to the United States from Ensenada Mexico with mediocre food, so if y’all vibe with this, it’s my duty to send u folks over so u can see what I’m talking about. But for being so far away from home, this food was gas and I’m glad I stopped by to give them a chance. I still gotta bring my friend to try it out so i’ll fsfs be back, but overall DAYGOEATS APPROVED✅✅ so to whoever owns this buisness keep doing what ur doing cause u do it flawlessly. They really impressed me today, on my soul😛😛","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX1e3_ogE&fid=0x0:0xaa4341cc46dbbc8c"],"When":"2024-10-29"},{"Name":"K2S Herdez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYseYHepup20uGOt1ZF8n_2E1Nyi3YW7Ys7xU0u9esNr_JmTLc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Bowl To Go is a hidden gem! The portions are generous, and the pricing is very reasonable for how much food you get. The taste is absolutely amazing — every bite is fresh and flavorful. One of the best parts is how fast they are: when I place an order over the phone, it’s ready in about 5 minutes! The staff is always friendly and welcoming. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for great food, great service, and great value. Will definitely keep coming back! Been going here for a year now!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiiHWvjw64CLYCpryayWioyz1-F1zk0J5dpov9Th7H7JNP4yHc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Came here during the day to try out their teriyaki chicken. It turns out to be a bit underwhelming. The chicken was good, but the teriyaki sauce is lacking. Just an underwhelming meal from the reviews I read about this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZ4KSCIw&fid=0x0:0xaa4341cc46dbbc8c"],"When":"2023-9-2"},{"Name":"Russell Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULPo18mPAHrOLoO5YNdFBm_JseDJYg-mWd9vX7jLjz9-bUPtiCeA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My favorite work lunch spot, always fast and always fresh. I usually get the bowl with either(chicken, beef, or pork(spicy)), rice, and veggies. [{"Name":"John Allie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVm6KbjxEf9OP0GPKMeMqGIDlcDJXilWAjiQxY5hzB-tMCs7ma5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Duck Foot Brewing is criminally underrated and an absolute must-stop if you’re on a craft beer vacation. The vibes are immaculate—live music on a Tuesday night, big TVs for catching the Padres game, and an all-around laid-back, welcoming atmosphere.

The bartenders are super friendly and attentive, which makes the experience even better.

Beer-wise, the Clear IPA and 2am Taco Mexican Lager really stood out. The lager is crisp, refreshing, and would pair perfectly with some Al Pastor tacos.

Can’t recommend this place enough—definitely worth a visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCq2Y4gP6-STTMCpHvB3QXF&fid=0x0:0x5548e463de29c45"],"When":"2025-9-10"},{"Name":"Hans Foto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKrWUglxmq8PM7F2Zh-1NdTZRH9yn3lvLesG2RLYwZ6TX3izc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super enjoyable brewery to hang out at. They have a large variety of beer styles, tons of indoor seating, outdoor seating, and a cool arcade hidden in the next room over. All of the beer was well made, but the Belgian Tripel was awesome!

The staff was great in helping to pick out beer to order. There is a ton of free parking in the attached parking lot. This brewery can accommodate pretty large groups of people with all the available seating.

They also have lots of merchandise for sale!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQvPa0ygE&fid=0x0:0x5548e463de29c45"],"When":"2025-3-3"},{"Name":"Brent gaffey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFZzSEdCTzDliiyndvlq5Kmgnt0TSjNTyU3ronlYHXopEo9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fun little brewery with good character (and a beer slushy)!  The bartender was very friendly and we had some good convo. It is a quaint setup with some bar tables,  a few shared tables, some picnic tables outside and a small room with some arcade games and a piano. They also have a decent selection of board games etc. They also host a decent amount of events (comedy, live bands, etc), and host food trucks. Worth a visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDrrdCeZg&fid=0x0:0x5548e463de29c45"],"When":"2024-7-19"},{"Name":"Sophia Volk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIlTDh5yaFQ-nkXbGzbosxLPOfi5RkffYxBIpMMXxM2fxc9rR3Iw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lots of variety and options on this menu. They brew fun beers instead of the seemingly more common, easy-drinking IPAs. I’m looking for something that tastes like I’m chewing pine needles, and Duck Foot has that (among other, less intense beers too!).

Dog-friendly patio and usually has a food truck. We went home a 4-pack to go!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyLEM47__v6CttttkymtQY&fid=0x0:0x5548e463de29c45"],"When":"2025-7-31"},{"Name":"Robin K.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbar7_dRkn9_TjdzzlORCskGTL9GJ9eklDiXoRwevlhmKmkx3u=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Update 4.5.25
Everyone and everything still very good. We enjoy coming there. Thanks.
Update 1.17.25
Still great
Excellent gluten reduced beer. Nice atmosphere. Staff great. Enjoyable. Must go.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_jfCkcA&fid=0x0:0x5548e463de29c45"],"When":"2025-1-18"},{"Name":"Karen Mendez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJblZ8SEY3ffMUJhhsNe8A8ozB1EMnjNsCnSRGEyA34HcQuMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We decided to check out Duck Foot Brewery for the first time as part of our quest to explore local breweries in the area. The place has a cozy vibe, although it's a bit on the smaller side. However, they've made the most of the space with tables both inside and outside, which was nice.

We tried a couple of their beers - the Belgian Blonde and the Sour Love - and found them quite enjoyable. However, we were a tad disappointed with the service. When we asked if we could sample two beers (one each), the lady taking our order seemed a bit flustered, almost as if she wanted us to decide quickly. It put a bit of a damper on the experience, but we went ahead and ordered our drinks and found a spot to sit.

Despite the service hiccup, we decided to grab some tacos from Josue, who was set up outside. Despite the long line, he was hustling and got our tacos ready surprisingly quickly. And let me tell you, they were delicious! Overall, while our experience at Duck Foot Brewery had its ups and downs, we still enjoyed ourselves and would consider giving it another shot in the future.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICTxobo2QE&fid=0x0:0x5548e463de29c45"],"When":"2024-5-14"},{"Name":"Purrowler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDA43kp1jHCZqarCxDbfRaj2a3gZDbR6MiDUyvy3-Suz0TOCE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Singularly the best brewery in San Diego
Been going there for 10+ years

The owners are are family to me & my husband, have been awesome friends for a decade.

The beertenders are fun, educated about the beers & are all family to me

The beer is some of the best i’ve had in my life, my desert-island beer lives on the board, Drink this or the Bees Die

Being gluten-free makes the beer healthier for me, less pain in my joints, no bloating, & tastes amazing.

Overall 100/10 for me, now & forever","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Catherine Hunt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYH-I4RvrfRUXl77LorTgEYOQ9Iu5u4MQ2EyTsBvUTqYmBsYb3iA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our first time visiting this brewery.  It wasn’t busy Saturday afternoon and there is indoor & outdoor dining.  They had a variety of beer and special slush drinks.  We enjoyed our drinks and the Puerto Rican food from the food truck.  The server was nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICX-Jn2wAE&fid=0x0:0x5548e463de29c45"],"When":"2024-10-13"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Phyllis Rostykus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMKubRpAHIQHcRvxQ1_vqNCcQHIPe5eJtkRzokD2nsqXBSAJTwbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is streamlined to be fast. Much of the original menu is ceviche, raw seafood in various forms, the aguachilies are big bowls of raw seafood with onions, cucumbers, and spicy tart sauce to chemically cook the raw seafood.

Most of the original tacos have cooked seafood: octopus, Marlin, bacon wrapped shrimp were the ones we got. The tacos are enormous and super tasty, but if you are sensitive to spice, ask for the sauces to be served on the side. My sister is very sensitive, and she was grateful she got it on the side, so she was really able to enjoy her food.

We want to go back sometime to try out the birria. There is a drive thru! And they were doing a booming business through the evening so you know everything is fresh.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8rxrS3zzRiqvt4U2V1CX6&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Dawn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCWLTBFiXcJVuoU_JZpUWFTzylTcpSDmvcthmw9mJ0WW3ZmHCm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Holy Smokes, I love their Chips & Salsa.  It's the best I've had in a long time!  And I love the Carne Asada Taco.  It's my favorite thing so far.  The Fish Taco was really fresh and so good too.

Their Caesar Salad has Cilantro Caesar dressing!  I love the unique taste, and I like getting the Revolcados to put on top.

The Revolcados (spicy fried shrimp) were delicious but pretty spicy.  If you like spice, you might love them.  If not, I wouldn't try to be a hero, unless you like crying in public.  😁

Their food seems less processed, or more natural, so some people might miss that salty taste.  But, I think a lot of people will appreciate the difference.  Their food might not be the best you've ever had, but I really enjoyed it many times.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-xF4ryVYI3sVy7Vn3sEsc&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-6-26"},{"Name":"Hassina Noury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqmlIUoIYsi5mR25iX6TIuDrHrL0ceTBPAL1fHvevQMtIblUW_lw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a gem! Best micheladas I’ve had in a while…loved the fish taco, tecu taco, and birria quesotaco. Been twice this week so far…honorable mention to the esquites, not to be missed. Great patio, so nice on a sunny day!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvy6p7o8rCz3vbYZX85F11&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"땡이샤랑","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX57Ta4oVdpf9nw492xSi2E6FiWrl1NzpNuYGrWRk7AfwWs5-AA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Im surprised at this place cause it only has 4.7 stars and 111 reviews as of the time im writing this. I ordered a bowl of ceviche pescado the portions are huge. The fish was fresh the salsa was fresh. I would drive from IE to just get food here. I would be back to try the rest of the menu","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_qYf7DcEZU-1ZOVSuIZ7R&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"michael chen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjrgv2hBMGvoi0lW7hJSzfwM_yYsny3eHW-cuvB7DE4G8AOrgj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Are you kidding me?  Shrimp ceviche so refreshing and avocado balances it out.  Grilled fish on cheesy tortilla was smooth and yummy.  Octopus taco, octopus was tender, but was a bit too spicy… suggest to tone down the spice and let customers add spicy salsa if needed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Teck Boon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhhjSvd8WvJhcPJ0N_s5uXl9BwSoDYFYdYkSjIFzqcBjIwg3BhqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The octopus taco is really good and definitely something to order. Had the fried fish taco too and that’s pretty tasty too. Portions are quite large and 2 tacos were enough for 1 adult. Enough parking available around the building and good amount of seating space both inside and outside the restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo08vsHw&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-4-28"},{"Name":"Dave R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTdG3cZ1dUSUMFaQCnYCgtDhBnO4BZiS1ejxDN0zD7JkKEghw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Decided to try this place during a week night and wasn’t disappointed at all. Despite noting as a Seafood place, they do other items as well which is great.  Ordered the birria, carne asada and fish tacos that were all really enjoyable. The tacos themselves are on the larger size, so one or two tacos is probably a better order size in the future unless you want to take some home for later.  Will definitely be back to try more items from their menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCg4daDNA&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-2-18"},{"Name":"Don Stephenson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZbMyVSNuzZ5OoO7dE_DzPXtcbsQiqMLbxNgrU1cTwFGUFv8CE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was delicious. We had the chili rellenos and seafood fajitas. Quick service and the people were friendly and efficient. Not a lot of room to eat inside but the outdoor dining is great.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Chiyo P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzVuYyqifHedU7r7Ldwu3nNG8hubFoLfeEgmYoXukh1JmzJtgJOw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a hidden gem. I was out walking my dog while my kid was at practice and came upon Embolden/New Motion. Staff was very helpful with my drink selection and even got my dog a water bowl and offered treats. I love the spaciousness and relaxed atmosphere. Very nice vibe, will be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniel Alexander","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3rFty3ouoZKzRc9EBuCnzsW4MPRhZYhKRgSwk9fPgr8unsw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"New Motion Beverage is a total gem. From the moment you walk in, the vibe is welcoming, modern, and relaxed—perfect for hanging out with friends or just enjoying a drink solo. Their craft beverages are seriously next-level. Everything I tried was crisp, refreshing, and bursting with flavor—clearly made with care and creativity.

The staff? Absolute rockstars. Friendly, knowledgeable, and genuinely passionate about what they’re serving. They’ll walk you through the menu, make spot-on recommendations, and treat you like a regular even on your first visit.

What really sets this place apart is the attention to detail—not just in the drinks but in the whole experience. The space is clean, stylish, and has a great energy that makes you want to stay awhile.

Whether you’re a local or just passing through Mira Mar, do yourself a favor and check out New Motion Beverage. It’s refreshing (literally and figuratively) to find a place this good. I’ll definitely be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hitomi Sarah Naito","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeCq-aEnq_1VXMvRye18JqmT1XOQJMstzMKLG8mbdTaL0CuZNPow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an awesome place! Super spacious nice decor place with food, boba, bakery venders together. Welcoming everyone including non drinkers, kids, doggies! Ao happy to find this place. Innitinally googled boba place and reached here! the bizbaz boba was so cute! Will come back with more friends","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhl5PMEA&fid=0x0:0x9b5b21b7d205df51"],"When":"2023-3-19"},{"Name":"Rachel Hall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUA4kQ1fgXDDBAJla4KUHJ0xV0GipnT40tqFLdQbgBuv0q28EFB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great selection of hard tea seltzers - I am not a big beer fan so it is nice to have an option beyond ciders at a brewery. The hard seltzers have a perfect hint of flavor, really easy to drink. If you like coconut the Coconut Cove flavor is amazing. They have some really fun seasonal and limited flavors too, I had a limited Strawberry Jalapeno hard seltzer and it was fantastic! They have a nice outdoor patio and seating indoors too - the only reason I give 4 stars instead of 5 is it gets really warm inside during the hot days - could use more fans or airflow, but other than that a really fun place to visit and have a drink.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Colleen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJsQxShni6VSNgh2XCjtnpCu25mtacG8CXTvrLNGZt3qmTcGzg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is my favorite spot in San Diego! The atmosphere is amazing, the staff go above and beyond, and the owners are always around working hard to make sure everyone is enjoying their experience and drinks. They have some of the best and most unique drinks in town. Plus, they support other local businesses and their community with events and collaboration. If you're looking for a great place to get drinks and relax this is the place to be!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brian Meredith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuFsZYJWkQqi5qwMoxLLm4qY9LjwHpUtGNNZrOu2AgfXrJ-pgk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Seriously unreal to be drinking hard tea in this beautiful garden. I love what they’ve done to the space. Drinks are phenomenal along with wonderful staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKyejAfw&fid=0x0:0x9b5b21b7d205df51"],"When":"2021-4-9"},{"Name":"Cameron California","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIS_ndVozCip0EBkbTCePieuKyHHEz2Wz_bbujqnrAV1kn1Kg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing selection of hard cider, hard sparkling tea, and hard kombucha. They also serve awesome beers with their partner beer label (Embolden Beer Co.) Plenty of outdoor seating and a food truck in the parking lot to satisfy all of your cravings. This is a great new spot to grab a drink (or several!). I can't wait to go back for more!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLc7gNHcMAZ1wEwKrDSPNNaOENbi9gGV5F1BBBd5ueAs_SYqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The GF loves this place

I'd say it's kind of an improvement from the last brewery that was here (32nd North) but not much, just me personally.

They've added outdoor seating and a consistent food truck which is definitely a bonus from my side.

They also basically have 2 breweries in 1. With beer and a sparkling beverage section, which the GF likes.

The beer profiles are all kind of middle of the road for me, fairly safe, nothing overly exciting.

Again the GF loves there sparkling selections, so we'll keep coming back for her.

Once and a while they'll add in a frozen beverage which is always nice on the hot day's","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Christopher Gorrie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvB6Mm4QddVkwZiLVQiMCdaMm8YOBQt0ZNeUWTxTrGs8Pqv0JWdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My godson and I tried Baba Kabob yesterday while we were taking a break from playing Magic at At Ease Games near Harbor Freight. Baba Kabob is no-frills, but friendly, down-to-earth, and pretty tasty.

I ordered a chicken shawarma sandwich and my godson ordered the Baba kabob, which is essentially the same but with gyro meat included. Both sandwiches also came with shredded lettuce, tomatoes, and tzatziki.

My favorite thing about these sandwiches was how non-greasy they were. Sometimes halal street food can get greasy or overly oily, but these sandwiches weren’t like that. Also, the meat tasted pretty high quality. The large bottle of sriracha at the table was a nice plus, too.

Overall, pretty tasty, fresh halal street food. Prices are slightly steep, but the quality, atmosphere, and customer service offset that enough.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyEUfKOmGyN6BjLivl2Vks&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Robert Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuzDyF9fokr0dRRSMd3zjVHZa3v__hMYmvmnHtwI13ecDD7Mfd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Baba the owner is real nice. He comes around to make sure you have everything you need for your meal. The food is very authentic. I had a gyro and it was bomb. The dumplings were amazing as was the potato bread they had. Don't ask me the name of the bread, but ask for it. Don't forget to buy yourself some of the red chili sauce the owner's wife makes. It a vinegar and all natural chillies. It's really good.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"C N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVl74yBR8tYLceldYyN3046-KYbxj_sGQlIU9jREXexppK3gj7xzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was amazing here. Tried a few Afghan Restaurants in the area and this was by far the best.  If your looking for Afghan Food in the area, would definitely recommend checking this place out as it did not disappoint.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmtmbuiVa0MaLnenX4uK6o&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"bashar mraish","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnKPlOuHEXI0_ofbBqwmyb2UFkN-CvcrxZPncxe5BTlF5PPCocEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Baba Kabob in San Diego is an absolute gem for anyone craving delicious and authentic Afghani food. The flavors are rich, the portions generous, and the prices are very reasonable. You can really tell they put care and tradition into every dish.

One item you must try is the Potato Bolani – crispy on the outside, perfectly spiced on the inside, and served with tasty chutney. It’s easily one of the best I’ve had anywhere.

The kebabs are juicy and tender, the rice is fragrant and fluffy, and the sides are always fresh. Whether you’re dining in or taking out, the experience is consistently great.

Plenty of available parking makes it even more convenient, and the staff are warm and welcoming.

Highly recommend for a satisfying and authentic Afghani meal. Definitely going back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsKGjUKbJQKLaSBqLUicjT&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2025-6-18"},{"Name":"Fereshta Ramsey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVI8kNXzoz3G6nfwR_9p_Wu7sKAP51lDWl4vTK2pIvWZ6ErqTXS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious Afghan food from a family business.  Everything was mouthwatering and authentic.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSjg6WgjljvZcMTuLQItg3&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Benjamin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz-uKEQRM4pqoqk-XiPvT4Yx3I_qkbOK61PIio4Hjsu2Jo84c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came for the bolani and was not disappointed. The bolani was amazing, highly addictive and was a huge portion, enough for many to share as an appetizer. I never had bolani before, but I am definitely a fan. I also added the beef kabob to my order for some protein and was blown away by how tender and flavorful it was. Truly the best beef kabob I’ve ever had, cooked to perfection. I want to come back and try the other items on the menu!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo-cWsFQ&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2025-4-26"},{"Name":"Eleana May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhjOoRX1Pnkvkd36XxHwm00C6uxdH3-4SZGNwACokZRu0_9J3pFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It had been so long since I’d eaten Persian food, so my friend and I decided to try it out. 🥩We ordered a falafel sandwich with fries for my friend (the fries is a bomb), while I had the combo beef and chicken kabob with a yogurt drink. The yogurt drink was an interesting experience, and I’d love for my friends to try it next time. The food was delicious, with generous portions that were perfect for leftovers. The place was nice, the people were friendly, and we had a great dinner overall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3r9zwrQE&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2024-11-20"},{"Name":"Al-Aqrabi F.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMbFdSORw3LJUJ-_h3Ceg5YqPpTmym5PX56XmI4O0UKqX8EekB3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The absolute Best Afghan food in San Diego....without a doubt.
A must visit if you're in town. Family-owned and operated and it shows with all the quality and love. All the meat is Halal.
Every item is a delicious Afghan masterpiece, carefully prepared to preserve the culture and authentic taste. The place is always clean and neat and the staff is always friendly and welcoming. If you look closely in the kitchen, you'll see mom and pops in action.
We Love this place, my family and I always come here for a culinary experience which has not yet to disappoint...after 6 years.
I would list my "favorite" dishes, but I can honestly say, All of them without exaggeration. So go there and try something new in every visit.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Tim Hinger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEGdwZbVS2lTMVuB1U3D-hIfjKqzmIKWGPUAbioU8JeIYF-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love the beer here!!! Never had one I didn't like.

Got the Flanders red with cherry and raspberry aged in oak.

This is one of my favorite breweries","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA2ghmb97BYsrWi7uWNSmD5&fid=0x0:0xc271d8b49b4a72cc"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Marissa Feliciano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOrEKHOEd8ihg9GJHk1h2eOO4mctDHgmpOLt4MvMo3C4KfkEmL0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pure Project always comes through with perfect execution. Most impressive from our visit today was the Flanders ale called Three Turns of the Sun, insane Flanders that is possibly surpassing Duchesse! Sad that it was a happenstance brew that will never be recreated again.

Absolutely loved the peach guava smoothie beer, so smooth and delicious! Velvet Zephyr is an insanely crushable BBA imperial stout, no joke at 13.6%, but too easy to drink! Love coming back here to try all their new recipes. Service is also always on point.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhJGEwrOn5tRH4xK6n1QG4&fid=0x0:0xc271d8b49b4a72cc"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Raen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMtm-mJ_xewqf8e34jv5rCmTVqkhsyRF5Fzr6I_xc98wUdICZu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"the place is adorable, green and inviting. each beer on the menu was unique and interesting as each had an entirely different flavor profile & as we quickly discovered, had a unique flavor profile, too! the beers were truly delicious (the menu description was not an exaggeration). the bartender, Devon, was really kind and welcoming, knew exactly what to recommend, and made the experience even more enjoyable. I'd recommend the guava & the bourbon beer. the empanadas (beef & corn) were delicious as well","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tony Stark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaOH1BDlu81lrHgOOkka4fGoqW4s74E60Fs_jGADKeSakQ7OTeAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best place to unwind and enjoy some great beers and seltzers!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDu7yzyKJngOKO7evGrdEDc&fid=0x0:0xc271d8b49b4a72cc"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Brent gaffey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFZzSEdCTzDliiyndvlq5Kmgnt0TSjNTyU3ronlYHXopEo9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This brewery is very unique and fun to visit. An ode to Costa Rica's, "Pura Vida," has been transformed to," Pura Birra."  This is more of an ecological aware brewery, putting emphasis on giving back. The location itself isn't big, but it's goal is, so don't discount it. Very friendly staff and regulars definitely make this brewery a desirable place to visit. It is easy to prove when you walk up and every table is taken and there is a line up to the bar! Worth a visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDrrcS84wE&fid=0x0:0xc271d8b49b4a72cc"],"When":"2024-7-19"},{"Name":"Robert Benton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEohypNWVVWNyf7LNy_SeNuWBNKRCVdI7nOUxsHPrgMdumfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Some of the best beers in the country let alone San Diego. Came here on vacation and stopped in to enjoy a couple beers. Incredible flavor profiles and service was top notch. Cool vibe inside and easy to spend some time while in San Diego especially if brewery hopping like we were. Cheers!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3xbaXPQ&fid=0x0:0xc271d8b49b4a72cc"],"When":"2024-11-16"},{"Name":"Vincente S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUO7MN0yj6ufZLYUvHlOopBgDvcWpbljx5hpCOYWA9w2fWq2not=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Exceptional beers with a wide variety of styles. Their west coast IPA and saison are my favorite. The staffs are very friendly. Stepped in 30 mins before the closing time but still got great service. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDFu4Py7QE&fid=0x0:0xc271d8b49b4a72cc"],"When":"2023-11-10"},{"Name":"Josh O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqbxLJtUfD3u1qVWWUkAj1oazdkY-UcRVxuAy7eWYwyn0IU-nk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great brewery putting our delicious beers! One of the best stops on our trip to San Diego. A variety of beer styles on tap that showcase what a great brewery they are.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRn-mfDQ&fid=0x0:0xc271d8b49b4a72cc"],"When":"2023-4-14"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sarah CJ Pugh Fairchild","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWU6LGzV0PZqY8R2aOCqB6bF790uyLvB6Z7GhLTTrzfqs5-nFPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The service was exceptional. The cashier was so helpful. He gave us so many options to meet our needs. He said he would split pieces, combine pieces, custom make a pizza slice.
Unfortunately, the pieces are just left out all day and just reheated. So the freshness just wasn’t there.
When the waiter brought out the food, he brought out my daughter’s separately and was really nice about getting what she needed.  He brought out the rest of the pizza slices and brought Parmesan, red pepper flakes, and Italian seasoning. I had southwest chicken ranch and pesto chicken. The flavor was yummy, but they would have been much better fresh.
My daughter is a meat lovers super fan. She only ate half of her slice this time. She said that was the worst meat lovers she ever had.
My son is a pepperoni fan. Just give him pepperoni on a pizza and he’s satisfied. He was not satisfied with this pepperoni. He didn’t finish his either.
My son was wearing a sea hawks sweater. One of the workers switched the game to the big screen. We think one of workers changed it for my son.
This shows that the customer service was great.
While we were eating, I saw 2 separate large orders carried out and place in customer cars. One customer had 10 plus pizzas that were loaded strategically in a messy/full back of the car.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAyi4i14SZnQrgXZ0mIUv0H&fid=0x0:0x7c713c9a86505956"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Jose Vazques","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIB02GV-iPWO3BlcTdZhBzDaoi64pqsE0D6hrYPObDpFgcPjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been coming here for lunch for a few years now. Great place. Staff is always super friendly. The slices are great amazing crust. The pizza quality here is consistent. Definitely recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5hxN8nWHPuhnA3CJsRPmj&fid=0x0:0x7c713c9a86505956"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Carl Blanchard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjRGdMu5PGExVXrIAbxyLS_59y9o28SOUtrCFo_jZu8XmNXw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"3 slices and a soda for 15$. Can’t beat it! They got like 10 beers on tap too, and plenty of TVs for sports. Pizza is amazing, I recommend the flying Hawaiian (and I usually hate Hawaiian pizza lol). Been coming here for years and it’s consistent great quality and service every single time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAEFhiOn7wbfGAygT3bkD1-&fid=0x0:0x7c713c9a86505956"],"When":"2025-6-30"},{"Name":"Khalid Omar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUsbe3jb84oV6vmNjPoJhyhgCp5XxJH3JrFAHjvloOrBtEDhiZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A restaurant offering variety of pizza, sandwiches, wings, salad, fries, garlic knots, etc.Halal food and veg pizza also available.
Staff is professional , honest and helpful.prices are reasonable. Service is also good.Take away with advance order is also accepted.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUVdrvL1vP1Eio8L9PZdjg&fid=0x0:0x7c713c9a86505956"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Kirk Degler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyEXgHbnOI0QjKjd7eH8b4hD9GCqvalKY2iWPvdp5pJTCeRyI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had the pizza brought to another establishment close by during a game night. We ordered the pesto shrimp pie. Not something I've had in the past... but it was great! Some of my favorite pizza out this way so far. 8.5/10","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cero Grubs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkAvY7sqZPNVkciX6sLYJEkqM9SaTUhWaodW_0TzNpIQfLfylKjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This spot! Wow! We came here after swimming so we were starving. We ordered several items bc we wanted to try a little bit of everything since it was our first time here. I got a half pepperoni pizza & tri tip steak pizza, and it's even halal! I had each slice. Both slices were amazing! My friend got the half chicken ranch and buffalo chicken. He loved it ! I had a slice of both and my favorite was the chicken ranch. We shared the pizza fries which we never seen or heard of and it was good. We also shared garlic knots which were yummy especially when you dip in marinara sauce. If you are in the mood for a sandwich try their Cardiff crack cheesesteak. Amazing!! Can't wait to come back!!' They also serve beer and pizza by the slice! Staff was friendly and there is inside and outside dinning as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_8MbimgE&fid=0x0:0x7c713c9a86505956"],"When":"2025-1-21"},{"Name":"Matt Cavarlez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7Fwb-jCEBnOMv7VFU_-6TLySaAv6UAZCRQz8s6cIQwcnw6dykzw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"No need to suffer if you're lactose intolerant.  They can make any pizza with vegan mozzarella!  And if you order a large, you can do half and half orders if you're undecided!

Be sure to get the garlic knots.  Best ones I've ever had (and I've tried from many places) because it's a matter of how much garlic knot do you want in your garlic butter.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCg2bmMLw&fid=0x0:0x7c713c9a86505956"],"When":"2025-2-18"},{"Name":"Lynn Matlock","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5okVSH7KHTSqRgSXzSXPgnTO8nywH3Psh4bX-RmMOLJR8ZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Pizza and jalapeño poppers are amazing. Got a Hawaiian last night, one of the best but unfortunately bit into a long blond hair .. shudder.
Couldn’t finish it :( otherwise really good I guess Please be careful workers that kinda stuff ruins it all.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Landon Scott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOQrFPsovk6RoVxE9TAYkId--iFR8kaW79Uy0_WCHm5-qyYaOz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Update: 11/06/2025 The Reuben sandwich was extremely good, the pastrami was hearty juicy and not just a bunch of fat. I will definitely order it again. My son crushed his Smash Burger and fries

This place has great sandwiches, and a great selection of drinks. I've had several of their sandwiches and they are amazing. Great people. They are very appreciative of your business. This is now a weekly staple.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSP5o8KcMCexAUjHq5Gvpq&fid=0x0:0xb82ab70f558adf43"],"When":"2025-8-4"},{"Name":"Chaz H (Chill Chaz)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXo5ZMGYwAQMGFAQVGQHjPgIC350Ey-J-5Rl81Sg-XZHmeUQEEG7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So have to say, my experience here was quite nice. I got a monstrous with some chips and soda and it was a little up there (mainly because I had to try the craft soda)

But overall, I'm impressed. The sando was great! I got a french roll and it was toasted to perfection. Their aioli was also in-house from what I was told.

Keep up the good work and i'll definitely come back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathleen Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVr8xIn_QlVk85fPLHR74xYbeQnu9kyIzctbajWbYzrOqLTL9gM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My son loved their pastrami sandwich on rye. Great place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID1x56EkAE&fid=0x0:0xb82ab70f558adf43"],"When":"2024-1-10"},{"Name":"Brent Van Dussen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBiIoennixx4i3SPocpO6z8xgLXfteG3pFAqHDM-pvzGt8lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"wide variety of deli sandos, bagels, chips, snacks, drinks, beers, sodas.. grinder pictured here. delish! had an avo turkey ham provolone on toasted french roll that hit the spot sooo good last time...would add peproncinis next time! super nice staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDesreGag&fid=0x0:0xb82ab70f558adf43"],"When":"2022-10-6"},{"Name":"JLuv","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1GEAubNuRyRW0KvMCwoL8IyO0d0gh-YatpQPwTUCZh_1ywIkg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great sandwich shop, quick, fresh, friendly, grab a bag of chips and a drink if you so desire.  Each sandwich comes with a pickle.  Yumm!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA9JTCfA&fid=0x0:0xb82ab70f558adf43"],"When":"2025-1-29"},{"Name":"Andrew Michel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZ13i7fNtnbO6glwCDFo5bTm1leT0tn3OxfguBQj7C-A-A3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great Sandwich!!! I got the Sinatra, very well put together, was not messy nor lacking in any way. I will come back. It’s a must try when in the area. Thank you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cory Brin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1HQ0LSCVvWEtbkcF4Q39ADg39SKGOjdyKZFTu2sgzsfOgnmsG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hidden little gem of a sandwich shop and convenience mart right on Dowdy Drive. Pretty decent selection of sandwich types - cold and hot - with a variety of proteins, sauces, bread options, and toppings. It's run by a family too, and you can tell they take care to make sure that you are treated with care and served a quality sandwich.

The shop itself also has a pretty unique selection of chips, drinks, sides, candy, etc. I recently found "All Dressed Up" chips, which I thought were only available in Canada. I occasionally work nearby, and every time I do, I'm excited to stop by for a sandwich.

The only thing to note is that the hours aren't your typical 9-5 every day, so if you're planning on making this your lunch stop, double check before you head out. Not a bad thing, but it helps to know if you're super hungry.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hooman Ahrari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNVFum3eL50Dcd5343x9J5P8nHcElchmxS85SqWlhMIdbziDna=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Deli Mart is a great spot for a delicious club sandwich on sourdough. The bread is always fresh, and the ingredients taste really good. The guy working there is super friendly too. I highly recommend i","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jose Vazques","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIB02GV-iPWO3BlcTdZhBzDaoi64pqsE0D6hrYPObDpFgcPjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I come here for lunch from about ever other week. The bahmi is always consistent. The bbq pork is full of flavor. The bread is nice and crispy and the vegetables always taste fresh. I usually take my order to go but great place to dine in as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjGreL0dFRXaXxv3buKkYT&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Tabitha Carey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWMmuoPC9lFmDmAXkuKWL32Vf9h9OD8SL8Y5mMf04vNo7Gz-7BHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The server was super friendly and sweet, and the food was so good! I've had a lot of pho at a wide variety of places across the US, and this place has some of the best broth I've ever tasted! It was so flavorful and well balanced. I definitely recommend any of the Pho as well as the avacado smoothie. We will definitely be back 🫰🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_lJQVFRK8N6WDg9c8s9nM&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Albert De Alba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL6pP023Sln-KcSoh77US_uNhSCsRQnBRlbgR2PknUT9OZHgKc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Staff was quick and made it easy for me to get my order. I got a beef brisket with meat balls and a chicken bahn mi. Taste of the broth was flavorful. Well prepared and hope to go back soon! Do not miss out on getting to try their food! They didn't disappoint 🙌🏼 👏🏼 👌🏼","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfnVHabPjFfiCtpAeqivTf&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Shondra J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlP8-654JlqP9dC91EAB4gK741k6Gfq_y_rxQMR-m6C7KjaSyU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A small restaurant that is located in a strip mall near the 15 freeway. There are a variety of tables for a dine in option, and they offer take out service. It's a good place to grab lunch. The server was friendly and checked on us often. They offer a nice variety of menu options, although we only ordered the Pho.

The Chicken Pho was delightful. It was a substantially sized bowl, and they did not skimp on ingredients. The broth they use is probably one of my new favorites. I'll be sure to visit again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDfw8oZ83AV48VQYuUArFmf&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Dulce Starizny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtIvmnHScKE5c_FwLMSf_9ozV8gMD-qwmewi8-Yb_kaXgAp7_H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a delicious experience! The dishes are absolutely delicious, and everything is spotless and well-organized. The food arrives in less than five minutes, and the service is outstanding—friendly and welcoming from start to finish.

On top of that, the prices are budget-friendly, which is almost impossible to find in San Diego right now. A true hidden gem! Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw-e_oFQ&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2025-3-27"},{"Name":"Arief Ramon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR2ETchaY9IPOmjaUnhWlzngH-SIxvT_Xa7nVlHSPFydCH6jR2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A solid choice for Vietnamese staples in San Diego. The Pho broth is aromatic and clear, while the Banh Mi features crispy baguettes with savory fillings. It's a no-frills establishment that delivers consistent, tasty food at reasonable prices. Great for a quick, satisfying lunch on the go.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDevsfVsAE&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2022-10-11"},{"Name":"Anvy N.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcglYfltAIj0-hDMVgxHBp1LmSn83hkBzQT3zDdqWXf0hl9MSUUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Classic Vietnamese spot for your Pho, Banh mi and Cafe sua da fix. Generous portions of quality meat in the Pho dac biet and Banh mi dac biet. Both were delicious! The coffee is strong and this place uses the slow drip method like it's supposed to. Prices are extremely reasonable too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKQVzbOQpKoJr9dKbrmnEo&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2025-8-14"},{"Name":"Eleana May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhjOoRX1Pnkvkd36XxHwm00C6uxdH3-4SZGNwACokZRu0_9J3pFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For Sunday brunch, it’s great to know there’s a Pho place nearby. This spot is conveniently located near several car repair shops, which worked out perfectly since I dropped off my car. I was pleasantly surprised by their delicious pho and tasty banh mi. The place is clean, comfortable, and relaxing, and the service is excellent. A wonderful find!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3vYqimAE&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2024-11-18"}]
