[{"Name":"Cesar Molina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTybWnEGlrLVpD95L8I1IOUXanx2et2NMTIVoWeq1nOz5rCA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I think I just found a hidden pizza place gem. I came in to what seemed small and yet surprisingly full of options to choose from place. I had some pepperoni and jalapeño pizza and I have to say it was great. They serve it hot and they also bring it to your table (I only had o e slice). The slice of pizza I had was not greasy, and it had plenty of pepperoni and jalapeños to actually wnjoy it. Customer service was on point, not too much not too little.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzkZLx7_J_PFKIZ5C0bAsL&fid=0x0:0x6c01e576dd591f4f"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Nikko Inocencio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnPnJwFlNSfkb_1eCZ-ARykBLY2RC-qsBzlupL2HtxpMCzx_jx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best pizza places I’ve tried. It’s a little tucked away in the corner of a small plaza, but give it a chance and you wont be disappointed! The food is amazing from the appetizers to the pizza. But what I especially enjoyed was the welcoming family atmosphere once you walk in! Like tonight, Mona was so sweet and caring. This was my 3rd time here but this welcoming atmosphere  was felt even on my first time. Love this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDg5Gggn0cGqkuHLUsz0sGJ&fid=0x0:0x6c01e576dd591f4f"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Christian Knowlden-Berry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiI19y14IBrDSoaanatb8W7I8xgcdrvDMotLTbdV--vNDqPJu3xA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re looking for a place that serves mouthwatering food with a side of genuine hospitality, Paul’s Pizza Joint is it! From the moment you walk in, the warm, family-friendly atmosphere makes you feel right at home. The staff is incredibly welcoming, attentive, and quick to make sure you have everything you need. Plus, they proudly offer a military discount, which speaks volumes about their appreciation for those who serve.

The food? Absolutely amazing. The pepperoni pizza is the perfect balance of crispy crust, gooey cheese, and flavorful toppings. The calzone is golden-brown perfection, stuffed with cheesy goodness and served with rich marinara sauce and even the side salad is fresh and satisfying.

Whether you’re grabbing dinner with the family, hanging out with friends, or just craving some of the best pizza in town, Paul’s delivers every time. Great food, great people, great vibes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCGzsI8nBESu2_s2FVXjKaP&fid=0x0:0x6c01e576dd591f4f"],"When":"2025-8-8"},{"Name":"Daniel Eddy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlPm-iukk9kJB63fAXJpK35-40msNkDwGList52n3qt9SsKw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"It’s a traditional New York pizza, you pick a slice to heat it up and you’re on your way. For years, this has been one of my favorite spots.
Pizza usually has a good variety and a lot of the side, especially the gelato are amazing. But the pieces are a little smaller than they used to be.
And although there’s many times I’ve enjoyed this place,  like all good things.. It’s coming to an end.
It’s not just a higher prices or the hidden service fees. (Not marked anywhere on the menu ) Although I understand rising cost.
Are two slices of pizza and the can soda are now worth 15 bucks?

But the Service seems to bark at you& the quality is not exactly as good as it used to be. Although there are still some exceptional things available.
Now, I’ve know That even your favorite restaurants, you can have a bad experience, Once in a great while. But what happens when you just have four or five mediocre ones… well for me…. I think you just stop going.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOp4U9ojHc7DVHbilHmi2n&fid=0x0:0x6c01e576dd591f4f"],"When":"2025-8-21"},{"Name":"The Craic Pirate","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaLrAWSggkEK0kHNwsEy9l5_aswGWU2y-fM0owyUad32iIbuo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They offer fantastic pizza pies and pizza by the slice. Plenty of variety. Small dining area. Tight parking. The woman taking my order has sterling personality, greeted everyone, and created a wonderful vibe. I will definitely be returning with my whole crew 🦜🏴‍☠️ Yar!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA1oS-Yw&fid=0x0:0x6c01e576dd591f4f"],"When":"2025-2-8"},{"Name":"No name","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdxuELRBnRAZvGG7fH6cv1UD1C9sxStETlHXJj0LiP_GZRdLvR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went with my friend  after Work and man that was some of the best pizza I’ve ever had in my life. For sure some of the best here in SD. The staff was so cool and friendly.  She was telling us some
History of the restaurant. Cool little spot inside too. Must try if you love pizza.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQqLanogE&fid=0x0:0x6c01e576dd591f4f"],"When":"2025-3-8"},{"Name":"Amanda Phang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqrgNutK0XYodsNU1_e0Q0o7P3i_f-1GvsyLVuiwYBR6RaKw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got the bbq chicken, pesto, and margharita pizzas with ranch, garlic aioli, and chipotle sauces. Everything was delicious and fresh and I’m excited to try their other flavors! And the customer service was amazing. The staff is so kind and welcoming, making a wonderful dining experience. I highly recommend Pauly’s Pizza!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Brandl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXs7t3dmsJ242gDu5Bsvmh9yy0b1HqwwyP-jH18h8nndM5KVVz9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fire! In SD for a softball tournament and ordered for our room. Best NY pizza I’ve had in a long time. Great crust, great taste! TY","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Eleana May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhjOoRX1Pnkvkd36XxHwm00C6uxdH3-4SZGNwACokZRu0_9J3pFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"While waiting for my car, I spotted a Thai restaurant right in front of the shop, great! I decided to try their lunch special Pad Thai, and I loved it! The meal came with Pad Thai, a crispy egg roll, salad, an orange, and soup, totally worth it! The food was delicious, and they even asked me to rate my spice level from 1 to 10, which I found one hehe.It ended up being my brunch, and it was such a nice experience. The lady was easy to talk to, probably because it was just the two of us dining in, aside from the to-go orders. The place is spacious, indoor and outdoor, has a good restroom. Definitely worth it while waiting for my car, yay!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwrJTGpAE&fid=0x0:0xc444d79117c6e209"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"Gavin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5ipove9mf52zNKrczWAd6u0qfsHlXO3SA3vnF1KusbUVhmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got satay chicken, green curry, and yellow curry. All was great! Spice level 8 was perfect for me","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgYyiYVChLQTH3e-b6ahyl&fid=0x0:0xc444d79117c6e209"],"When":"2025-8-26"},{"Name":"Gil Corpuz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcgJXJ9BMDvSfS4mSxOfp0MD1F39EW0HAIwXAMJcm2TYeXvjmKNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here for dinner around 18:45 on a Thursday with my family.  It was not busy at all so we were seated right away.  We were provided water right away and given time to look at the menu.  I wanted to order the Crab Meat Fried Rice, but they did not have everything to make it, so I went with the Panang Curry with spice level 2.  My wife got the Panang Curry level 4 and my mom got the Chicken BBQ Fried Rice.  Everything was really delicious and flavorful.  The place had lot of decorations and looked clean all around.  The staff was quick and friendly.  We would definitely come back for more, especially the proximity to our home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1tPmiPw&fid=0x0:0xc444d79117c6e209"],"When":"2023-12-23"},{"Name":"Cesar Ruiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQtmesKtR97iPGh65-4PKELdByA4WaHEL1PIlRFdb2Q7odIFXD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My very first time here, at a glance the place does not look like a traditional Thai restaurant and doesn’t give you the homey Thai atmosphere vibe but none of that matters!!!! The food is amazing I myself ordered the pad see eww with level 6 spicy. As an appetizer I had the chicken satay, that was delicious. Overall I am delighted to say this has become a new Thai favorite on my list!! Sticky rice  is a must have and let me tell y’all it’s a 10/10!!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDbhMOkSg&fid=0x0:0xc444d79117c6e209"],"When":"2024-8-2"},{"Name":"Edward Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxHAED-DA5p3F8AjMrDX3Qavnx__uMdX6rGNJH4p_DSURn2noa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I ordered eggrolls and chicken pad Thai.

Taking off 1 star because the quality of the food did not match the pricing. Too pricey for a Thai food in my opinion. YMMV.

Taking off another 1 star because the noodle texture of Pad Thai was subpar compared to the competing restaurant nearby.

Food took about 15min, so order before you get to the store.

Egg rolls
- crunchy
- good texture overall

Chicken Pad Thai
- was not expecting this flavor from the pad Thai dish. I was expecting more “Thai” flavor.
- seemed like there were about 80% noodles, 15% veggies, and 5% chicken.
- not too flavorful.. so make sure to grab chili sauce or soy sauce to your taste

I’m disappointed that Tom Yum soup does not have “bowl” size anymore, only Hot-Pot size so it’s pricier.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDukdfAnQE&fid=0x0:0xc444d79117c6e209"],"When":"2022-8-23"},{"Name":"Govind Sah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWimH4RLF_V1VCsOJDhNQMCkZxWcn_vvKHZ_9KCnjotQjn59bBF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This place is awesome. We were the last one that night to visit this restaurant. The owner was so courteous to welcome us and served the most delicious thai food. He was very welcoming and patiently waited for us to finish our meal. Should give it a try if craving for thai food. You won't be disappointed.

Updated on 07.25.2022
Service has been downgraded. Since the admin has changed, it could be the reason. Sorry but had to remove one star😕. Hopefully they will improve their service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICWl62KCQ&fid=0x0:0xc444d79117c6e209"],"When":"2022-3-8"},{"Name":"Aravind Nagarajan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIlQXue5blh7AYYh3w5Ssv7eULfXWb3mPE91sRwsf9WKLbEMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pleasantly surprised by this wonderful Thai restaurant in a small strip mall
We ordered Fresh rolls & Pineapple fried rice.
Both were of excellent taste.
Service was also quick.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"E M J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxLruuZByhLVPdh3faES-j4lR5m_Hwwl6frup-ctgcH2nSd2l5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stumbled on to this establishment to dine in after a day st an air show in the area and I was completely and pleasantly surprised at the quality of food and service. [{"Name":"Lisa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW02uPsVe3nwshsTD8klugfo63oSX6pNMbIbLEN6QJZDxcXo4U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I went to a fun event here, put on by Biz Baz Club. It was my first time. It was fun! The venue was cool. It was a bit loud because there's nothing to absorb sound. They had a wide variety of beers, non-alcoholic options, and bottled sodas. I really like hefeweizen. They had a good one. I'd like to go back sometime.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAX9q-4qqUNpf8g-8tuC38v&fid=0x0:0x6b638fcda2060498"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"John Allie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVm6KbjxEf9OP0GPKMeMqGIDlcDJXilWAjiQxY5hzB-tMCs7ma5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alesmith is a San Diego staple and absolutely worth a stop on any brewery crawl. The Del Mar location is massive — tons of space, great setup, and you can instantly tell how electric it must get on weekends. I stopped by on a Monday night, so it was quiet, but that gave me the chance to really appreciate the space and chat with the bartenders.

Service was top-notch: knowledgeable, welcoming, and clearly passionate about the beer. I went with the Clásico and it did not disappoint — crisp, balanced, and exactly what you’d expect from a brewery that nails consistency and quality across the board.

Looking forward to coming back during peak hours to experience the full energy. If you’re into craft beer, Alesmith is a must.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB188Qo4IsygELNpQ0Mkpkr&fid=0x0:0x6b638fcda2060498"],"When":"2025-9-11"},{"Name":"Hung Thanh Mai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQT7oY4mhQzNvXY1iTtUEzZwqSUK-YAQV1EUjtrR53xvVcVA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went here with a couple friends on a weekend afternoon and ended up staying longer than planned. The place has a relaxed vibe, not too loud, not too quiet, just easy to hang out. Beer selection was solid with a mix of lighter options and some stronger stuff, so everyone found something they liked. I tried a flight and a few stood out more than others, but nothing tasted off. Staff was friendly and answered questions without rushing us. Seating was decent, though it can get a bit crowded during peak hours. Overall, a good spot to unwind and enjoy a few beers without any fuss.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yuri Castillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVx7cCrBxxRdP5QDLX_PcbiqPLr8xsD_mHUQayUOtinIcrrMwJ9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Huge space with a true hometown vibe! Tons of merchandise that perfectly blends San Diego culture with the brewery’s roots. Honestly, some of the best beer you’ll ever have. The only downside is that it’s a bit of a drive for me, but totally worth it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUT6loclWsiFylMk5CkK6p&fid=0x0:0x6b638fcda2060498"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Connor Dayton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItimkWmY2yeJdgOWbGr5McuJBgwvgw1O9kU1VGTUipOfuUTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was told to stop here while visiting San Diego from the east coast. Super friendly bar tenders, great environment and fantastic beer. If you are looking for a good brewery to stop at and experience the area, trust these guys will make your time at AleSmith enjoyable. Thanks!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCIRRk0jnhUhCvlpIFmLiW1&fid=0x0:0x6b638fcda2060498"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Michiko Lindsey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU05wu9InvCUQoU1TFWxY05mYp0yRb9F_mj9eLHh2NwUxXGR6oS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is awesome! Dogs welcome. Excellent beer. SDSU ale is my new favorite! $5 off if you join their loyalty program. Easy parking. The nicest bathroom!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw5eLMTw&fid=0x0:0x6b638fcda2060498"],"When":"2025-3-20"},{"Name":"Hans Foto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKrWUglxmq8PM7F2Zh-1NdTZRH9yn3lvLesG2RLYwZ6TX3izc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"AleSmith is wonderful!!! This is a huge brewery and a staple in the San Diego brewing scene. In so many ways, it's an unsung hero of breweries to hang out at. They almost always have a food truck to grab a bite while you enjoy a huge variety of beer. Everything is well made, no offf flavor, and very clean. If you enjoy Stouts, they also feature a bunch of Speedway Stouts to choose from.

This is one of the few breweries that can accommodate huge parties. You can also rent out sections for special events. There is line dancing some days of the week in the back room as well.

There is plenty of indoor and outdoor seating. Additionally, a large bar top where you can stand or sit and grab a quick drink. They have a huge patio area and endless parking to accommodate everyone. Throughout the brewery, there are TVs with the sports games on. On any given day, you will visit and see them supporting a charity, SDSU, or hosting an enthusiasts group of some kind. They even host a car show one is a while that awesome.

This brewery manages to maintain a small and local feel even though it is one of the most successful in San Diego. The staff is always helpful and attentive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDvrc2tNA&fid=0x0:0x6b638fcda2060498"],"When":"2024-12-23"},{"Name":"Christine Titera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlAARDWFaxNAvyitNgiqhPWJl1vuaas44DOSuHcQNCcSfayA0GcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time visiting from Texas. Great tasting beer. Was able to watch the college football playoff games on the big screen. There are heaters and a large oblong firepit outside to keep you warm. There is a pizza food truck that serves delicious thin crust pizza. Such a great experience","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICfu5esgwE&fid=0x0:0x6b638fcda2060498"],"When":"2025-1-2"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jamie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7gEezdaiA3NwZ0oE8Q4PVLcRE9kjqdqm_WI__52mXISw94Pu4yw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to try Kusina after having been craving palabok for a while. I fell in love with palabok in Seattle and haven’t been able to find good ones since.

The food came out piping hot, cooked to order and nicely presented even though we came close to their closing time. They were  cleaning here and there but friendly and attentive enough. The restaurant felt clean too.

I was pleasantly surprised to find ample of shrimps in our foods. The shrimps felt juicy and plump, and the foods were seasoned well—not too salty or bland. The noodles were chewy and I like that the pancit came with lots of veggies in it.

We’ll have to try other foods from their menu, but our first experience was very pleasant :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFJMDHigZ5v3c4WsakjasD&fid=0x0:0x5d10904a30f050f5"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"M M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaKuk58dh1WggGYJDhsVTIpPmS1fIAWenZkGSyH6lssxXHVt0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My family and I had an amazing experience. Super nice staff. We came in a bit late lunch around 230 and they typically close at 3pm and reopen for dinner, they were kind enough to still serve us! We ordered the lechon kawali kare-kare, chicken adobo, oxtail-nilaga, cinegang pork, and krispy bulaklak. They even have a sushi bar and we had a roll. Everything was cooked fresh made to order. Impressive Filipino restaurant. Great establishment and even better staff. We’re making it a tradition to eat here every time we come to SD.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCBX7NHaq02bPz0XZgd1UL4&fid=0x0:0x5d10904a30f050f5"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Jay Phung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnhNfDYB-vbpfkz6t9XYJ8-KXLDVAtbJsPMDAskSl5O9QBu_Ne1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A place for a variety of Filipino food. They have a Sunday brunch buffet and a regular menu on the other hours.

They say that their beef kare kare is their specialty if you like a peanut sauce based stew. It had a plentiful amount of veggies and beef. The lechon was a little dry for me but skin was nice and crunchy. If you get rice a small cup is enough for 1 person and if you get a large it's overfilled with rice definitely enough for two. The sisig nachos wasn't bad just know it might be a little spicy with the chopped jalapenos inside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQxuWQM5QhlLo57J7YzTtB&fid=0x0:0x5d10904a30f050f5"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"Mike R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUyuotlv7LMVxeuxCxljlmokneCW9fSOSy04ZkCTPetsO3lA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This Filipino-Asian fusion restaurant serves both classic Filipino comfort dishes and Hawaii inspired plates, along with a small sushi menu and a weekend brunch buffet.

I came for the Sunday buffet, which is $25 per person. The food was good, but could have been better. There was a decent selection of entrees to choose from, but I expected more. However, the buffet could  have been better if they had tapa and longanisa. I feel that these are a required staple to have in every Filipino buffet.

The buffet hours are from 9am-3pm. They offer an open eating space with plenty of seating for both small and large groups.

I enjoyed the kare-kare. It was packed with great flavors. The rest of the options were just okay in my opinion.  The lechon was either overcooked or reheated from the previous day. It didn’t seem fresh, and it was a bit hard to chew. I expected better if the chef has over 20 years of experience.

Overall, it was still a good experience. I would only return if they change the entrees every week. I’m not sure if they offer the same choices weekly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwdIGjOfZNcB81TaDL4tz4&fid=0x0:0x5d10904a30f050f5"],"When":"2025-7-8"},{"Name":"lyfer007","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPoydLPs8el-Q-0yts2VXBiIYdG5D2pdWrDQKhAZWXGdvsC7Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Tried this place and food wasn’t good, also expensive for a mediocre food BIG! disappointment. The kare-kare was lacking flavor, lumpia was okay and the palabok was bland and not enough sauce they give you so much noodles and a little bit of sauce and the chicken inasal was mostly skin. Ended up throwing most of the food what a  waste of money can’t and won’t recommend this place, stay away!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBpAlz8TEEjM1N9ZZ7-4tys&fid=0x0:0x5d10904a30f050f5"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Ellynne Alegre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqli5DYW40ms5fMWI2A7KkNN0mwGbRPYGKwtBC5BYdHRS-0x6LJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food was pretty solid. Ordered chicken inasal and pork adobo combo. We came here with half empty stomach so we didn't finish our food. Portions are pretty generous.  Service was great and parking is free!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClxfqk5HAz4Xv4Q12oFvwe&fid=0x0:0x5d10904a30f050f5"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Marie H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2SAJHbUjF79vSxfor2iALZzopVR5Xy4jCKRwV9MqbpHl9zb8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We went there during a week night expecting a buffet but I guess they have it only on Sundays. I wish they stated that on the Social Media ads. No one was there but tried it anyways. It was a big mistake.  The garlic rice that was served to us was old. It had an odd smell and I should have said something but we were tired and hungry. I didn’t feel well when I got home. We had lots of leftovers of Adobo & Sisig but I had to throw them away because I packaged it with the rice. The Lumpia was the best thing but the container for the vinegar is shared instead of from a bottle that is freshly poured.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5c6TxgrtHsv3wYP4AdKGK&fid=0x0:0x5d10904a30f050f5"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Elena Lagonigro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgtPllqT8b97qR-2MRd-Pi1ZshnROU--eDG83nuPPjoVgtqm0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Edit: came back for sushi and it was soooo tasty! I was also excited to know that they have gluten free imitation crab! Most places don’t. I also ordered the pork soup again and it was amazing. This place is a hidden gem.

Super tasty and chill! I have to eat gluten free and my options were sushi and the pork soup which was delicious! The pancit was tasty too, I’d definitely come back :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbEOfwvvlKCteI9ODEHYae&fid=0x0:0x5d10904a30f050f5"],"When":"2025-8-16"}]

[{"Name":"Farrukh Malik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsIQJR0HY7wpzHjB7O-9r51KFhhpzYr8XzI65u2Zo6iM-uO95_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went today to the Almafi Lama and was greatly impressed by the service. Their beef empanadas were good. The steak frites were good. The only bad thing was the chicken, which was the most bland chicken I ever had. When I asked for ranch and they didn’t have any, the manager, went to the restaurant next-door to get me some. The manager went above and beyond to provide great service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBnXjyWGYoA7bj3LFF_cShj&fid=0x0:0x8972c50561df9d1d"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Sohrob H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJKrX9_wgY9rXmyIDE1ks23TiltEkzJuT2EQgHVJtpxXvGaY6AA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🙌🏼 Exceptional Accountability and Customer Care
While many upscale restaurants in La Jolla offer great food, it is the service and management that truly define a 5-star establishment, and The Amalfi Llama proved their commitment to excellence during my most recent visit. Having gone many times, I’ve come to expect near-perfect service as the standard. Even though we encountered a significant lapse during our last trip, the way the situation was handled was nothing short of extraordinary. After a frustrating interaction at the bar, the general manager Mike took it upon himself to literally chase me down after I had already left the building just to offer a sincere apology and rectify the issue. This level of dedication to guest satisfaction is incredibly rare in the industry today and turned a potentially negative experience into one that solidified my long-term loyalty to the restaurant.

🍸 Standout Happy Hour and Atmosphere
Beyond the impressive management, this spot is a go-to for its great happy hour selection. It’s a sophisticated yet welcoming environment that works perfectly for a casual drink or a more formal evening out. The menu is diverse, and when things are running smoothly, the execution of both the food and the cocktails is top-tier. The interior design is stunning, striking a balance between modern elegance and a warm, rustic vibe that makes it one of the most visually appealing spots in the UTC area.

Diverse Happy Hour: Offers a wide array of curated cocktails and small bites that provide excellent value for the high quality provided.

Stunning Design: The restaurant boasts a beautiful, high-end aesthetic that makes it perfect for date nights or social gatherings.

Consistent Quality: Despite a one-time service hiccup, the long-term consistency of their beverage program makes it a reliable choice for locals who want a premium experience.

Proactive Leadership: The management team clearly monitors the floor closely, ensuring that any issues are addressed immediately rather than being ignored.

⚠️ A Note on Recent Service Consistency
It is worth noting that during the most recent trip, the service at the bar was notably lacking. We experienced a long wait where our drinks sat out in the open for 15 minutes before being served, and the bartender showed some attitude and actually scoffed when we requested a re-pour for the stale drinks. However, the immediate and proactive intervention by the Mike completely overshadowed this incident. It’s clear that the leadership here takes their reputation seriously and is willing to go the extra mile to ensure every guest leaves happy, regardless of a single staff member's off-night.

👍 Final Verdict: A Must-Visit for Genuine Hospitality
I am giving The Amalfi Llama a full five stars because they understand that mistakes happen, but it’s the recovery that counts. The combination of a fantastic happy hour and world-class management makes this a standout destination in San Diego. It is refreshing to visit a place that takes ownership of the guest experience so seriously. I will definitely be going back and highly recommend it to anyone who values both great drinks and a restaurant that truly cares about its patrons.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPECEgnzzutdCuI56Qn4Hh&fid=0x0:0x8972c50561df9d1d"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Jazmin Berumen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViDvla-om0opWMTsdgi1L0DABzTdnjVRwQuMJIXGTN23RiYOBEig=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I really enjoyed our food and the attentiveness that our waiter provided us. Shout out to Jesse (with an e) I hope 🤞 I spelled his name right, but he made our anniversary date night a good one! We had the bread, some drinks, and pasta. Pictures of what we ordered attached with our review. 10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMcbMt_MsjLE36qstaUTKz&fid=0x0:0x8972c50561df9d1d"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Paola S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGHGlmk5yvcfKQFYuhsLZUR_6_lm_EPLoR8syk2mu5YsUkK1p6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time in experience here. No notes. Food, service and vibe were excellent. Kamie was an exceptional server and had wonderful recommendations that we took her up on. This was a girls dinner, but we all agreed that it would also be a great date night spot. We'll be back with hubbies in tow.  Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCdpWzB9eEosgAMEM3yh75Y&fid=0x0:0x8972c50561df9d1d"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Drew Executive Assistant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyRyqVdnb4fM7JHwts7-vN0vMnFUeQXUJQVt1PilnNTxblysFm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited Amalfi Llama as a group and overall had a great experience. The atmosphere is beautiful and the food lived up to the hype. I ordered the steak and it was cooked perfectly—great flavor, quality cut, and plated well. Everyone at the table enjoyed their dishes.

The only downside was the service. Our group’s water glasses went empty for long stretches, and refills and check-ins were slower than expected for a restaurant at this level. It didn’t ruin the meal, but it definitely stood out.

Still, the food and ambiance were excellent. With a bit more attentive service, it would be an easy five-stars. I’d definitely go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOzFGYJaWbbOVDz5xyZ02d&fid=0x0:0x8972c50561df9d1d"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"Imee C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWioeyCgeB4uUWcshPAC2pQIsYfzt_qMb-WRuNjjtwRo95RTH1PfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had a work lunch here.  This is in the UTC location.  We had reservations but the place was not crowded at all.  There were 4 of us and the hostess sat us in a small booth.  But server moved us to a bigger one, which was very nice.  We ordered oysters on a half shell and calamari for starters.  Oysters tasted very fresh and very good.  The calamari was very tasty and tender.  For the main course, I ordered a steak that was not on the menu.  It was very good.  We also ordered the chocolate sin cake and it was perfect.  Moist and not too sweet.   The service was not up to par but food was delicious","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKWbzzQQayOwXOO-0ptj5z&fid=0x0:0x8972c50561df9d1d"],"When":"2025-8-6"},{"Name":"Greg K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVteB3SxUow5d-uRC0xzibGgkGf_MkBA9Sm3LqcVqdWw-N7nH-a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went there for a business event and we got the outdoor area for our large group. The temps were perfect and the space was nice and open. The seats were comfortable and the retractable walls made it nice so that we could talk to our other coworkers.

The service was a little slow with the drinks in the beginning, but they caught up. The food was delicious and well presented.

Paid parking was nice because it meant the spots that were close to the restaurant.

I will have to bring my wife back for a happy hour .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAU4mKD92cawcy62kMAzxS9&fid=0x0:0x8972c50561df9d1d"],"When":"2025-7-24"},{"Name":"Cathy Del","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQYQmKKDox2x0DSrt8gguvA3ACDAYDD5x03zVP7BWCquuT-AYo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went here for lunch to celebrate Anniversary and my brother Peter visiting from the Philippines. There were 14 of us, big group. The manager Damny had a good sense to arrange our long table conveniently putting a break in between for bathroom breaks. The food was great but I must say on the high end price. It’s not for a family on a budget. My suster and brother in law, Christy and Eric generously paid the entire bill. I bet it’s around $1k or maybe more. We had appetizers, drinks like wine, steak, chicken, pasta, plus desserts. Overall it was a fun time. It’s not perfect but the service was excellent even with slight unavoidable confusion they corrected it without charging us. Our waitress was Larissa, our hostess Odette who is so pleasant and nice. Teo other waiters helped served our entrees but didn’t get their names. Then another waitress helped take our group pictures. See some photos I took and they took for us.  Also, the bathroom is noce and clean took a picture pf that too. I am picky when it comes to restaurants restrooms. I check it out first before I order. It passed my standard in flying colors. Highly recommend even if it’s pricey, definitely worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC4m-xv3ml0QsnD00YrNlv8&fid=0x0:0x8972c50561df9d1d"],"When":"2025-8-24"}]

[{"Name":"AZ Kimba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwespEKPuI9fe0QCFlQnCbeflDp_YK0b3gL6bQEtlHPe41Xp-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"😀We were visiting from out of town. We have eaten at many Denny's locations.
📲If you like to eat at Denny's and you have room on your phone, I highly recommend that you download their app and register for their deals and coupons. You will save money. 💰
🍽️It was a Saturday evening at about 7pm. There was plenty of parking and the exterior of the restaurant was clean and well maintained with lots of flowers.🌹🪻
We were greeted and seated as we walked in and our server was quick to acknowledge us at the table.
😃Our food came out of the kitchen really fast, as well.
Everything was cooked exactly how we wanted it.
🥩🍳One of us had the steak and eggs and the other had the appetizer combo plate and a side salad.🍟🥗
😋Everything tasted delicious and the employees were all very friendly. 😊👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB2COcU7rjuroHw8FRG1p65&fid=0x0:0x7d56535f220f37f5"],"When":"2025-6-22"},{"Name":"Steven","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUq8pvlThsHAkyRauTAYfkZiYZLwslNf4QzFeSEK_3dBzB2Bc8M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They have two big signs advertising an all-day special that includes fries and a drink. When I asked my server, Marissa, she told me it didn’t come with a drink — first red flag. I thought maybe I misunderstood, so I double-checked the signs. When the check came, I pointed out that it clearly says the deal includes a drink. She said it’s “not in the system” and that the manager wasn’t there. I told her I expected to pay the advertised price. She got upset and said, “I’ll pay for your drink.” Fine — the drink was removed from the check.

Then I noticed an extra charge for an “add American slice.” I never asked for that. Did I even receive an American slice? I have no idea — it was my first (and probably last) time eating at Denny’s. I’ll be calling the manager tomorrow to find out who’s lying or who’s responsible for this “error.”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKNjCyi8W-lkWqSUdYC2M9&fid=0x0:0x7d56535f220f37f5"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"James Randorff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoHKko7C_uLc69qSDMLiS8eC_3VaBeEUxSlTfrp34McH_LZb4W=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I am a fan of properly seasoning food, and a big part of proper seasoning is the use of salt. That being said, this Denny’s needs to seriously back off on the salt. My hash browns were so salty as to be unenjoyable, and my Grand Slamwich was just as salty.

The coffee had a slightly bitter flavor that even half and half could not soften.

The atmosphere of the restaurant is annoying with all the kids crane game machines beckoning for attention.

Our server did a good job and was attentive throughout our meal.

We spent $90 with tax and a 20% tip for our family of 4. For that amount, we could have gone to Breakfast Republic of Broken Yolk and had a far better meal and experience. We will not return to this Denny’s.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAF9jEiOe0Ce6p1O3_kiELW&fid=0x0:0x7d56535f220f37f5"],"When":"2025-7-20"},{"Name":"B F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJESkx2jnqvfVeCK8w5jevWG_ZFoCYu2FMk8tU_GjdzgaW5IQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I got to get a burger because of the ad and the girl inside is like mumbling she has a mask on. She tells me if I get the one without the drink it will be a bigger burger and I was like for the same price and she said yeah. Then she charges me and it comes to 12.14 very odd. I walked out","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPPKYDiAk8t-C33-SX526p&fid=0x0:0x7d56535f220f37f5"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Eric Yang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgntaEBhxhB56darh-y67xP9yRsmnm6NyP2bdRbjA1EMRIt5zV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Food comes far too slow here. Took 30-40 minutes for basic food to arrive. Waiter service is on par, and food is pretty good. Reasonable prices and plenty of parking.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCAn8StlwE&fid=0x0:0x7d56535f220f37f5"],"When":"2025-2-5"},{"Name":"Ericka Banuelos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaCGAoBF89wRqwK7ei5XFUC_3XUafytZ-ZtlvFR1GJu9909k8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We absolutely love this Denny’s! The service is always exceptional - every time we visit, the staff is friendly, attentive and makes us feel genuinely welcome. It’s rare to find such consistent hospitality, and it’s what keeps us coming back.
The food is always hot and fresh, and the restaurant itself is clean and well maintained. Even though we have other locations closer to us, we will gladly drive a little farther just to eat here. It’s clear that the manager Jesse and his team takes pride in what they do, and it really shows.
Highly recommend if you’re looking for a reliable friendly place to enjoy a great meal!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Muglovio Films","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1_n1hjV6N4WzXKcQo-IPsPeqYyrunpVeizVCBeelj_o-kW7UOlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dining out can feel hit or miss sometimes, but Julio definitely made this one of the better experiences we’ve had in a while. We visited Denny’s the other day and had such a wonderful time, thanks to our server, Julio. From the moment he introduced himself, he was friendly, helpful, and really on top of everything.

He had a really positive attitude the entire time. It’s clear that he cares about giving great service.

We truly appreciated the way he made us feel taken care of. If you’re stopping by, I highly recommend asking for Julio!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lolly Underpants","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_CW00HSZ62BoAZdmeIVJY7qsNdcLSlK3lTbacbOc44B1W3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a really pleasant experience at Denny’s thanks to Julio. He was polite, attentive, and made sure our table had everything we needed throughout the meal.

The service felt smooth and effortless, and everything came out just as we ordered. Julio made the whole visit more enjoyable with his professional and friendly attitude. If you’re dining here, hope you get Julio, he does a great job! :)","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lisa Rae","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWYBaQbMGdLXROWlO1uj8CjfV9TgcnXily-t8BcR8rgOV7vUk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Infant Indian food eater here: so if your looking for information regarding authenticity or anything like that, I don’t have it.

BUT- let me tell ya…

This food was so good! We came at lunchtime and just chose one of the combos and ate what was on the bar.  Of the items that were on the bar, they had two mild items which were the lamb (Rogan Josh) and the chicken tikka masala. And then they did have a spicy chicken curry. And another medium option that I forgot what it was.

They also had some vegetable options.

The combo with two protein choices, rice, a naan and a cheese ball (not sure what the actual name is)  and a drink run you about $20 a pop.

When I walked in, I was really excited because again I’m a babe when it comes to Indian experiences. I also can’t handle digestive wise on the exit a lot of heat, so was pleased to find that the options available were considerate of that.

The lady behind the counter was helpful and directing me to which combo I could choose, their accents were thick, so it was a special interaction that I personally really enjoy to fumble through the conversation. When it comes to the naan you can have the garlic or plain, my husband and I choose one and the other so we could share. Both were good, soft and freshly toasted (I like the brown parts personally🙂).

The dining room is quaint, but there is plenty of seating. Additionally, there is an outdoor patio for seating.

Some cultural music in the background playing at a low tone (not too loud or disturbing at all) so the atmosphere was set for you and whoever you want to have conversation and to enjoy one another.  There’s a TV in the dining room, but it wasn’t on.

All of the ladies working there, it seemed related and they would work behind the counter and then come out and sit in the dining room and talk with each other and that was nice. I enjoyed their candor. Definitely mom and Pop vibe and so enjoyable.

Lastly, the cheese balls: I’ve never had this and wasn’t exactly sure what it was. The lady did tell me the name of it and then just explained to me that it was cheese, but it was sweet. My husband did a good job describing it as the Cinnabon donut holes from Taco Bell? That’s the way they looked not the way they tasted. Whatever it was, it was dense like cake and soaked in some sort of syrupy sweetness. And I loved it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAocE5y4gNpa0UW-FTiTm97&fid=0x0:0x6ae79fb0d549ff30"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Walter Wilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZHYWWLTmC8cqch2AmWIR5TSuHSPf11LVTH-oM9XSALEI5syM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonder food.  Chicken dishes were excellent and filled with flavor.  The garlic Naan was lights out!  Could be the best I’ve had. Staff was pleasant and counter service was fast.  Love this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA4tHwxp5wb5HUD1zPJuwu7&fid=0x0:0x6ae79fb0d549ff30"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Robin Rosen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpu7ecPyaKSOKJEuWC3VIkCysuX_DO-sPhVWWdOeLfmQwJky2e=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I wanted to like this restaurant and support it, and I think it’s a nice homey atmosphere, but some of the dishes left some to be desired. I don’t know if it was just an off day, but the tikka masala tasted so off and very salty. I struggled to eat it. I didn’t really like the mango lassi either. Paneer dish was alright. The naan was good though!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angela Hess","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUE-oQQlxt2nUHRtqH-Q0qTnhog1eEIC4PnbayhgkAIsb4Mqv6k7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great food! Not a fan of eating off paper plates though. The rice pudding was delicious. We had the chicken tikka masala and it was so flavorful and the naan was warm and crispy. Would come again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anshu Vajpayee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-Gx9Xcn9cd0KqNFAyznZYRcpXLWQ6mh01RZ-n_Gn74Tjb67FV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"During our recent visit, we had dinner at Punjabi Tandoor and ordered dal makhani, paneer, and naan. Unfortunately, the food had no flavor—the dal makhani was completely bland, and the paneer didn’t seem fresh. When we raised this with the staff, they mentioned it was a vegan dal makhani, which was surprising given that it’s not a vegetarian restaurant. Overall, the experience was disappointing, and even the washrooms were not clean. If you don’t have any other option for Indian food, you might consider trying it, but the quality was similar across their other outlets as well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jag Holla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW521gmIs8WIhUF7pk-2mq0RKfTOwrLEKyNBkCfxCPbIUQkaZIo8w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Looking for authentic home cooked punjabi food, this is the best place. Family owned and passionate about their cooking. Owner Mr. Jagadish Singh, a polite but very knowledgeable ( world traveller) will treat you as he treats his family.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Remy Dupart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxzIePnxTTOydL9CzghLJddZ1Gk6-ArpnM4yIVB4OgX93bQO5l=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food felt homemade, and you could actually taste different spices in the curry without one overpowering the other. Good place and good value.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Helen Park","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6Sc3Pt-88CiUCBx7fYPndqHb3W-rtjqRmrgHuL88lejlYFFE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Punjabi Tandoor has been my favorite Indian restaurant ever since I came to San Diego for college in 2010. I graduated 2014 and moved out of SD, but since then, every single time I’ve come back it has never failed me. I just had a dinner combo tonight because I’m visiting SD for Labor Day weekend and I almost cried from how delicious it still is!! The women working there are also so friendly and sweet. Thank you Punjabi Tandoor for making me so happy for the past 15 years!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Not sure why more coffee places dont have this on their menu. Great place to spend time with your kid.  Definitely stop by. The espresso served professionally with side of water. Classy

There's a bunch of little local shops in this same shopping center.

Great time with @healingground.online","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApyX2Hd8oyLgUQG8pWJs6a&fid=0x0:0x23b31bcfbe43236a"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Deniece Smith, Realtor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEM1LFWCSR-r-CH5OhNy0qeiMkc-By6u_FzYsJoeTlosBrQzkHaA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"How about a hot ube latte? Delicious!! Or cinnamon cardamom? Or rose vanilla? They are delicious! And..I came in one day, went back the next and they remembered I liked half-caffeine..and my name. Nice touches!! Love this place! Ambiance is a great mix of posh and casual. I’ll be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBeXZYKKtHpUY8SsnCbAt_7&fid=0x0:0x23b31bcfbe43236a"],"When":"2026-1-22"},{"Name":"Debbie’s Picks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9cxfNNqYL3nMZt0qX69E5OZi3YyuwWFJYldkvh5QwKdMmHME=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This cafe is so worth the jaunt! ;) Located in the Miramar area, Jaunt is off the beaten path. Definitely a hidden gem!

Stylish yet warm, this cafe is tucked into a commercial area. Once inside, I loved the deep colors, natural light from the skylights, high ceilings, and beautiful green plants.

I ordered a Cloud Mocha. As a big cold foam fan, I was tempted by their creative cold foam menu. They also have all the classic espresso and coffee offerings.

When ordering, I noticed a case of beautiful pastries and another full of house-made empanadas. I got the goat cheese and mushroom which was incredibly good!! A must!!

I’ll definitely be back. Highly recommend!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHxI-etrgK3ynJt3CFW3lB&fid=0x0:0x23b31bcfbe43236a"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"Rhandy F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUgFYdCMWGMD6tVx_kcIRMs4oQtFWbo7qhHpzC--2RTG_HXTjJh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is very popular and they have a great variety of pastries and empanadas. I ordered a matcha and it was decent. The scones and croissants were delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgE-rRsJOLbdgivsY8yBLJ&fid=0x0:0x23b31bcfbe43236a"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Alexandra Dexter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxu2kAPw3TIwSk0EeAzjA5vYOJIZOOP6muo_l-INFEX5KSxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I bought an iced mocha and it was pretty good! The look inside here is also cute, and I appreciate them having AC on in summer. My only critiques are that the music was a little too loud and there is not enough seating. I could not believe how many people were here working on laptops; literally every chair except for 2 were taken from people working, and I took one of the last 2 chairs. The other thing I think they could benefit from is less TALL chairs and more normal/short chairs. The tall chairs are quite difficult to get onto for many (of course not all) people. Overall though, nice staff, good coffee, cute place. I would come back, but probably get it to go. Also only 1 restroom here, but very clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRye2PXnid1d7kfS0-23Kw&fid=0x0:0x23b31bcfbe43236a"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"Robert Driggers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqG6cakpWKA8xA8xypv7lVm4HNMsndRaW_LpDLqCmjded1pzFL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been coming here for years and I think it's the best coffee roaster in town. Additionally their empanadas are really good and they have cheesecake from Muse now which is really good","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA69Dvq5S5tEmsj0m9XMeOB&fid=0x0:0x23b31bcfbe43236a"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Rebecca Clements","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZpyRJL-mguKNpkRPpBhhv7WrGXq6IM4LoGxK_Qq9c8FZsieby=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They have so many great vegan pastry and food options! The vegan soyrizo burrito was great, cooked perfectly. Iced americano was delightful. The place is busy. Some inside and outside seated. Kind staff. 10/10 recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbGl1QW1nsVRpsjh8tL9Kr&fid=0x0:0x23b31bcfbe43236a"],"When":"2025-7-6"},{"Name":"Lydia Chu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLVGg32FrfAi88UdIsHCYqHiW8Kn_ckZf-2m4VUwGuCOYSgKQ3Jw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jaunt Coffee is a great find in an unexpected spot. It’s located in a warehouse strip mall which was interesting. Inside, it’s cozy and welcoming, and they have a nice outdoor seating area too. It’s perfect if you want to bring your dog and enjoy some fresh air while having coffee. The coffee is really good, and the place has a relaxed, friendly feel. Just be aware that parking is limited, and we had to circle around a bit to find a spot. Definitely worth checking out if you’re in San Diego!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDvzpWQmwE&fid=0x0:0x23b31bcfbe43236a"],"When":"2024-12-20"}]

[{"Name":"Amr Abdelhamid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZysHGILyImAseH9wC5gr1Tv9pEH-8SZ4Ffb7-aGXwfiv-ywU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience at Kebabish! The food was excellent, especially the BBQ platter — it was absolutely delicious. The quantity and quality were both amazing, and everything was cooked perfectly. Definitely worth visiting again. [{"Name":"Blah Something","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYqd44RNUCNXR5dRl-FhAJ4y6ofDgxmiWrpKwqFylBhz64ZA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful wonderful market!! So much could be said about it.

The selection is good, with a variety of pantry items, seafood, meat, and snacks! Great place to pick up a delicious sausage or chorizo to grill!! The only thing lacking is fresh produce.

Despite being a specialty grocery store, the prices are fair! $3.50 for a delicious baguette, and ice cream cups for $5!

The staff are wonderful, and know everything they sell, and provide excellent recommendations!

Overall a great little shop, and definitely worth the time to visit and browse!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYjMmm-wE&fid=0x0:0x87c1138cb4d9d2b6"],"When":"2025-5-2"},{"Name":"Roxy Allard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKyAmRgY3Pqc80DG-GED_AZAbjJDRdr6W4kYRS0Ed2S5i5Ho0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to find Karine and Jeff, Bonne Maman and L’abeille Diligente products. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went here for lunch and for happy hour. We really enjoyed the great attentive service and the food was delicious.
It's a great happy hour and we will definitely be back again.

We tried their guava margarita, mango margarita, and the spicy cucumber margarita. I like the guava margarita most. They aren't made with tequila but with I believe wine vodka instead. Still tasty though.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHfXiPWQLXPTYCwQ63hQCu&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"My Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-o38aNqhmbPRZUZYMfBXJ4xFkgUX4l-cE6T9emtIIZJWEKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Unlike the Convoy location, this location has plenty of parking and indoor seating. Your order is taken after you are seated not at the counter. Same club music. Large tv’s for sports and a nice bar. They’re just missing a dance floor to go along with the music!

Came on a Tuesday and there weren’t any Tuesday taco deals. Just happy hour Monday - Thursday 3-5pm.

We ordered:

Octopus taco - amazing. The crispy onions gave it an added crunch and generous on the octopus. Choice of spicy salsa macha or pesto. We got salsa macha, it’s like chili oil.

Queso Birria taco w consome - I like the birria taco here over Mike’s Red Taco! It’s fully loaded and flavorful! The broth was not overly salty.

Ceviche de cameron - shrimp, red onions, cilantro, tomato. This one is traditional and basic out of all with refreshing herb flavors. I prefer this ceviche over the other one.

La coqueta - cooked shrimp, octopus, red onions, cucumber, roasted pepper,  cilantro. This one had all the nice assortment but it was too wet. The tostado got soggy. It also had cream cheese base that I didn’t like.

Garlic shrimp plate - came with salad, rice and beans. We substituted the beans for more salad. The salad had a hint of jalapeño dressing that gave it a kick of spicy peppers. 10 shrimps! The rice was too wet for me, I prefer dryer. It also came with a side of tortillas.

We each got the guava margarita. The guava purée tasted like the guava juice from Costco! Regardless, it was delicious. Originally, I wanted the tamarindo margarita but they sold out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOqxW5VpgPBIlanWDgHL7Q&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Catherine Hunt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYH-I4RvrfRUXl77LorTgEYOQ9Iu5u4MQ2EyTsBvUTqYmBsYb3iA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My friend and I went for lunch on Thursday and it was our first time here.  The menu had a variety of offerings.  The restaurant had a nice ambiance though a little loud as more people arrived and the music in the background was lively. Our server was nice but got busy and didn’t check whether we needed more water or anything else.  The food was very good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBr5022TzWgIPS8Rmad394h&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-10-10"},{"Name":"Adam Hargreaves","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-72C3SwSSy6l4Rj5Erfs9-s_LbsS-Em62yI5q_HuqyVbHNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came for brunch and had chilaquiles, huevos con chorizo and some pancakes. All the food looked beautiful and tasted great. The servers, Auria, Juanita and Destiny, were all super attentive and friendly","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCrH_ikvMi1-CadOsR4MaS&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"EcoVoyager and Eats","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrR2LRo-Io7zUm7CU1z08UBQs6P8tC95FY3khAii_drrshoqM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great spot for Mexican seafood with a nice atmosphere! This is my third time here and first time too Happy Hour. The margaritas were only $7-- an oyster is only $1.50 apiece such a good deal. We enjoyed a peach margaritas and a dozen oysters. I had an ahi tostada from the happy hour menu, which was fresh and delicious, as well as a shrimp and cheese taco that hit the spot. Others in my group ordered the three-carnitas taco plate with rice and beans and really enjoyed it.

Overall, tasty food, great prices during happy hour, and a welcoming vibe. Definitely worth a visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDLKD4bUeQRvRPKXsyghXyI&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Maggie Silva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKXlqBaCSZaj7gvE2BpyIkm5M92ky4i627tHvjAW7YrVaMeFg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Viejon - Mira Mesa
Hands down one of the best brunch spots we’ve hit lately! The red chilaquiles were packed with flavor and cooked to perfection, and the tres leches pancakes? Absolutely insane — soft, rich, and melt-in-your-mouth good.

The vibe was everything — a live DJ kept the energy up with great music without it being too loud. Perfect for a fun and chill brunch.

Service was on point too — super friendly and fast. And don’t miss their café de olla — so good, and you can choose between almond, oat, or regular milk.

Already planning our next visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo3YHfqAE&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-4-27"},{"Name":"Mario T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1Mtsj3p5sqelTaaDrhXOFMvKOulg0MumGlbIiHpPYbR_1zc9D=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First time there, went for dinner. The food was good the only plate i didnt like much was dessert, i got the concha with ice cream. The bad thing was the concha was hard not fresh. I know my sweet bread when its fresh. The atmosphere was good almost closing time they play music loud.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZhY_gtoC-qDW8bLhRT2Ua&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-7-22"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s so nice we have one more brunch spot in scripps ranch! We literally need more this kind of restaurant. It looks modern, nice and delicious. I went there with two of my best friends. We ordered some tacos and fried fish. The tacos I choose is Quesitaco and Smoke Fish taco, both of them are very yummy, especially the Quesitaco, highly recommend! It is also huge! Two tacos are totally enough for me. They also have a lot of brunch items, I will definitely try it the next time. Their drinks menu look very great as well. I had a Chai tea latte and my friends had tiramisu latter, we all love them. The waitress is super sweet and friendly. I enjoyed the experience. The only thing is I felt my stomach is uncomfortable that afternoon and night, I’m not sure if it is related with their foods, hope not.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByV_cpT6aADYEHQ2FWCNuo&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-6-27"}]

[{"Name":"K K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZnT5b5z-sslWV-8ydYX4X5TlRTLjrcIMb7CFYaeEZ5_hpOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We’ve been coming here for years.  Quick service and the pho is good.  Price however has gone up like everywhere else.
We the chicken vermicelli this time instead of shrimp.  I still like the shrimp better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvlW8IRLsqGXZrUh0Ale-y&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Vadym Shapran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqVRTHwXS3fb-T0FUdnU85HiChRKAVW59JeQK-g9zMNy9KjtFJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Decent place with a sweet vibe. It can get packed, but it’s generally worth the wait since it’s one of the best pho spots in the area. The chicken pho and beef pho (Filet Mignon) really hit the spot, delicious balance of the meat and broth. Overall, great food, good service, and a welcoming atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD__eH-ptFmalXNv8PP1uAM&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Auntie next door","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-LaJSrrcPZYk7vNcucG5wEhQjfPptwsXKROvtEWcL-TmO3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"filet mignon no soup noodle my fav. generous  meat portion, no fat, slightly chewy, but its fine to me, ~$14 before tax. soup noodle was ok, similar to other viet restaurant. the viet coffee with condensated milk was very rich in flavor, be aware if u are sensitive to caffeine bc i stayed awake until 3am after that, still it was good coffee. i love coffee. ststaffwere very efficient and cooperated vy well, they drove the F1 cleansing cart to t
table immediately after customers leaving. expect ~15 mins waiting time during weekend lunch hour","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2SebnUzj3Rcb5mpsC5I6N&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious Vietnamese cuisine at Pho Cow Cali in Mira Mesa! We enjoyed the house special pho filet mignon and #3 Rare steak, flank, brisket, tendon & tripe pho. The service was friendly and the food came out quickly. We went at 11am and did not have to wait but when we left there was a line outside. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnMBY7rB8h7zZLW1-xSVA0&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"sham kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdi0gVdVq8oT67qTrkQXovSVa_Ffy6rmAh3Qr2iYYXQDV5p9I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pho Cow Cali is absolutely worth the hype.

While they’re known for their pho (and the prices are amazing), I almost always go for the grilled rice plates—especially the chicken—and they never disappoint. The food is fresh, flavorful, and super satisfying without leaving you feeling heavy or gross afterward. I’ve waited in line for 25–35 minutes—even in the rain—and honestly, it’s always worth it.

The service is incredibly fast once you’re seated, and the inside of the restaurant is surprisingly nice and clean for how busy it gets.

One heads-up: they have a unique reservation system. You don’t just line up—you have to walk up, write your name on a waitlist, and then wait to be called. If you didn’t know that, you might be standing around for nothing. A small inconvenience, but worth mentioning so others don’t miss out.

This spot has easily become one of my go-to places for comfort food that actually feels good to eat. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw9PrMuwE&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-3-24"},{"Name":"Henry J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI96i1uwj2jOqWS3dXS6cZX07own7u1iUmbO8x-DwKJ9MTm9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For just around $12.50, you can get a huge bowl of Pho with so much meat inside. Definitely the best Pho I ever had! Even their broken rice dishes were so delicious, try one of them for takeout like I did. It's very much worth the wait. I'll be coming back next time for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQAPlMIDpEDXD9_J1jZX42&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"RCS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9pceXPDQPKbbJv8g9mxGtzTEisLjv8CIOSKw9pCH55023Tqj9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great pho, super fast service, like 2 min fast.   Could use a little more meat but the flavors were awesome.  Rich, little fish saucy, but hits the spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUaxBHokiMO70ZgxFdDV7A&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The weather’s been chilly lately, so I took my mom for a comforting bowl of hot noodle soup to warm up. This Vietnamese spot is always packed, even mid-afternoon on a weekday. We had the beef noodle soup and shrimp-pork rice roll, and both were fantastic. The broth was perfectly balanced, the portions generous, and the flavors authentic. At just $12.50 for a hearty bowl, it’s a steal! Plus, the service is amazing—friendly and attentive. If you’re into Vietnamese pho, this place is a must-try!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_q7bj2AE&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-1-19"}]

[{"Name":"Craig Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVt0JKWpYQqkvTlBJYr5_OOWqrZAsaD-X5pt-gNfHlpRaia8-ZN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love coming here. The beers are always rotating, and I love that they have multiple of the same beer fermented with different yeast. It's amazing to taste the difference the yeast makes.

As a home brewer, I love taking notes for future brews. They also sell all of their brewing products on site. I picked up four different yeasts, two of them because I sampled them in the taproom today. Every bartender I've talked to has been an experienced brewer, and they're happy to give advice (unless it's busy).

They also have a brewer loyalty program. Bring in 10 used years packs, and get a coupon for a free pack. You can also do it by mail if you're not nearby. But it's worth a trip if you brew.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARen3y5Ctfn9cfGrl1X7ex&fid=0x0:0x5f6e8d6a3cd430fb"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Brittney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQj9Zjjc0WT5Z6bLOafHZpGPaVddo8kisn55UJw5n9knydPuxstA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great experience. I ordered a flight and picked one i knew i'd like and asked him to surprise me with the rest. He took care in asking some follow up questions and gave me a great selection.
5 stars across the board.
The Ambiance
The Staff & Service
The Drink options
The delicious food. Omg the Fungi pesto pizza is 🤌🏻 will now forever crave.

Great for bookclubs 😉","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXIHaf6whGZpXjt-fCXe1V&fid=0x0:0x5f6e8d6a3cd430fb"],"When":"2025-8-22"},{"Name":"Hans Foto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKrWUglxmq8PM7F2Zh-1NdTZRH9yn3lvLesG2RLYwZ6TX3izc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a cool and unique place to visit. It's wonderful as a stand-alone brewery, but it's especially exceptional as if you are into craft brewing or wine. You can come hang out in the tasting room and try different styles of beer make with various types of yeast in the house. A wonderful place to try their products.

The staff is always friendly and helpful. You can also come get the freshest yeats for your home craft brewing adventures.

There is a covered outdoor patio that is wonderful for the San Diego weather. Losts of tables to sit at indoors, and a large bar where you can hang out. There are several tvs that always have the sports all the time!

This is a fun and unique experience. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYkbKtsAE&fid=0x0:0x5f6e8d6a3cd430fb"],"When":"2025-5-4"},{"Name":"Georgina Salazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2nVLkANxeXkE68E9arX3dcFZVt29QStNF0LVixb_CmW03OHwqHg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great venue for our professional organization (AWIS San Diego) spring celebration! Tasty 😋 beer and food, nice areas for networking over treats and even a conference room for the formal presentation portion of the event. Science 🧪 themed decor was a bonus for our group that supports women in STEM.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDowuDu8wE&fid=0x0:0x5f6e8d6a3cd430fb"],"When":"2025-4-23"},{"Name":"Sierra Simpson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSGtOUNExUILzCG5QAuQplOYQU5P-NCNzz0dWj2Fdkv95MdrrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a scientist by day, coming to White Labs was an absolute treat. If you haven’t been here before, White labs is a premier yeast maker for commercial and home brewers across the globe. They do tours of their facility on Friday and Saturday at 2pm and 3:30pm. Our tour was with Matt who was a wealth of knowledge about brewing, yeast, science, and the history of the business. I was enthralled for the 30ish minute tour.

The tasting room is unique in comparison to others in “beeramesa” - they had a huge range of beers that are split and brewed with different strains of yeast to show you how much the yeast makes a difference in color, taste, viscosity, etc.

We tried several dual beers including the Kolsch, the 20C, the Heff, and the Buchner IPA. My favorite was the Buchner for its crisp flavor and citrus tones. The heff has a lot of banana in it, and the Kolsch definitely has a bit of Belgian funk to it.

I will certainly be back with friends in tow. This is a perfect place for a casual hang or to bring people from out of town. Loved the beer, the people, and the atmosphere!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPjr70Ww&fid=0x0:0x5f6e8d6a3cd430fb"],"When":"2024-12-2"},{"Name":"Tiffany Oda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUl86MNIjPLv0yFBIktPimfokjuZj95GvuhQzsanz2Agy62jbmD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really cool concept that aims to show the difference that different yeasts can make on the final product.
(+) Vibe - nice indoor and outdoor area. Dog friendly.
(+) Beers - really cool side by sides to show the yeast differences.
(+) Pizza - the white mushroom pizza was really good, we added sausage.
(+) Friendly service.

Would go again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICDt6GLuAE&fid=0x0:0x5f6e8d6a3cd430fb"],"When":"2024-4-3"},{"Name":"Jesse Bowlen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfSsbo7uaggoSDEtaKVXNcO_3umQ0Adx9FDH3b6lnpUHu29-Bs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome brewery that really gets into the science behind brewing. They have a unique side by side option to try the same beer but brewed with different yeast strains. Its really adds a special element to their brews. Overall the brewery had great beer, food options, and merch. The parking is somewhat limited but the indoor and outdoor seating options are great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxgP3SWA&fid=0x0:0x5f6e8d6a3cd430fb"],"When":"2023-5-7"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Not much of a beer drinker but my friend took me here for the pizza and it was delicious. I wish we came with more people so that we could have ordered more food to try.

Got a nice cider on tap.  We ordered the Cesar salad and funghi pizza. The Cesar salad was the only salad on the limited food menu. It was a nice portion with crispy romaine and high on the salty anchovies.
The funghi mushroom with pistachio pesto (Yum!) was crispy and very delicious. I'm still thinking of the pizza now!

There are high bar height tables with chairs inside. We sat outside on their heated covered patio with regular tables. There are plenty of parking but business was a bit slow on a Thursday evening.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTxrbmxAE&fid=0x0:0x5f6e8d6a3cd430fb"],"When":"2024-5-24"}]
