[{"Name":"Faisal Zuwaidi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-EwJEJkh1wDCajAwk4Y76q30KVZpSPqCjlBVIdYzAoeHF_0pl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I enjoyed the cheesesteak, regular fries, and homemade banana pudding. All were outstanding. The cheesesteak delivered rich, authentic flavor, the fries were perfectly crisp, and the banana pudding offered a delightful, sweet conclusion. The friendly and welcoming staff made the experience even more enjoyable. Highly recommend for anyone seeking a quality Philly-style meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9wA3k_0C2vq0jIiVaVkjr&fid=0x0:0xb6ec7bf0168ab44"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Camille S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkioWafI8kFVU-c2lA_O-KRnO1gg6fqZfcKEYegSZn1Q11Lzbp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"this spot is SUPER versatile and experimental w flavors, but it works and it's FIRE

this isnt on the menu anymore since it was a seasonal item but we tried their turkey cheesesteak and it tasted like thanksgiving leftovers in a cheesesteak sandwich!! SOOO GOOD

their garlic parm wings are ALSO incredible!!! Would 1000% get those again!

and everyday except sunday, from 4-8pm, they have $7 philly cheesesteaks which is perfect if you need a quick budget friendly and delicious dinner!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD07kbrL8z0EO5bugLC_gdz&fid=0x0:0xb6ec7bf0168ab44"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Christina DLP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCcqQ1A_OgkS0sJtmwOtf8aleNOVovfIYAgs7HxDAT3EcrflyMxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious Philadelphia Cheese sandwiches that you can customize. They also offer Hoagies, salads, fries, homemade cookies, bread pudding, and more. I recommend if you want fresh cookies get there early, because they sellout. Lunch specials are really affordable. I loved my cheese steak with grillled onions and side of season fries!

Inside seating only and parking can be difficult to find during busy periods.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCAQru2wMwGxzsv4MrQ7ucK&fid=0x0:0xb6ec7bf0168ab44"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Matthew A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8Vp4wfl6Py0S5F9N58EmzS8H45Pij-X9yEkFTx0UVM6OI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"First off, the staff are extremely friendly, so that is definitely a positive. But other than that, I was very, very disappointed in the food. The cheesesteaks, I tried one chicken and one steak, are absolutely doused in black pepper. Usually, you complain about something being either over salted or unsalted, it’s been a very long time since I’ve ever had something that had way too much pepper. Also, the rolls that they were on we’re way over toasted and it was like eating kind of like a baguette instead of a soft pillowy roll. I think we’re out of stage right now in society where it’s just futile to complain about portion sizes, but you’re definitely not gonna get a lot for your money here when it comes to the meat you get in each cheesesteak for $15-$17. I would not put this place on par with spots like The Wise Ox, Giorgio’s, Big Jim’s Roast Beef (which has amazing cheese teams), and when it was here, Calozzis. To me, this is not a place you go if you want a great cheesesteak, this is a place you go if you’re in the area and you’re starving and you happen to be wanting a sandwich or not something else that Miramar offers. I will say respect to my friends from Philly, who warned me that the place was under new ownership and that the quality had changed, but I was in the area and I had to try for myself. And I’m glad I did, but I don’t see myself coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAUsigIl678N8hwnpmP9tNR&fid=0x0:0xb6ec7bf0168ab44"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Brittany Flynn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJcisPxISOHnS8iMBneg43MOOoAaOPjAvrT8phFUaHJE86sKbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"DELISH && NOT TO MISS!!
So freaking authentic and the quality is unlike any other. The wonderful owners are so kind too! I am so thankful I caught on to this spot from a viral video. Me and my friends will be back! 🏆🫶🏽⚜️
Photo of what I could manage not to devour! Juiciest Philly in all of Cali 💯💯💯","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBwW1xkzxHD3O5aGGJDczCV&fid=0x0:0xb6ec7bf0168ab44"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Melinda DeMara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVP4Mlsc56JmTL0K7pq4r4qmhb6YmGdytQjXQ85djdY6ips6r8ITw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow!! This small little gem off of Miramar Road is the bomb.com! My brother and I have been looking for the shop with the most delicious Philly Cheesesteak sammies and let me tell you, Philadelphia Sandwich Co aims to impress! The chicken philly, Joe’s way is my favorite! My brother and I got the philly fries, those are crazy ridiculous!! And did I mention dessert?? Banana pudding, just call me fat🤣 anyways, I say all this to say don’t be a fool and be cool and go try them out! Special thanks to Kiana, your service is a breath of fresh air!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDj6F9diMHqwnFvOK1JUa3z&fid=0x0:0xb6ec7bf0168ab44"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"jarred powell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGEhVTohQO5bDPfmHrp6VYOhu1_eJ-c-rsKnHhsljgHxMLqo0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great customer service
Cheesesteak - STAMP
DRINKS - STAMP
CHEESE FRIES - DELICIOUS
Banana Pudding- STAMP
PARKING - ROUGH

Small but fabulous place. Great and not pricey.  My first time here but not my last. I will definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD2KUupFGws6wnYcAGRLRkO&fid=0x0:0xb6ec7bf0168ab44"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Internal Dandelion","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYNMuSYkaSQ2dSFIfHQ-u04JSR4vNtjvlmf3vYr45k3pYx_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"They do some pretty good Philly cheesesteaks here! The sandwiches are loaded with meat and cheese and the Amoroso rolls (authentic Philly cheesesteak break) is imported from Philadelphia, so you know it's legit. They've got that old-school, hole-in-the-wall spot with Philly decor everywhere, so it's perfect for Philly sports fans! The prices are fair too, and they even have $7 cheesesteaks on select days. Would recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAnXcylJkT9A6Cv-cbAQdTv&fid=0x0:0xb6ec7bf0168ab44"],"When":"2025-9-18"}]

[{"Name":"Joshua Baakko (Model Railroad Tips)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQdlkaMnN8hPpuuvYhwM7iV7c547_5EThpeik4ebUCfejYFmfuCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Don't not go here.

Yes. Double negative. Follow them on social media, there's always some awesome deal. I stop off about every 3rd week and get the weekly deal... but because I'm a good guy and my wife worked with the wife of the owner (iirc Tracy) I feel obligated to support. Helps when the product is so damn good!

This review is NOT sponsored or influenced. We really don't have friendly contact with them currently, no fall out or anything. Just time and and distance.

In any case the prices blow anything you can get anywhere else out of the water. Plus they're present in many local breweries!

Even a full priced product is still less than national brands at a supermarket!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDL3JvkPA&fid=0x0:0xd229b6345e420279"],"When":"2024-6-26"},{"Name":"Stephanie Haskell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFYAQE61dCUilcCirXFUNaPHDKa_uQU7fB-i1rKB4BOPCvZSOG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got the opportunity to try some of Mister G’s Salsa at Little Miss Brewing and it was amazing!!!! So much flavor and just the right texture. Looking forward to visiting the 1st and only Salsa tasting room in SD!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-pa_4EQ&fid=0x0:0xd229b6345e420279"],"When":"2022-11-9"},{"Name":"Google Account","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLk_cQFITyBPwACSNHJh7VI0Us_bPWeI4_1AMrOOK2GUIBAkZ4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I come with a grave warning: this salsa will change your life. You will not be able to find better salsa elsewhere. You will still try. It will keep you up at night and your life will be marked for better or worse. You might start asking existential questions or even reading Kant, Nietzsche, or Camus. You will be looking for answers. There are none. Be very careful with this salsa. It will change your life.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steven Ellison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgm2rhMx1vVtkcb2q0QinNjOilo4SWZa7bzPlYJDG-9YIrKN-xqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got a salsa flight here, to go at the end of a fantastic night visiting all the businesses in this complex.

I am not someone that enjoys or handles spicy food, so I was nervous when most of the salsas in the flight were not marked as mild. Cut to me sitting at home with my wife, watching YouTube at 9 o'clock at night, as we both keep saying "damn these are so spicy" while continuing to shovel salsa into our mouths! My tongue felt like it was getting hit with a hammer, yet I wanted to just keep eating more. These salsas are GOOD!

They have a small patio and sell beer if you wanted to try a flight in house and have something to drink. It was a very cute vibe inside, lots of piñatas and piggie decorations. Lots of breweries sell Mister G's salsa and I can see why there's such a reach. I'll definitely be on the lookout in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rick Holmes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpF3Hyv-Yh72wIwBuaDKkdoCFW-0Eh0mMl_nGDVf5_UbuJ-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely love their salsa, location is great, it's a bunch of craft shops all next to each other","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emily Hao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5L20HoGgP6xt175yG7TBPoUIgrmonzKcUa_UYxUazeHrPpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are obsessed with Mister G’s salsa. We visit family in San Diego a few times per year and always check their IG to align our schedules with their open days. The salsa is so fresh, perfectly salted and delightfully spicy. Our corgi loves sitting in the sun outside while we consume more chips than we should. Thanks for making such great products!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dominic Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSVWxqCfd6TTq7N_lLRc-nyUlgQJUy9uYAFk08GFDQRyIZ96XO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I make salsa and everyone loves my salsa!  I CAN'T hate on these guys, theirs I like very much.  It's convenient, cheap($) and delicious!  I've only tried a few flavors, looking to explore the rest soon.  Closed recently due to a family emergency, I Hope all is well! 🙏🏼❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJAooirDuLEE845pcEmx9267pvEODluVk2Vl-cmKXeejsKG8A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a salsa experience! We got a total of four different salsas and they were all great. The menu is laid out from least to most spicy. The girl who helped us was friendly. The prices alone is a great reason to go but the fact that they taste delicious for cheap is worth it!!Definitely will go back and recommend to everyone to go try!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"A. L. Connor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpVDaXd_VPHDSIaHOalvgg0K6OagvpoErLbloF2kaZG4B_XURJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My first time at Embolden was in December 2024 after visiting the distillery next door: Seven Caves (which is a fantastic place to check out).  I’ve been to the location ages ago when it was a different brewery.
The space is large and well setup. There is plenty of seating and there is also a patio with heat lamps for the cooler days and evenings. They also usually have a food truck outside. I’ve been there when they had a pizza truck and when they’ve had a Mexican food truck.
Our group of 12 or so hung out and drank good beer, ate pizza, and had such a good time that we decided this was to place to have our annual friend gathering which would hold the 25-30 friends for shenanigans.
That evening I emailed the brewery’s event planner, Megan A.  She got back to me in less than 48 hours with questions and answers to my questions.  We confirmed a date and time and next steps.  Unfortunately, we had a death in the family in January and had to postpone our event. Megan was completely understanding and helpful and made it easy for us to pause things until we could figure out life.
In early March, I contacted her back with a couple of date options to see if we could reinstate our event and again she was completely accommodating.  We scheduled for a new date at the end of March 2025.
The date arrived and I got to Embolden early to setup tables and charcuterie with our friend who makes the best boards.  I met with Megan. She showed us the area we could occupy. The birthday girl and guy arrived as did 20 others. We were able to mingle and snack and drink together with no issues. Their light garden wall was beside our area and was perfect for a group shot.  The whole crew had a great time and Embolden was a great setting and venue for our event.
Megan/Embolden staff: you rock harder than Gibraltar! Thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBwozlrHh7r-9CPVWJgoQdY&fid=0x0:0xb4d51e1bbfcc493c"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Hans Foto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKrWUglxmq8PM7F2Zh-1NdTZRH9yn3lvLesG2RLYwZ6TX3izc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Some seriously great beer in an unassuming place. They have top notch Stouts, Imperial Stouts, and Barrel Aged Beer. All of their other beer was very tasty as well. The specialty beers were by far some of the most interesting in San Diego, bar none.

The collaborations they have done with Matcha Cafe Maiko are super interesting and unlike anything you will find anywhere else. It's worth your time to stop by and try some. They have an entire wall of barrel aged things, and I can't wait to see what comes out next. Its also great that the have a Mexican Amber Lager!

The atmosphere of this brewery is great. Very welcoming and lots of comfortable seating. There is tons of seating inside, at the bar, and in their outdoor beer garden area. Enought tables to accommodate a large party as well. Every time I have been here, there was food of some kind. One time, it was a food truck, and another time it was BBQ.

The parking lot is huge, there is tons of parking. The brewery is wheel chair accessible and there is wheelchair accessible parking right up front.

The staff has been very helpful every time. Everything else is well maintained and clean. There is a large fridge of pre canned beer to take with you, and the prices are extremely reasonable.

Dog friendly too!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDz44uYwgE&fid=0x0:0xb4d51e1bbfcc493c"],"When":"2024-6-12"},{"Name":"Paul Koenig","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMPv9ooVaWnPjiT0ttrgy6z2sPA3vk0lUprDCyrsTHdQjEjJnu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was very pleasantly surprised, this place has the potential to become a go-to place for me. I have no firsthand knowledge of the employees coming in macha flavor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"paterjo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLJ0wyanuvIQz5YqlbKHwwdVRyY7t1xATayh4dPtuqOJgrDi4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fun brewery in Miramar, on Production Ave just to the north of Miramar Road. Large warehouse type building with large beer vats, barrels, tables, and an outdoor "garden" patio. They have a great variety of beers/lagers/ales/cider and sodas. They don't serve food but they have a revolving set of food trucks so there is usually good food to go with the beer. Friendly staff and fun place to hang out with friends. It's not just their awesome logo, that feels like you're onset of the movie 300, or the open space allowing you to get up close to their equipment... it's the fact that they are San Diego's first and only FDA approved organic beer.

I truly didn't know it was a thing, but after chatting with the staff, I soon discovered all their vendors, partners and even cleaning supplies are carefully selected and certified organic. Better yet, they are back open for business at their Brewery!

The founder is a veteran and the brand gives back to various nonprofit causes. Pop in and learn what Protector Beer is all about. Taste their award winning Citra DIPA or my personal favorite the Juice! Word is they're coming to a Costco near you😉. Psssttt I think that's a secret... don't tell anyone.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDyttqVSA&fid=0x0:0x1c844b22722d309e"],"When":"2021-3-6"},{"Name":"Ryan Mouat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3aBzG58FU93hL0wFLcFpLY0EhaowMddQAOoGk6MNaEVnvOC1e=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot emphasize how great this brewery is. Their ube cookies are out of this world—perfectly soft, rich, and full of that delicious ube flavor that’s hard to find done right. What I love most is their consistency; every single week, the cookies taste just as amazing as the last batch. You can tell they put true care into their baking.

The presentation is beautiful, the flavors are unique, and the quality is always top-notch. If you haven’t tried Caked yet, you’re seriously missing out—these cookies are the kind of treat you’ll crave long after the market is over. A true gem in North Park!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sara Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUndkeSFs3uUEvNVkTKJgByAqjFsscViwdoybUzLDgEXf9nboM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I passed by their booth at the Little Italy Farmers market and ogled their display of cookies and brownies. I ultimately just got the pandan mochi cookie and the slutty brownie.

Pandan cookie: The pandan flavor is great and really came through! But the texture wasn't for me, it felt really powdery in my mouth, like there was too much flour and it wasn't baked through.

Slutty brownie: I was really looking forward to enjoying this, but it was awful. The brownie had a rich chocolatey flavor, but that was pretty much the only good thing. The brownie itself was really dry around the edges. I expected the cookie layer to be a cookie texture, but it was more like a cake, and it was so so dry. The oreo layer was also hard and not pleasant to bite into. It's a cool idea, but it was honestly difficult to eat. I feel like I had to soak it in milk for it to be enjoyable. Their stuff looked so appetizing, but I think this might be my one and only time getting them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI7aS8FA&fid=0x0:0x574cfa57e47adf93"],"When":"2025-4-4"},{"Name":"Grissel Ortiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3Q6BkQNGBUsOb_TDK_hZuHKBuQRrbM4QVQZUqysOU1MHFBcpo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Purchased 2 brownies & 2 cookies for the first time at the Lemon Festival this weekend. The Toffee Hazelnut cookie is good. But the pistachio is to die for.  The turtle brownie was not so great but it was moist.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZVNab51N6ApuMKllh_8YD&fid=0x0:0x574cfa57e47adf93"],"When":"2025-8-2"},{"Name":"Alex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAzfQFrHK7_c45o3iwIMJOOjM2FiA1NscinZI2dfAVWqUET67H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I bought the Watermelon Chocolate Chip cookie and the Smores cookie. The smores was good but the watermelon Chocolate Chip was DELICIOUS!!!! Wow I wish I had bought more of the Watermelon cookie. The cookies are $4 each. There are no restrooms here so if you need to go, you'll have to go to the coffee shop next door. There are also only 2 individual seats inside here (see photos), but you have more seating next door at the coffee shop (if you go there to buy something also), or just taking your cookies to go. Definitely give that watermelon cookie a try!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jose Vazques","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIB02GV-iPWO3BlcTdZhBzDaoi64pqsE0D6hrYPObDpFgcPjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been here a couple of times now. I can truly say the food is great. The egg rolls are nicely fried and have a great umami flavor. The chicken wings are fried to perfection and well salted. The sweet bbq pork is full of flavor and has a really nice char to it. The quality of the food is consistent even when packed for lunch. If you come by though make sure to bring cash as they do not take card.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDHjjkzmNPTMfsCIqJZWAi&fid=0x0:0x347d460439cebf6a"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Jason Roy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0-XTmMyH5mr4LPSbKUiN8Um7GtxkqYGGhekK-GRbb6pwgSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food is outstanding. Got the number one combination and it was perfect. Chicken wings and BBQ pork are some of the best I've had in San Diego. Less than 20 bucks for a combination, that'll feed me twice and a large drink. Guy at the counter was super nice. Took less than 3 minutes to get my food. Perfect spot when you need a quick bite. I'll be back anytime. I'm working in the area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Cash only! Luckily I had cash on me that day.

I wanted shrimp lomein for lunch so I googled it when I was in the area. What I got was not shrimp lomein (lunch combo #12).
It was quite bland shrimp stir fry with celery and bean sprouts over fried wonton skins. The chow mein and fried rice were plain too.

The lunch was cheap and I think maybe that's why it has all these great reviews. Food was not good.
A lot of people were ordering the #1 combo with the char sui (bbq pork) so maybe I should have ordered that instead.

The two older Asian ladies working there were nice and friendly to me. They were quick getting everyone's orders ready and the customers all seemed happy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDg2YKRXw&fid=0x0:0x347d460439cebf6a"],"When":"2025-2-25"},{"Name":"Joey G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzVEvmFT8ioXMBCkj1CKVMzkRvfg2AO9347Pb82YF5-D0vRCs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A small Chinese fast food in Miramar next to McDonalds, where I have been coming here for 2 decades. Don't make the facade of the place fool you. Their food is cooked fresh (cook to order) and it's very delicious. My favorite dish is their number 2, chicken chow mein with noodles and fried chicken.
It's cook fresh, fast service and delicious.
Expect a busy crowd on lunchtime, but it's worth the wait.
Parking is limited.
Handicap parking is available.
Friendly smile.

Good eats.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ15OLfw&fid=0x0:0x347d460439cebf6a"],"When":"2023-7-6"},{"Name":"Zhengran Shang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXN-LcxQ3KR4FnV0IFEgLCdLd_tNgaKefDSOQfAoXN1-Bbwkn0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s like kinda improved version of Panda Express. $10.75 pretax for any combination with more than 10 choices. These two dishes are freshly stir-fried, rather than prepared and left there to keep warm. Chow mein and fried rice are much more delicious than Panda","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID9xbHibg&fid=0x0:0x347d460439cebf6a"],"When":"2024-3-19"},{"Name":"Sana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxxqr7-QBgkaS-tQPuy41_aIdLAW6l9ojxxPR9WYwjOyNDioQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I tried the combo #1 and was excited to try the BBQ pork, but overall the food was okay. The BBQ pork and chicken wings were a bit dry. Maybe it was because I got there 20 mins before closing, but I had higher hopes for the food.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christina Decker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItljUown5dP9giqJZlK8Hy1-KlicZ3sfXylx-qhxyOLw_9xw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered #4 to go and unfortunately I was not looking when the lady was putting the food in my to go box. When I got back to work and opened there was no pork. The #4 supposed to have roast pork, egg roll, lo mei. And fried rice. Not a good experience specially that I drive 15 mins to get it and I am not driving back to get my pork so basically I wasted $13 for no meat food!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDgvaLQCw&fid=0x0:0x347d460439cebf6a"],"When":"2025-2-26"},{"Name":"Steph Marco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXR5DOmC3rZ84_wiw06deNUuoebFywRbATidqSoTFnVMX7yCGgm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"stopped by for lunch..bbq pork fried rice, chicken wings, and bbq pork were pretty good. the egg foo young was bland and starchy and egg roll was plain, so won’t be getting those again. will def try the others as the price is right at this spot. CASH only — so be ready. fast service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICW-t2bCw&fid=0x0:0x347d460439cebf6a"],"When":"2022-2-24"}]

[{"Name":"Pelumi Olaleye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAqvqbW7WKYiCmCATjEGasbI16L9vL9cy4v63esTFD-I-6jgm_2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First time visiting. I stopped by around midday, about 1 PM, and decided to try their taro smoothie with boba. Their customer service was wonderful and for this reason alone urges me to return to try something else. Unfortunately, the taro smoothie was just okay—nothing bad, but nothing that really stood out either. I’ve had taro boba drinks before that were more flavorful and unique, and this one felt a bit plain in comparison.

I may not personally return for taro boba but I may return to try the açaí bowls and I’ll definitely recommend this spot to anyone who enjoys more mellow boba drinks or wants to check it out for themselves.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD24NfHwc33SvmZ2WeadJVI&fid=0x0:0x6bb6429bd1967453"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Sachi R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXomvXBJX_V7eck_K5_zgx4YJl_BJ1WAxrwAUBgkDsJR9Zt54U4xA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"got mango tea and creme brulee.

I ordered on uber, but apparently they don’t do uber anymore. I went to pickup and they honored the order right away which was nice - customer service is great.

Boba is soft and pillowy😛","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqLzKLpe9znxltjEunlzfc&fid=0x0:0x6bb6429bd1967453"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Alyssa McCord","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5xuQUiaG6r3W0PGkEkDVEOL60zi7njM_yiAAW51DKvgpaRa6tYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Persian food in the same lot and stopped here for boba and Vietnamese coffee! The staff was amazing, friendly, and worked quickly and efficiently.

We ordered Vietnamese coffees, slush and milk teas. ALL of them were amazing!

The decor was cute, music playing not too loud.

It was quite busy and our five drinks didn’t take too long.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9SbNmn2pqKqOu5RrZoK0P&fid=0x0:0x6bb6429bd1967453"],"When":"2025-6-13"},{"Name":"Kristi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2kf9Wl9pse9p-tYpvPCxHXuQ9rKkM94vzZA5LMqv1d8rvbD8r=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was in the area and looked for a Boba shop because yummy drinks are my thing. I'm not a soda person unless it's handcrafted.

Boba Love absolutely met my expectations. I got a brown sugar Boba. The owners are personable and more than accommodating. The Boba itself is out of this world. So soft and yummy. Brown sugar was so so good. When I'm in the area I'll definitely be back. Thanks!

Alara Electrology","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kirstin Richert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUE4eRvzNt7w6iroSeSML_8wKI-yCjDbGEvK_V2bMYQnYqQ9Xjj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is such a fun spot! Great prices and delicious treats! A fun afternoon with my son playing Jenga, taking fun selfies and drinking delicious Boba. I had a pineapple Fruit tea with crystal Boba and my boy had a Mango Milk tea. The Bubble Waffle Cookie monster gelato bowl was awesome! We are excited to visit here more often 💜","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw2fWaeA&fid=0x0:0x6bb6429bd1967453"],"When":"2025-3-26"},{"Name":"Allan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIc1Vbh4PrHA8NBNkaejHWzTNt6VqhbF7lfYD2_zb9etLPQpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great ambiance. Colorful place. Good drinks. We ordered Taro smoothies with boba & it’s really good. I’ll recommend everyone to check it out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDztNOJQQ&fid=0x0:0x6bb6429bd1967453"],"When":"2024-6-8"},{"Name":"Joy Angeles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVc-iY8IdogNpqZcUdEmeoM-PYJajMYEtkqgQDJTeU2JyU9ihLnjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent customer service, relaxed and good energy atmosphere.  My bubble waffle fruity pitaya is so good.  If you work at home check them out and spend some time while enjoying Boba love.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_kvLmEw&fid=0x0:0x6bb6429bd1967453"],"When":"2025-1-23"},{"Name":"Anne Quirino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJk-8auyhi6jrDgtPiluUWOf5VbOpTzwW298pQ-D_cvrsy9pw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They make their Bobas out of love! They got the firmness and taste of the boba pearls, just the way I love it! The service is amazing as well! Had a good experience! Definitely recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCSY-2W_QTjPjRTFwWjxRg&fid=0x0:0x6bb6429bd1967453"],"When":"2025-6-23"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Josh Baltazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGwLc0426uUtyS_hszBwD6DJIMBgO3FQ0DNqDkJ5w2kX3vUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"11:50 am.  We signed up for a tour and tasting, on a Saturday at noon. We were a party of 4 and the only ones on the tour. So it started whenever we were ready. Our tour guide was Zion, amazing energy and very well knowledgeable! One of the better tour guides we've had. He also went down to the details when we asked but he did a good job of keeping it at an understandable level for everyone in our party. We had 3 tastings which was the Cutwater Agave Flight (Cutwater Tequila Reposado, Cutwater Tequila Paloma, Cutwater Mango Margarita), Aloha Flight (Cutwater White Rum, Cutwater Bali Hai Tiki Dark Rum, Cutwater Rum Mojito with Lime & Mint, Cutwater Tiki Rum Hurricane) and From the Barrel Flight (Cutwater 11 Year Bourbon, Cutwater Tequila Extra Anejo, Cutwater Blackheart's Cask Strength Rum, Cutwater Devil's Share American Whiskey). It was nice to give all those different types of hard alcohol and mixed drinks a taste. We also decided to have lunch there. We ordered the Braised Pork Chile Verde Loaded Fries (braised pork, chile verde sauce, oaxaca monterrey jack cheese), Beet Quinoa Salad (roasted beets, kale, spinach, ricotta salata, carots, quinoa, sunflower seeds, Cutwater Lemon Drop miso dressing) and Philly Pie Flatbread (garlic, white sauce, fontina mozzerlla cheese mix, sliced beef, mixed peppers, grilled onions, parmesan). For drinks we got 1 Spicy Michelada and 1 Mild Michelada.  Amazing food, nice micheladas and great service!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCqDGoahst4qJX6iQ8KeqN&fid=0x0:0x6f5a50117b3bfecc"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"AŃT ALC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvP_pXJIkt_2D1Gs18oyHZPZ1OF0KJstX-I-xO8LQ1LitFvexW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently checked out the Cutwater Tasting Room with no expectations, and it ended up being everything I didn’t know I needed! From the drinks to the food to the music, the whole atmosphere was on point. I tried their Halloween flight special, and every drink was delicious, strong but so smooth you won’t even realize it right away.

The food was just as impressive. The chicken Caesar sandwich and Philly flatbread were amazing, and the tater tots and charcuterie board were a hit. I recommend making a reservation since there was a bit of a wait, but we found seats in the bar area and still had a great experience.

The vibe is casual, and the playlist was perfect, early 2000s hip-hop and R&B while I was there. Overall, such a fun spot. I’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAuGIKj5PCDSz9K7yhz20ET&fid=0x0:0x6f5a50117b3bfecc"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Timothy Cheung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgCe7G2w3CGxMkVCs71zfEyEQ-S9S1zMygya-9Gtr2Ol2WK-GJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Cutwater Tasting Room in San Diego has a great vibe and a really cool aesthetic—modern, relaxed, and exactly what you’d expect from the brand. The bartenders were friendly, knowledgeable, and made the experience fun. It’s awesome that you get to try their R&D canned cocktails and flavors you can’t always find elsewhere. Food was decent and paired well with the drinks, and I really appreciated that they also offer mocktails. Overall, it’s a cool space with good energy, especially for any Cutwater fan. Didn’t get a chance to do the distillery tour yet, but definitely planning to come back for it and we’ve been here at least 4 times already!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7Y_E4Qpgd0d0U_OwfLu5Z&fid=0x0:0x6f5a50117b3bfecc"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Lyric Mariah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVutbOdJgdqnZYXiID0B4w_Ihx9ugs3BjOgsDv99U2B1-T7Zqws=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I visited Cutwater yesterday and left with very mixed feelings. The food was excellent—especially the salad and pizza—and the ambiance was beautiful. The drinks were also very well made. Based on the food and atmosphere alone, this is a place I would love to return to.

However, my experience with our waiter at the bar was disappointing and uncomfortable. We were seated for about 10 minutes before being acknowledged, and once service began, I felt rushed rather than welcomed. What stood out most was being repeatedly asked to put a card on file while I was visibly sitting at the bar. Ultimately, I felt pressured to pay early simply to avoid further discomfort. I did not observe other patrons being asked for a card on file in the same way.

As a Black guest, the interaction left me feeling singled out, and while I cannot say definitively what the intent was, the experience felt racially biased. It was disheartening because everything else about the restaurant was genuinely enjoyable.

I hope management takes this feedback seriously. Great food and atmosphere deserve equally respectful and equitable service for all guests","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOCJVWb4TRRfqrW0dmCm3M&fid=0x0:0x6f5a50117b3bfecc"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Valerie P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGmm3EhfmIKWnPPK6kMj1xu6HKdz8fPkylkxSIpuVWVVUIs0i8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We visited Cutwater Spirits on December 23, 2025- the last day of their Winter Lodge (holiday decor), and I loved how true the in-person experience was to their social media--what you see online is exactly what you get. Traditi

They had a great selection of holiday drinks and daily specials. We sat at the bar and had a great time chatting with Kaley, our bartender--friendly and attentive. The crispy green beans had a nice light crunch, and the Devil's Share burger was the perfect size, with perfectly crispy fries.

The maple bacon flatbread with balsamic glaze didn't quite hit for us--something felt like it was missing--but everything else was solid. Be sure to check out the retail area with Cutwater drinks and apparel for purchase.

Festive, fun, and worth the visit--especially during the holidays.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZvUm_Ib2QLY9AnGKOmZdz&fid=0x0:0x6f5a50117b3bfecc"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Tabitha Carey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWMmuoPC9lFmDmAXkuKWL32Vf9h9OD8SL8Y5mMf04vNo7Gz-7BHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We found these drinks at the grocery store first, and fell in love. Little did we know that they had a tasting room in the area, so of course we had to go! Their custom made drinks are delicious, and the canned drinks are really good too. Very friendly staff, and decent food options. We want to go back for the tour to get the full experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDf1q9wl0EPDe-up5AFed8H&fid=0x0:0x6f5a50117b3bfecc"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A group of us went here for their Winter Lodge themed dinner. It was a little disappointing the amount of decorations. It was mainly at the bar area and the front of distillery. We were seated outside in the back corner of their patio where there was no decorations at all. Felt like we were just there on a normal day.

Lucky for us, were were there when they still had their happy hour going! We ordered the beautifullt presented mini martini trio amongst other food items off the happy hour menu. They had a good selection.
We liked their short ribs plate, loaded fries, cheese dip, and the flatbread.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDydJkrQRHXMfOQN9Q2elzl&fid=0x0:0x6f5a50117b3bfecc"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Linnie B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEFm_YoEZ3gFesnyRD5SLxt5XzjcsQY-2Af2VmQjv98xtk0JluOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Omg !! I came all the way from Chicago to visit this place. I must say I was highly impressed with the food and service.  Abby you rock!! Zion you're awesome  you do wonderful tours. My heart definitely goes out to Kate/ Katie our waitress. She's such a kind spirit and very friendly.  Anyone would be blessed to have her as a waitress.  Please check them out you won't regret it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtpO_2INx_67iorbn-khxQ&fid=0x0:0x6f5a50117b3bfecc"],"When":"2025-10-27"}]

[{"Name":"Chris Portillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbIWDpxIGfH-g5KoFBzTK6gP4GfpqYxpk9tILh5VcWxr7F6Cd8Hw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dining at Lucrezia was an absolute delight, thanks to the exceptional service provided by Jacob and Manuel. From the moment we arrived, they made us feel welcomed and cared for, striking the perfect balance of professionalism and warmth.

✨ Service
- Jacob and Manuel were attentive without being intrusive.
- Every detail was handled with care, from recommendations to timing of courses.
- Their genuine hospitality elevated the entire experience.

🍴 Food Highlights
- Tomahawk Steak: Cooked to perfection—juicy, flavorful, and beautifully presented.
- Lychee Martini: Refreshing and elegant, the perfect complement to the meal.
- Brussels Sprouts: Crispy, savory, and addictive—an unexpected star of the evening.
- Fresh Bread: Warm, fragrant, and a comforting start to the meal.

🌊 Atmosphere
- The setting in La Jolla adds to the charm, with a refined yet relaxed ambiance that makes every occasion feel special.

⭐ Overall
Jacob and Manuel turned a great dinner into a memorable experience. Their outstanding service, paired with Lucrezia’s incredible food, makes this restaurant a must-visit in La Jolla.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCn0jrH2x2a0TsZae41GxkD&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Yesenia Nunez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFrAjgwFZFYmLPumsnXmswLsRbXwflKTqB8mQ54fsBYlAH4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was our first time coming to this restaurant, our server Diana was amazing! She kept coming back making sure we were good. Def coming back here! A pianist was playing, lovely atmosphere and everyone was so nice!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOiL-WaoLwCG2SKZSo8Wbj&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"HG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLVA7gbpgwrG_NN1NFZUJ7JZ4tVBJjH-ye5ejmQV8y4Z3W91A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommended for happy hour!HH martinis for 12-14 dollars, strong pour and well made. We tried the tomatini (interesting and not as weird as it sounds lol), como cosmo, and the old fashioned. Fries were solid. They gave some complimentary cheese and olives. The service was a bit slow, which is to be expected for handcrafted cocktails (but something to be aware of if you’re on a time crunch). The restaurant itself is beautiful and cozy too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAodP8Qy6keMt3nUEOSoePx&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Ben Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWb85qHkcnY7lPomPXL0NLZTCSyLXQYv5Gwfz7Xq6fvg6bhA_E8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great pizza, great drinks. The service was kind and attentive. Lovely atmosphere, too. I'd definitely love to come back sometime.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDHalRyzoI45ruzOKEn0D5z&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Robert Tendick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvbl75V1KMHdagj7cAMhGVAR5UsIkn550iVcjH7uwNwxb_SxFc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great meal here today for the first time. Service was on point. Food was great. We ordered the special, which was fresh made fettuccine with cacio e pepe sauce and lobster. Simply perfect. Serving size was plenty but my mouth wanted so much more. We started with a tall pour of barrolo which was so tasty; medium bodied with a light black pepper on the finish. Italian chopped salad was as good as you’d expect from a top tier Italian restaurant. The octopus salad was probably my favorite dish of the meal. Octopus was super tender and the green beans and salad that accompanied it was fantastic. Additionally, we ordered the lamb chops which were grilled perfectly and the heirloom tomatoes on the side were incredibly tasty, even though it’s January. Was it an expensive meal? Of course, but it’s UTC and you know what you’re signing up for. 5-star meal in a lovely atmosphere","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matt Hutton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTUTXTVLVoVIAW8YlP82CesNESGoMJ_bmXd4Fyzzrm-7jDsTIP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an outstanding dinner at Lucrezia La Jolla. From the oysters and Nostra Caprese to the grilled lamb chops, every dish was both beautiful and flavorful. Our server, Emmanuel, was attentive and fun, and manager Ramon made the evening feel personal. We ended with espresso martinis and heavenly tiramisu—the perfect finish to a perfect night. We’ll definitely be back. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDlF5I7cDZPn3I1lm4aLQYi&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"Celine Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlx8W4S7dPbQCC_JlxY9Z3KI3pcNYqWZehqS_e3Dp-s9oBmnEddg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tonight’s dinner was absolutely stunning! The lamb chops were tender, the filet mignon was juicy, and the spicy olives with cherry tomatoes made for a flavorful starter. Even the kids finished their pizza to the last bite! We ended with the perfect scoop of ice cream. Highly recommend this place!

It was my little baby second birthday today, and surprisingly, there were so many other birthday celebrations too! The restaurant even brought out a sweet little dessert with a candle—such a thoughtful touch. The atmosphere was so warm and joyful that even strangers joined in to say, “Happy Birthday!”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZDEXhQUQ0ijr8oO-iqLyU&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Alex Henningsen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxMrE1Y6s7RMJM5EwJysu1N-tbpgGF248emvGCFvg2PfhIofC02g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Spent $288 here on Saturday. Had drinks, oysters, and pasta. It’s unfortunate that the food is only 3/5! It’s a beautiful restaurant but there are some much better Italian places in little Italy. Try Bencotto or  Monzu","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCvQy7GABQergD1Khlj-cHT&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2026-1-26"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Shane Mueller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmqRQjd48B70vmxj9AiLtwxA_TaAuCgOjRRkpYhTmdnoCKz8c=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Honestly a very beautiful restaurant with nice music playing through the place. I had the Lamb Saag and it was absolutely delicious. The garlic naan and paneer man were also great. The rice was fluffy as well.

Portion sizes are worth the price. I ate my fill and still have enough for possibly two meals with what I ordered. I would totally recommend this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX9PGG9QE&fid=0x0:0x46f27ef4b6e04369"],"When":"2024-10-24"},{"Name":"alan stanly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnci8BWIvizivrmBYNitqCgRYRprN0fg-xRoeAFnnvhdhCRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We attended a wedding reception here.  The place is very nicely decorated in the style of India.  The banquet hall had nice arches, pipe and drape, uplit coffered ceilings , built in marble stage,  QSC 12 inch speakers mounted in the 4 corners, moving overhead party lights, 4 chandeliers, a LED mirrored dance floor , tile floors, and only small 1 pillar in the dining area.  The place was clean and smelled nice.  The appetizer buffet wland main course were tasty Indian food.  There is a bar and a DJ station.   The kitchen is adjacent to the ballroom.  Servers were attentive, efficient and well dressed.  Overall, it was very nice and elevated. Would definitely recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3y7__nQE&fid=0x0:0x46f27ef4b6e04369"],"When":"2024-11-9"},{"Name":"Daniel Roizen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDxFALm7yiSlSaQiQZlg_UvDPHS8TY_RN4uk4KmpnsxkCeGw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This place sucks. Horrible food, teeny little portions, waiters with attitude. Tried the one in downtown, even worse. Figured I'd give it a second chance over here, hoping it'd be better in an area with more Indian population, but nope it was just as bad. Burnt Naan, watery Tikka massala, Bryani has no real taste. Wow so bad. Literally never returning. My mango lassi for $5 wasn't much larger than a shot glass. Awful experience and food for a high price. AVOID!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZn5zA2gE&fid=0x0:0x46f27ef4b6e04369"],"When":"2023-9-21"},{"Name":"Dominika Łuszcz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVD6gefzhao3CuzzyGdn1Tou38SkKQeiOlOulwX2H--a2Ndg2z0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Masala fries were literally french fries with some seasoning, no sauce. Definitely not worth $10. We ordered two entires and only got one rice. There was some kind of private event going on so the only seats were outside. Food was decent but definitely overpriced. Not going there again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjwMPqnwE&fid=0x0:0x46f27ef4b6e04369"],"When":"2024-4-28"},{"Name":"Daniel B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULFpTdP-L33aL-pkqH1hOUQl5H12fw7C2EaFAJgsmirAoUklyz=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gopi our waiter, is always so kind and helpful. He makes suggestions when we ask, he is polite kind and patient. He keeps an eye out and check in often. The food is always good... Love the place and the people!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brooke Halle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaKwsXEoKcRpzay4HF_YqJjmOWMPzrN9LhUciUyJ_U9grjMGJ0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Their happy hour meals/prices intrigued me, decided to give it a try. Average experience overall. I arrived at 5:20, there was a banquet going on, but no one in the actual restaurant section. I was seated near the doors to the banquet & eventually another couple arrived. It was just the 2 tables for happy hour dinner between 5:30-6:30pm last Friday.

The servers were attentive, as long as I called their attention. I waited 40ish mins for my tikka masala happy hour platter (which included tikka masala, rice, a samosa & naan). Something happened when I placed my order, it was rung up as a full meal and not the platter. The servers quickly fixed this issue & brought out everything that was supposed to come. In my opinion, the tikka masala was lacking the punch of flavor you would expect with a curry dish. Samosa was delicious alongside the sauces. Naan was fluffy with a bit of crisp on the bottom.

There was a bit of confusion about my bill. It was obvious that several different servers had rung my meal up and helped throughout my time there… unfortunately, this resulted in an inaccurate total $$. I addressed the issue and it was eventually fixed, but definitely something of concern, considering I was one of two tables in the entire restaurant & if I hadn’t pointed it out they wouldn’t have known.

I would consider coming back here for happy hour drinks, but unsure if it would be worth it to pay for an entire meal. The empty restaurant at happy hour took me by surprise, especially since it was a Friday. Frankly, there are better Indian restaurant options within close vicinity for this place to be lacking in the flavor and service department.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJv_qUbw&fid=0x0:0x46f27ef4b6e04369"],"When":"2023-7-25"},{"Name":"Fena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWcAXUYsI8moiitL89jHGFbU59l4FpdeE2K2xq-_10CKYmCwOo0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place serves best chicken tandoori, the burnt Smokey flavor was just what we hope for when we order a tandoori, must try. We also ordered vegetable spring roll which is similar to Panda Express and not authentic Indo Chinese spring roll which we get in India. We ordered shrimp biryani, it was really good and had wok flavor, more like a pilaf, but really tasty. Service was good. Must try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICehOmlXw&fid=0x0:0x46f27ef4b6e04369"],"When":"2022-9-6"},{"Name":"M. Spencer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9Fd-eIh0M-mBuFLQLKY2MBSbqgtDzRZzIQD_Yuf-cW03Vug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible food and service.

We had the Karahi Chicken and the Chana Masala (fixed plates) it came with Naan and 1 samosa, with a medium plus heat

It was outstanding, perfect balance with the heat and flavors, Steve was such a nice server, attentive, quick and he even brought us desert on the house (sort of like a Mango creamy mouse) and it was super good.

I like how they have adapted with the situation and the patio seating, they are also planning to have umbrellas and other add ons.

[{"Name":"Ly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWV9CmeSM-OM-VsV-AxUkJ8F_kDGTwdtlIhiIsyMJJuiUnp7Nt3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Tried the Samosa Chaat at Rasraj (San Diego) and left disappointed. It’s $8.90 for one samosa (about $2 on their menu), around 20 chickpeas, and a bunch of onions and cilantro — basically $7 for garnish and a few chickpeas. The flavor profile also seemed off — not the balanced, tangy chaat I expected. I know things are expensive, but this is just too much. Really miss Surati Farsan — their chaat had flavor, freshness, and value.  Pictures are what you’d get.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD2mMJlMFyRo83Tqqm9j4aK&fid=0x0:0x86577186db0efc26"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Abhay Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4eIQlke1x6Vjt5Jhz4Cs1bVremH1M_CpX51iTvjxZPyZdbYTpAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"## Rasraj San Diego Review
*Rating: 2/5*

I recently had a disappointing experience at Rasraj San Diego, despite the food being well-presented and served in good quantities. Unfortunately, the quality of the food was subpar, which led to my entire family falling ill after dining there.

*Food Quality Issues*

We tried a variety of dishes, including dosa, Manchurian, golgappe, and vada pav. While the taste was decent, the quality of the ingredients seemed compromised. Friends later informed us that Rasraj has been known to use stale items and chutneys in their dishes, which likely contributed to our food poisoning.

*Cleanliness and Food Safety*

It's concerning to hear about such practices, especially in a restaurant. Cleanliness and food safety should be top priorities, and Rasraj seems to be falling short in this regard.

*Service and Ambiance*

On a positive note, some reviewers have mentioned that the service at Rasraj can be quick and the staff friendly. However, this wasn't enough to redeem our experience.

*Comparison to Other Reviews*

Interestingly, other customers have had vastly different experiences at Rasraj. Some have praised the restaurant's catering services, citing delicious food and excellent service. Others have mentioned that the food is hit-or-miss, depending on the dish and flavor preferences.

*Recommendation*

Unless Rasraj takes steps to address their food quality and safety issues, I would caution against dining there. There are likely better options in San Diego that prioritize customer health and satisfaction.

*Key Takeaways*

- *Food Quality:* 1/5 (due to stale ingredients and food safety concerns)
- *Taste and Presentation:* 3/5 (food was well-presented, but taste was compromised by quality issues)
- *Service:* 3/5 (some reviewers have praised the service, but it wasn't notable in our experience)
- *Overall Experience:* 2/5 (food quality issues and safety concerns outweigh other aspects) ¹ ²","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCUXn3DHN0SpKGni0GPBNGZ&fid=0x0:0x86577186db0efc26"],"When":"2025-6-30"},{"Name":"Angampally Hari Adithya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_FU3FNdiqOuUMKfBlOOYkmxZT2ovGMD4uZ_gsHQFGGspCey0q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Extremely Unsafe Food – A Serious Health Hazard

I bought rasmalai from this restaurant today, and to my absolute horror, it was completely spoiled. A few of our guests — including children — ate it before we realized, and they suffered from vomiting and diarrhea soon after.

How can a restaurant be this negligent with customer health and basic food safety? This is not just bad service — this is dangerous and irresponsible. The owners should be ashamed for putting people, especially children, at risk just to make a few extra dollars.

To make things worse, I noticed several previous reviews warning about the poor quality of their sweets — something I sadly missed before purchasing.

To anyone considering this place: Please do not make the same mistake. Your and your family’s health is not worth the risk.

And to the owners: How do you sleep at night knowing the money you earn comes at the cost of making people sick? Absolutely shameful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQgHjeFXkHKCmD-xHi4Efw&fid=0x0:0x86577186db0efc26"],"When":"2025-7-4"},{"Name":"Rohini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXD0UbYSydpBJKEqQFjh7ZrhOPU3l_3qP-bUu9HJTFqGQ2A9Xmneg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Our go to place if we are in the mood for Indian food and want to grab a quick bite on days we happen to be at Miramar Cash and Carry. You can’t go wrong with their Fried rice, Garlic naan and  Hakka Noodles! Our favorite order also includes their Paper Dosa and with our recent visit, they serve chutneys which taste like home made - onion and tomato chutney.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnpZ6PCw&fid=0x0:0x86577186db0efc26"],"When":"2024-9-28"},{"Name":"Gurpreet Sidhu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5U4W9jVVAbATai2jxpEu62OxkwxfB6r02UpJqN4tYjw9lrw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ordered dahi puri. Basically diluted yogurt and canned quality dumplings 2 of those. Some salt and red chili. For $10 could have had a meal. Sad disappointing and a rip-off 🥺","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbtB5TewPsXRuKZlXFWGiJ&fid=0x0:0x86577186db0efc26"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Anna Belani-Ellis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIcLpO8itpuQRodkPfUUVmRaBWjlSs9FdTIQgtGr5_ZTjYxma_ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"To me a good Indian restaurant has the basics right with it's chutneys and sauces. We tested this with a basic papdi chaat, idli vada and dosa and it was disappointing. The papdi was not fresh, the chutneys were sloppily thrown on top, no real "chaat oomph", the vada was definitely reheated not fresh. I also think being short staffed and overworked which we overheard and seen in other reviews, could result in sloppy, average quality service. Overall this place does have potential and can deliver so much better. All the best.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC2p6jwiAE&fid=0x0:0x86577186db0efc26"],"When":"2022-4-29"},{"Name":"Evelyn Antezana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwFU03dQRXbq0rgiMEztZHnRTM65p7gKyDdwdFwhdS_WMakz0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So, you order, pay and seat wherever you want.
Cool place with authentic food!
Husband said “I wouldn’t mind eating vegetarian if all the food tasted like this. We’re definitely coming back”
I don’t usually like spicy food, but the chole bhatura I ordered was just great. (They have VEGAN Options!)
The dal my husband ate was flavorful and very well seasoned.
We loved the place!

Staff was friendly and kind.

We highly recommend it 👌🏽💚","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICMuOnCGQ&fid=0x0:0x86577186db0efc26"],"When":"2019-10-19"},{"Name":"Orthja E.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXrDGNpEID10w-yUfpSB2i_IgkJETk76kbTqGD7ycb3Pb_7MqzFA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"White girl review coming in!
My coworker, who is from India, ordered a bunch of different things for us.

It was not too spicy overall 😉","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdxsaI9gE&fid=0x0:0x86577186db0efc26"],"When":"2024-2-14"}]

The dosa was not hot tho — room temperature. Overall presentation was appetizing.  The portion size was great and extra sambar /chutneys were available.  Service was quick.  Appreciated the extra gourd chutney which was brought out for me to take with my leftovers. Atmosphere / appearance of restaurant is okay — could use an update. Definitely recommended — get the Thali ! Great value.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbe-DssOnqAq0QoakKb8Z-\u0026fid=0x0:0x1723d4fb8ef1215c"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"Siddartha Donthula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMSCro94SEWShYUKiGH9wXGy6y3QkuI05wDa8FXZvWQQt8hPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is an all vegetarian restaurant that offers excellent tiffin choices such as Idli, Vada, pongal, Dosa (so many varieties), South Indian Thali etc. During today's visit,  we tried Chole Bhature for the first time and it was awesome. The chole had a nice onion flavor and bhature was super soft! We also ordered plain Dosa and Mysore masala dosa, they also have a self seve chutney (onion and garlic free) and sambar station that goes well with the dosa.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDkgST0ISqLTd-umAHXGjGe\u0026fid=0x0:0x1723d4fb8ef1215c"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Venkat Ramesh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJY4QXaKqC79gRW6sEIBmu8TcWftRQ9NhOZ4GQgzAzhz5MrryIB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience! We went out as a family and most of us had the South Indian Thali. I had the paneer spinach dosa- it was nice. Only wish it had little more paneer and spinach and little less dosa- I hadn’t informed at the time of ordering for my preference. So that was okay.\n\nThe filter coffee was nice and strong.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDW1qeP2Sgqz0iyA8AM--wI\u0026fid=0x0:0x1723d4fb8ef1215c"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Mitsu Chavda Patel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWLwdIB_LkfHO1gMfbTK8GyNy5U9KphpfqkOutg0sWuFIUHZM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Try Pizza Dosa.. it is super tasty.. and filled with so many veggies. I am not a big fan of potatoes and hence I prefer other veggie dosas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5el1UHfpGXHxGVib7YhXZ\u0026fid=0x0:0x1723d4fb8ef1215c"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"Dax Patel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUp52iF9Y9ch_FZdCY1LpwyvyLmSR1udLXIC_bSEZkmJXT9EaPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I visited this restaurant recently and ordered the tomato onion uttapam. Unfortunately, it was overcooked and the taste was very disappointing. The quality of the dish did not meet my expectations at all. I had looked forward to enjoying the food, but the experience was unpleasant. Based on this visit, I would not recommend the uttapam here. I hope the restaurant works on improving the preparation and taste of their dishes in the future.”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBY9uCh1F679YM9ggLX915V\u0026fid=0x0:0x1723d4fb8ef1215c"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Z T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPtyX4CcrFFYhzzevmG8ADKNvEw0XMCHKdRyYOkCYWjPkFr-4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We visited for Dinner Mid week and they had low crowd in the house but decent pickup orders. Order Podi Dosa which big and tasty but the chutneys were below average. They had the worst sambar I have ever had at any south Indian restaurant. What they had barely qualified as a Sambar. Ordered Meduwada which is okay, and a bit bland. Ordered Chhole Bhature which is 3/5. Bhatures were hot and fresh. So we ordered it again only to be made waiting for 15-20 minutes mid dinner. We again made a mistake of ordering filter coffees, and they didn’t even care to serve it until we got up and payed the check. After asking repeatedly, they served the food. For billing, serving food, giving out orders, and table cleanup, they had ONE GIRL doing all these works. Needless to say, the service was horrible. The other lady probably the owner/manager would hastily put food on the table and before you can even open a mouth she would ignore you and run away. You are not doing charity, you are serving customers who are paying. Have a decency to ask how they are liking the food, if they want something or at the bare minimum have a patience to listen when they are trying to ask you for something. No way I am ever setting my foot again in this restaurant or recommend any of my friends to do it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPv8uYKghrOgsAE\u0026fid=0x0:0x1723d4fb8ef1215c"],"When":"2025-5-23"},{"Name":"Sriraghav Sridharan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZcNT9gOkMcGDEZ9L6GPwUi21t3ai3x9EOV6j7u-sezALL8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We ordered a nimbu masala soda and a filter coffee to go. Unfortunately, the filter coffee was undrinkable and we had to throw it away. When we informed the staff, the management was polite but unwilling to help resolve the issue. They insisted that this is how filter coffee tastes and said that everyone drinks it. As someone familiar with authentic South Indian filter coffee, this explanation was unconvincing and disappointing. They only offered to make a fresh coffee and clearly stated that a refund was not possible. Adding to the frustration, we had to wait nearly 20 minutes for the order. Poor service and bad coffee overall. Would not return again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nischel Casteel Yinger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXckLOeY8GNdmMn6BMfuS0_YU5uxLZRjpXh3DDsZjUalHl9264=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food is amazing. The staff are fabulous. We come here each week. It is truly a highlight of week. Adding to my review: try the brunch. Its a piece of heaven. True happiness for the taste buds.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDT7eXNWg\u0026fid=0x0:0x1723d4fb8ef1215c"],"When":"2024-5-26"}]

[{"Name":"Haley Ngoc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEl8jtQe42G0XTbGihxw4MisZQSzR7r49848kifY1TbttMBA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The cashier staff here are extremely rude. Every week I come here, I spend over $1,000 on supplies, but some of the employees speak very disrespectfully and are very lazy. I really don’t understand why people like this are even hired.

If you go to Costco Business, the employees are very friendly, speak politely to customers, and the workers who help load items into your car are extremely helpful and enthusiastic.

Restaurant Depot has the worst cashier and carry-out staff I have ever encountered. I have been shopping here for 4 years, and today is my last day. This is terrible—absolutely horrible.

To all store and restaurant owners: please go to Costco Business to shop and do not come to this Restaurant Depot anymore.
Zero stars is more accurate. Even one star is not deserved for the lazy and disrespectful staff here.👈🏻👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"wayne m","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUwPeUBllZGuMItJ5QiGB60MJuNljH1WMrT4ysbzHaOFphsnM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Been waiting over 1.5 to deliver 3 pallets have gone in twice only to be told that I’m early and have to wait…Wait for what your docks are EMPTY and your floor is CLEAR so why do yall insist on wasting our time when you could easily take your 3 pallets and let me move on with my day…Typical here in California except in San Marcos","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXjrqbpRuV7-SXfaNK5SGP&fid=0x0:0x69e34baae76c1c49"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Beast Qas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpm95t2hEMX6g73T0Ai9jziS7XgYXFYrjciphVCY87wNr9tg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I visited this establishment for the first time today and was quite disappointed with the customer service. Overall, a very poor experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCImKT1-AE&fid=0x0:0x69e34baae76c1c49"],"When":"2025-3-30"},{"Name":"Anna Speaks Out","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyfEt2cuMQJiDU8qCjmrRwtRc5j0AWOLPABCFL5cOL0ighQa4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I went in to the store for the first time ever to complete an Uber shop and deliver order,  and a Hispanic looking woman with dark hair at the entrance asked me to "scan my card" so I told her that I didn't have one, was doing an Uber order, and just needed one item that I could see from where I was standing. I had my daughter with me and she said that kids were not allowed in the store, with no explanation as to why, and so I asked her what I needed to do to complete my job and she just said "don't bring a baby in the store." I grabbed the item and went to where she told me the check out was and she followed me and told them not to check me out. Someone who I think was a manager came up and told me that I simply needed to sign a waiver reform , so I thanked him and quickly completed that. I will not support a dispo that steals from MMIC Patients.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5I3hTZ0bQdSElpPoPuOWp&fid=0x0:0x9a4a206487a2ff96"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"PUNISHER _-Z-_ (snipar_77gg)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8w71MHQ7OD1dQ_ANXLdxhwM3j_UZUjVqlY2bDoQi6RYRLqJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at BaM Body and Mind Dispensary! The customer service was excellent—everyone was super friendly and helpful. They also have a great selection of products to choose from, which made it easy to find exactly what I was looking for. Highly recommend this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDfidaKmgE&fid=0x0:0x9a4a206487a2ff96"],"When":"2025-1-7"},{"Name":"Atty Petra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHYhdoMD5B5DFoiFcKg-TDlROADARR_-aGZ9LqrydDtkxn3-l2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This place has changed so much! Wow. I was in here last week for happy hour (duh) and it was the usual rad visit. This week it’s a completely new store - they were bought up and made some major changes.

It’s not terrible. But it’s also just… really terrible now.

The employees are one of the only reasons I went to BAM - I love them, they are so lovely. Even the security is rad. And while BAM did have its weird quirks that made you scratch your head from time to time, it was a great shop with a great happy hour, great happy employees, and great happy customers. Whatever inner/behind the scenes workings that caused the sale seems like kind of a bummer right now… I’ll update this review next time I go in bc I think they deserve a few chances to work out their new groove.

Today’s rating is 2 stars:

You can tell there’s some growing pains going on; the vibe is generally kind of stressed out. Security does a weird check in now and he didn’t know anything about my points (I’m imagining they don’t do those anymore?). Then you have to wait for someone to escort you around to shop, you hand them want you want, and when you’re ready you’ll meet them at the front to check out. It’s not terrible, just a really lengthy and inconvenient process that makes it feel like they’re shifting towards profit loss prevention. I think it’d be good to plan to tack an extra 10 - 20 min onto your visit. They don’t accept debit anymore and they raised the price of the atm from $3 to $4. I like grabbing a disposable cartridge quickly, so the new process was definitely a surprise. The new selection (so far) limits the brands I liked and has a confusing price layout. I also didn’t see the dog treat station..?! I don’t have a dog, but I really really liked being able to give someone else’s a snack. Maybe I just didn’t see it..?? The employees were all rad as always! They’re always so helpful and I love talking with them.

✌️kbyeee","Images":null,"When":""}]
