[{"Name":"Angela C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq9EId3pCpyX0vLO7vdcu-RgCzWlCh259eYNzytWIa2yDTpfeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Okay, so I just have to say that I love when something feels both responsible and delicious. Athletic Brewing’s non-alcoholic beers are such a win. They’ve somehow captured that rich craft-beer flavor without the booze, which makes them feel like a grown-up treat I can enjoy anytime. Plus, they’re local, and I love cheering on local. If you're craving the taste but not the buzz, this is your moment!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_MSnt7syrI9_bCrCPj0u-&fid=0x0:0xf8260c0c17217b5"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"SAS Reviews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsYZKNuJ0slwk45OuO06kjTbWtHAfFM5ZFGl7EyU1Q0jCvKqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Placed my first order for Athletic Brewing Company's All Out Non-Alcoholic Extra Dark and just cracked open the first can from the six pack. The foamy head out of the can and into the pint glass was perfection. The color is in fact, extra dark and most importantly, the taste is extraordinary. If you're a fan of dark beer, and want to enjoy it without the alcohol, All Out is a grand slam! Kudos to the ABC team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rachel Foy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQsVbd3d7MfTCr-pBuRsgvkxXehLOcvJUvZOTstOS4RfXa9wc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Athletic Brewing doesn't just make great non-alcoholic beers; they're serving up FANTASTIC beers in their own right. Whether you're looking to make a lifestyle change or just wanting to have a tremendous alcohol-free option on occasion, these craft brews will not disappoint! I initially ordered a couple of Run Wild IPA six-packs from the ABC website in preparation for a Super Bowl party and have been coming back for more ever since. No more craft-brew beer envy for me. I can still enjoy the hoppiness of a crisp tasting IPA or smoothness of a stout and stay on track with my wellness and fitness goals.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDSiYfa5gE&fid=0x0:0xf8260c0c17217b5"],"When":"2020-12-30"},{"Name":"Packie Kiernan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7GO9G2C2UlPMw0BgLS2w88PbsuVPKEXAXOE8SJOjXAxdqJAY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hands down the best Non Alcoholic beer in the market, I have shared it with a lot of friends and they all agree. What I love most about it is #withoutcomproise. Having a few Athletic Brews on a Saturday night with friends or watching TV and been able to wake up earlier on a Sunday morning for my long run feeling fresh is a huge bonus. It has really helped with a healthy balance between training and life","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-ttfitwE&fid=0x0:0xf8260c0c17217b5"],"When":"2022-11-3"},{"Name":"Teri Schmidt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKVAY7AoZU3NnWARTswt4CuDHTHHUzt7V3im-m_8y4APNn5qO8FQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing brews!  No need to sacrifice taste just to avoid the effects of alcohol that get in the way of an active life!

I love that they're constantly innovating and putting out pilot brews.  They have something for everyone.

I also love that they're a Certified B Corporation, dedicated to improving communities and taking care of our environment.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICu1u7bJg&fid=0x0:0xf8260c0c17217b5"],"When":"2022-7-27"},{"Name":"Yezenia Reyes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9u5TpLJ8fu8AJjALKUTf8fEUvrwayyqo_5yTO_ZEL_aEZB5k=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Im a Craft beer junkie and I wanted to have a dry break and I tasted many NA beer but Omg Athletic beers are my fave! Im so glad that I found them 🙌🏼 Golden, IPA and Blueberry Mosaic are my fave so far.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID136n1ywE&fid=0x0:0xf8260c0c17217b5"],"When":"2024-1-11"},{"Name":"Anthony G. Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAVQ9fVFqkYCH2RT3H_9Q8SRJOYpNLCyDBG6L77nwHzchkYrkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Athletic Brewing Company is a leader in the non-alcoholic beer industry! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Elena Dalla Benetta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQRKBxbGILBm1kYZ0Jqy92IAUz12xKVFkH_6EVse7tj8okCDzy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely love Camp Transformation Center Miramar! From the very first day, I felt welcomed and supported by both the coaches and the community. The workouts are challenging but fun, and the trainers really know how to push you while still keeping it safe and motivating.

What makes this place special is the atmosphere – everyone is encouraging, and you never feel judged, no matter your fitness level. They have so many great coaches like Crystal, Juan, David, Christianne, and so many others that always bring the best energy and keep us motivated through every workout. The classes are tough but fun, and they make sure you push yourself while still feeling supported.

It honestly feels more like a family than just a gym. Everyone cheers each other on, and the vibe is always positive. I’ve seen real progress, not just physically but also in confidence and discipline. If you’re looking for a place where you’ll get results and feel part of a team, this is it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQKKbBlKGK-HYvom0v3Vv3&fid=0x0:0x8ff2691c889d2d93"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Tiffany Baker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWI8h0qdHMf5kfCp-UiNXXGhWATtp6HXnai6DOj1L4F2aNNrEo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I started my journey here in August after attending a “Pack the Camp” Saturday with a friend, and I haven’t looked back since! From the moment I walked in, I loved the atmosphere. Everyone was so welcoming and kind, and the immediate relief of not having to plan my own workouts was exactly what I needed.

Why This Isn't Your "Typical Gym":

What makes The Camp Miramar special is the diversity. It’s a beautiful mix of people from all walks of life, ethnicities, and body types, all united by the same goal: living a healthier life.

The support system here is unmatched:

• The Owners: Shia and Tanya are incredibly supportive, kind, and genuinely helpful.
• The Team: All of the coaches and staff are amazing and constantly encouraging you to push your limits.

Real Results:

I recently completed my first 6-week challenge, and the results were incredible. By following the meal plan and staying consistent with the workouts, I lost 15 pounds! More importantly, I feel amazing—both physically and mentally.

More Than Just a Workout:

The best part of The Camp isn't just the weight loss; it’s the family I’ve gained. Seeing my new friends every day, acting silly, dancing, and singing through our sessions is literally the highlight of my day.
The Camp has become my new home and my new family. It has given me a completely better outlook on myself and my life. If you’re looking for a place where you belong while you get fit, this is it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0eCkgF81lALGG93Gv8IIJ&fid=0x0:0x8ff2691c889d2d93"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Kay Nicholas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWT5gpzY-f0c-r57IFI3Kq63WrMPj-7YBevHzsPJ2u_BT5oAhMD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Transformation Camp has been a major part of my fitness journey since 2019. I joined out of curiosity after seeing my family friend, Elaine post about her workouts, and I started out with the 21 day challenge. I was instantly hooked and signed up for the 6 week challenge. I thought I could sign up for 20 lb. weight loss challenge, but was recommended to go for the 5% body fat loss.  I admit, I was nervous about this challenge because I never lifted weights and was mostly did a lot of cardio, like Zumba.

It was tough at first, but I was determined to lose the 5%. I adjusted my schedule, doing the homework (lifting weights) at L.A. fitness at 4:00 a.m. and then headed over to the camp for the 5:00 a.m. class. I stuck to the meal plan, drank all my water EVERY day and really gave it my all. Halfway thru, I was discouraged because I had only lost 1.7% percent body fat, but after making adjustments to my meal plan and workouts with the help from owners ,Shea and Tanya, I kept going and trusted the process. At the end, I pushed thru and hit exactly 5%!

Beyond the results, I found an amazing supportive fitness community, or should I say fitness family! Everyone's energy is contagious and it truly keeps you coming back for more.  If you're thinking about it, just do it! Ask me for a 5 day pass. You won't regret trying this place. Besides, what do you have to lose? Maybe a couple of pounds and maybe gain some confidence back. I know I did!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caitlin Kneale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKXZwza4GFol7vHjXjLtLyAF65ZI7X46oq_OzzR6OaADKOY7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been coming to The Camp Miramar for 6+ years and the owners and trainers are so amazing, knowledgeable and willing to help everyone!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgTG1UBv_9rhF4rQ9tsoMc&fid=0x0:0x8ff2691c889d2d93"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Tanya Luna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKp63zUI0hK38f-uUZc5RtL9PyEpfp1DWBJLbULjVTMTq21RA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Look at all that CAMP swag!!!! This place is by far my favorite place to workout. I have joined 100's of gyms and this one is absolutely the BEST! I recommend everyone give it a try at least once. I am a returning member using the amazing Come Back Deal they offered. I moved a bit further away and saw myself needing to sign up for a 42 day challenge, (which I am currently killing at.) I am so glad to be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn8pv_pwE&fid=0x0:0x8ff2691c889d2d93"],"When":"2024-9-24"},{"Name":"Jane Jose-Maggay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrPcOSZ19mU6pAbLLK3fuzlXTQcIO2i7eDeWTKxcRu8XKcTSuo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love The Camp! The place where I can release my stress and gain strength at the same time. Kayle is there almost every morning to give you that “you got this!” hug. Coach Crystal is always looking out for my form to make sure I’m doing the exercises properly. All the coaches are super supportive and knowledgeable. I’m glad to be part of the Camp community for my fitness journey.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwsfbF-AE&fid=0x0:0x8ff2691c889d2d93"],"When":"2025-3-19"},{"Name":"Raseca E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLtpCX6_U7Lksr_jEeFmfhMvAnR6GwpjvYDZnjrcMx9I07otg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love going to the Camp! Owners, Shea and Tanya are always there making sure everyone is taken care of. Cheena, is so friendly and greets you with a smile every day. Trainers are attentive, there to support your needs and push you when needed. Personal Trainer feels without the high price of a Personal Trainer. Coach Kristianne is the absolute best! I’ve met people  from the Camp that have become my friends in and out of the Camp. They really make you feel like family :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arianne Bordeaux","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIr_fPb460w8eO34srW5EVU2YEAc5zvC32_dALUNruyNIdxHg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I heard about this Camp from a friend of mine. And she took me to one of the classes during “Buddy Week”. It was a free trial session. And I enjoyed the workout so much that I signed up for one of their 21 day challenge. It was only $67! And, you get 3 weeks of unlimited bootcamp style class. Just what I was looking for. Plus, they offer a military discount for memberships. Definitely a great gym! Trainers are awesome! Staff and employees are always friendly. And it’s just a fun atmosphere to be at! My favorite trainer is Shea Coleman :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC28eap0wE&fid=0x0:0x8ff2691c889d2d93"],"When":"2022-4-23"}]

[{"Name":"Rebecca Callaway","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWwSOUxhR9Ppamnz_rwr4kE3Qu6hq9pBSAqM01dz2lHS3TvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our condo association used Rotisserie Affair Catering for our recent summer block party.  We were very impressed with every aspect of working with Rotisserie Affair Catering - the food and the staff were exceptional.  Kevin was extremely accommodating when choosing a menu that would fit into our budget.  He communicated well and provided an amazing experience for everyone.  They provided a wide variety of food options, and I was very pleased with our choices.   Many of our neighbors expressed how much they enjoyed the food.  We were also able to rent tables and linens from Rotisserie Affair Catering, which made the set up/clean up so much easier.  Again, we had an amazing experience working with Kevin and his crew.  Five-star experience!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amy Quigley-Doting","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmHl3bQ0slgOJVB_3cwxOu2rsVM5jnNsCDmN5syiz09o9_lg6Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rotisserie Affair Catering hosted our company luau luncheon and everything was perfect from the display of the rotisserie pig to the taste of the kalua pork, rotisserie chicken and sides.  The food was 5 stars and the service was outstanding.  Thank you Kevin for making our event a success!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJm5e-qgE&fid=0x0:0xffd65c6bcbefa891"],"When":"2023-7-5"},{"Name":"Beth Richey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjvf-mgTVhyJqR9wCrLXjebuahrMAC2T2658SlVxbe9AR2rQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rotisserie Affair Catering catered the rehearsal dinner for our son and his fiancé’s wedding in November.  The food was delicious and just as described.  The chef, wait staff and bartender were very professional and worked to make it a lovely evening.  We highly recommend Rotisserie Affair Catering, and would definitely work with them again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amanda Bautista","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXB7avMxTOL3gK5-GRmSmkMuXmSzI0lZpGsKPb_ojoZTI6Qad9K=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kevin and his team exceeded all of our expectations for our wedding dinner! The food was phenomenal, he was so responsive and accommodating, & overall such a great experience. We ended up choosing prime rib, mahi mahi, and chicken and the serving sizes were more than enough!! So delicious. The bartender was great too! We loved having him. Couldn’t say enough great things about Rotisserie Affair! Thank you a million for making everything so special :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Danielle L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkwIKjpsNoXuiQEEQ1T5bEgftBOd6scvYP5M7iOwcGZ_jlrSc9BA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There are so many great things to rave about my service and experience with Rotisserie Affair Catering. We hired Rotisserie Affair for our Thanksgiving corporate luncheon. As this is not the atypical catering that we have, Kevin and his team really set the bar with our experience.

From the beginning, Kevin made sure that our menu was tailored to our wants / needs / price range request. From there, everything was smooth sailing.
Having them come set up, take care of EVERYTHING, including cleanup- was AMAZING. They left no stone unturned with their setup, service, and left without a trace!

My team RAVED about how delectable everything was, and went out of their way to compliment the amazing staff who served us- Noe and Mauristo. Noe and Mauristo took great care of my employees serving them with care! They were attentive to detail, and made sure everything was tended to flawlessly.

Thank you for making our luncheon a delicious great success!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deborah Foley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6hO9mKYdLCIyi-FvRutGxqriyy93XF9J2NtWkbLTGUb4-AA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Rotisserie Affair for our rehearsal dinner at Torrey Pines Gliderport.  Kevin, the owner, was so helpful in the planning of this meal/party for the kickoff to our son's wedding celebration weekend.  Everyone raved about the food and it was great fun having it prepared onsite.  Kevin has been catering parties for many years and he is still incredibly enthusiastic about what he does.  He provides a fantastic experience.  His staff is helpful, friendly and professional.  I highly recommend hiring Rotisserie Affair.  You will be very pleased!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bonnie Sanders","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnTNeK7kO1FH63HixJursaitHmPtV6QVYZJxSSgc-itJV2VQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I contacted Rotisserie Affair to cater my son's Wedding Rehearsal Dinner.  I spoke with Amanda and she went right to work.  She emailed me quickly with choices and proposal.  It was so quick and easy to plan the event.  Very friendly and professional.
The day of the event they arrived on time, quickly set up and proceeded to cook and care for our guest.  I was able to relax and let Rotisserie Affair take over.  It was wonderful!
Of course after all that, the food was DELICIOUS!  Moist and tender chicken, pulled pork sandwiches,  sides and dessert.  Everything was wonderful and everyone commented on how tasty the food was.  I would hire them again in a second.  Definitely give them a call. You won't be disappointed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janet Hospodar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnBa71kiv_NXoVMytACdfQiofRmBgLvfjAXgMbfm8rESb3BQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful food and Amazing service through the entire process.  The food was seriously delicious.  We will book our Company Christmas party with Rotisserie Affair again next year.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ness-Ann Mendoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWukW3DeRxsfo_d48TGilEu5GnH5gNs6iR7JKrDs-JzSyU5j5o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely love All Things Ube! The treats and staff are amazing. Everything we’ve tried from here has been so delicious - the cookies, cheesecake, mochi bricks, brownies. Oh my gosh, the ube is just *chefs kiss*. My all time fave has got to be the ube mochi bricks. We’ve moved to Australia since they first opened, and of course had to make a stop back in SD after all these years. Plenty of new things on the menu - the ube banana pudding was amazing, and the three chocolate bars made it all the way back to Australia with us, and were all super delish!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA11_snJjnOr_c2wVo_sRpP&fid=0x0:0xd1777f74c1b0a40f"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Brandon Nolte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtoI3lwUCA8iBkLYqFo-PJFi8nZL1hASn6zauNOtNn1h7iNciedg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Fun concept with lots of Ube-themed desserts, but nothing really hit the mark. The cookie was dry, and the cheesecake tasted good but had more of a pudding texture than true cheesecake. Some items seemed like they may rely on artificial colors or ingredients, which I prefer to avoid. Probably would not come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBeuxuA9vap9VI-QYz0XdBQ&fid=0x0:0xd1777f74c1b0a40f"],"When":"2025-8-15"},{"Name":"Ian Lijewski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlBcaInj5q9hv7L1_K7uSEcBQ5F-T60RlZFKIpDsk-pAt--W_-GA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We all tried the ube knafeh strawberries, ube knafeh chocolate bar, and ube brownie today.
The strawberries were the most disappointing. Very overpriced for a 16oz cup of strawberries ($15). What's the point in the domed lid if you're not going to fill the cup past the lid line? The pistachio sauce is definitely not like other pistachio sauce/cream and the ube chocolate sauce was not a sauce as it hardened on the strawberries. I reckon they used the same ube chocolate for their sauce as for their chocolate bars based on the chocolate solidifying.
The ube knafeh chocolate bar was good.
The ube brownies have a cake like consistency and not as dense as I prefer brownies.
Rounded up to 3 stars as the folks who work here are always so nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI3-TZ8wE&fid=0x0:0xd1777f74c1b0a40f"],"When":"2025-4-14"},{"Name":"Danielle Pangan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtwUi8a3JcOdnd2A8ZWEUnlsBQDtNdpPgbXo3BsaAiAT2lSlyr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Some of the reviews on here are a little over the top w their criticism. From another small business owner, who also does the crazy Dubai trend. Homemade  pistachio cream made from scratch, will taste more like peanut butter. I appreciate that they make it from scratch and not use already made pistachio cream. I tried their Ube chocolate bar and it was a little too sweet but it helped me curb my cravings by eating less. 🤣  they always use premium white chocolate in their bars. Unlike some, that use almond bark 🙃
I love their cheesecake bites, it’s my favorite from their menu. I also tried their ube lemonade, it was so good but I wish it came in a bigger container. Maybe it does? I have known the owners for a decade now, and I have to say they are the kindest hardworking people, I have ever met in my life. Just remember to those thinking about leaving rude reviews, just know you’re hurting a small business that started from nothing. Instead leave that feedback directly with them & give them that chance to make things right. I’ve always had a great experience coming. The front workers are always so nice and it’s not awkward or weird while waiting. Overall, thank you guys for continuously doing your thing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shaon R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnzYZRtiRuEttpx8EyJ6WDmr6_O7TzLCYAqpHsD9_yciVFNWu-yQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Normally service is timely and decent here when the ladies work the cashier. Unfortunately, ordered 4 items and only 1 had to be made. It blew my mind to realize it took them 30 mins to prepare halo halo of all items.

When it came out it was definitely lacking in terms of presentation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPiF0enWh73OZg&fid=0x0:0xd1777f74c1b0a40f"],"When":"2025-5-21"},{"Name":"Ruby Roeder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0kc0WTbErwTmbren5qSTxES6c_bhyW5URGtuCc_8fljwKjwJd=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing baked goods!! I had the coffee with the ube foam on top, the brownie, cookies, and the AMAZING cheesecake. I almost ate all 12 pieces by myself! Definitely recommend this shop 💜","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kids Oreste","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdrqzTMhoFwMNTIddQjLwJGXFqc6Ubri_n6x7IC0nz_QOac808=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food is out of this world! I would say that out of all of the ube shops I've been to, this certainly is the best! The ube flavor is outstanding and you can actually taste the ube in the desserts and drinks, and that's really hard to do in food, since you can't taste the ube. I'd recommend adding decorations to the shop for a more popping store, but I'd fly to San Diego and try it again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL1ffExgE&fid=0x0:0xd1777f74c1b0a40f"],"When":"2024-6-22"},{"Name":"Himmler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfykRcWB5Rg3cMKDFWmk0_vGm7y45qdQgB_N2-MwA494EZS8Lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend, stopped by a farmers market near our room. Dennis was very welcoming and answered all my questions. The brownie has a crazy flavor combo. Like it just goes together. All the the flavors mix perfectly. The cookies have a great texture, the ouside is dence but the inside is moist, promising every bight to be well balanced. Compared to other cookies that fall apast after the 1st bight, this Ube cookie maintains shape after every bight. Have to try them no doubt.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDG_LOd0AE&fid=0x0:0xd1777f74c1b0a40f"],"When":"2021-11-22"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Josh Baltazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGwLc0426uUtyS_hszBwD6DJIMBgO3FQ0DNqDkJ5w2kX3vUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Heard about this place on the interwebs so wanted to check it out and see if the restaurant lived up to the hype. Long story short, there are better Mexican restaurants out there. We ordered Carne Asada Fries, Surf and Turf Burrito, 3 Rolled Tacos and Menudo.  The Carne Asada Fries were solid but I would have liked more guacamole or sour cream or cheese. The carne asada flavor was ok. The Surf and Turf Burrito was super dry. It had a lot of rice, and not too much Shrimp. The Menudo was very gelatanous, much different that other Mexican spots I've been to.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDP5ItLGUCX0XVdbL4M9PeQ&fid=0x0:0xc867a1e71006a127"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Jason L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIrCl52mLyd6VC-2syanxD3wbz30rOpli89Ed5KtjmPyNBIHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Rigoberto’s Taco Shop serves up great food with bold, satisfying flavors—definitely worth the visit if you’re craving authentic tacos. The indoor setting is clean and inviting, and the outdoor seating is a nice bonus when the weather’s good. That said, the bathroom accessibility could use some improvement as it’s a bit awkward and not the easiest to get to. Still, the overall experience and food quality make it a solid choice.

JY review","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJPcsvfkpPyASA&fid=0x0:0xc867a1e71006a127"],"When":"2025-5-28"},{"Name":"Christopher Gorrie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvB6Mm4QddVkwZiLVQiMCdaMm8YOBQt0ZNeUWTxTrGs8Pqv0JWdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Of the Rigoberto locations, I think I prefer the one in La Jolla. I’m giving this spot 3/5 stars primarily due to the quality of the California burrito I had last night, which was subpar as far as San Diego goes.

Let’s start with the good. The salsas were great, especially the habanero and salsa verde. Very delicious and well-balanced. The tortilla on the burrito was also really good and had the mouth feel of a handmade tortilla. Service was normal for a fast-food spot, and the atmosphere was fairly standard classic taco shop.

Now onto the bad. The burrito was very, very greasy. It also only contained carne asada, fries, and cheese—kind of a skimpy version of the classic California. I get that the economy is tough, but at least put pico de gallo if nothing else. It’s hard to call a 3-ingredient California a “California” with a straight face.

Overall, it’s hard to justify paying $13 for this burrito. I woke up the next morning feeling a bit sick, too. Nothing crazy, it just was that greasy. I’ll probably avoid this spot in the future.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDYR05FIKzlvm9HUVNYvj8d&fid=0x0:0xc867a1e71006a127"],"When":"2025-7-14"},{"Name":"Micheal Myers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1roR_fV-_IhN9lRht5xI0i9biMk4jR7oAVT7qFz5S9Sje9A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I agree with a previous review of the breakfast burrito with eggs being overpriced. $15 for a breakfast burrito with just eggs, beans, cheese is ridiculous. The portion of eggs wasn't even generous for the upcharge. I eat at taco shops regularly and literally no other shop I have been to has an upcharge for eggs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zara Khakpour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLh_zG9-0eC72Iw0hJ3lhHnJ-RQzeFCzx_nsZvV8XkSUJ97r6m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tacos are not only super tasty and delicious but they come in a big portion.
Good prices with fast service.
I was there around midnight and they had a very nice and friendly staff with great customer service; inside was super clean and they had some tables and chairs outside as well.

Don't forget to try their green spicy sauce, It's the best!
Rigoberto’s Taco shop is open 24hrs and I definitely recommend this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6pLaGGw&fid=0x0:0xc867a1e71006a127"],"When":"2021-9-21"},{"Name":"Janet Lake","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJMxTCyxixsC6GoTpVOhTWcLG7qkfLswxd-aqhtz7BY0oSqmDz_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great food, but the staff don't know their own menu.  The sign reads "orders include rice and beans" and a list of items follows.  They didn't give me the rice and beans, and they argued with me about it; and even after coming around and reading the sign, they still asked a superior if they could give them to me.  They did, of course, but come on!  Don't put carne asada fries on the list if you don't want people to eat it with rice and beans.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhidmPGg&fid=0x0:0xc867a1e71006a127"],"When":"2023-3-11"},{"Name":"Erik Sorbo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdgywyyCDcRsR00aM0_9sH1GpW1fejL-c2Iov-12dVjv6eaefF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great little taco shop. Had the pork carnitas plate. Nice little dine-in area. Was pretty busy for a Thursday night when we were there.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwz4KRIg&fid=0x0:0xc867a1e71006a127"],"When":"2025-3-22"},{"Name":"秦美星","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1syi5na2c0p1bgzfkSiyba8aaPNRawjcWcrFDAblWHDXM0t8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I bought 3 tacos; don't really remember what I ordered. They were around 6$ a taco which might seem expensive at first, but for the size you get, it's worth it. It was flavorful and delicious. It satisfied my craving for a late night taco run.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC99L3kSg&fid=0x0:0xc867a1e71006a127"],"When":"2024-3-3"}]

[{"Name":"Ali Marjaninejad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcLtrvAoMJTzG5z3xDmqFfUaQNPmv4x8Y8moMX2NROGWK03iqI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is one of our favorites both for their food/drinks and the vibe!

The food here is really tasty and served with attention to detail. We have tried their drinks, main entries, desserts, etc., and all were great!

The atmosphere there is very nice; ideal for dates, professional dinners, or friends’ gatherings, and the service is professional.

There is plenty of parking in the Westfield parking (first 2 hours free), or if you are in a hurry, they also have valet services at the door, which is a great convenience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxZuj490PrjKbd0MgUTF7d&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Joe Camarillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtc8FvF_3skMS-f3ctvCoiZIVwUQ2cbQ9ZkGn5CZxvP_UOXxSHFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got to celebrate my birthday in style at Javier's Restaurant in La Jolla, and it was truly unforgettable! 🎉 The food was absolutely on point, with every dish that hit the table being a flavor explosion. The service was top-notch, with our server going above and beyond to make sure we had an amazing experience. They made my birthday evening awesome! If you're looking for a special spot to celebrate a milestone, I highly recommend Javier's!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBz1wGHICIXCSDOetvg8Sb6&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Valerie Upham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVMIEwuT8wpVAst6vUEmzc-hzBmdndrdTfZ1N5440eD_VWRQprJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food at Javier’s is delicious. It’s pricey, but worth it for a special occasion. Alcoholic drinks are around $20 each. My niece ordered the taquitos (see photo), and I ordered the Trio de Enchiladas del Mar. The crab and other ingredients tasted very fresh, and the salsa was excellent. We chose to eat there for the atmosphere and the food, and it delivered. That said, it was louder than I remembered. We had a group of eight, and it was hard to hear the person sitting next to me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwayXOHUW37YE7sfe6HUc1&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Adriana Urbina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-avhcHAioOaXfgwWoGA_DaxUtZK8tQIZW320XkTrAoMCNzw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"You are paying for the atmosphere. The presentation of the food was nice, but the flavor left much to be desired. It is overpriced and subpar: the mole (pictured) was thin and salty. The tortillas were not freshly made and tasted like the cheap store-bought ones. An $80 meal of steak and shrimp included two shrimps and a small steak.  The carnitas (pictured) were good, but the beans that came with them were very salty. Overall, the price did not match the quality of the food. The one thing that was up to the price standard was the service, which was friendly, cordial, and attentive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBZoCbKP--urVNPVAwmKkZ&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Amy Thurston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSMrFpKaVlo0ac0Sf3Syw6ADYv1-EsjMQDp2bLIPeL6rEOE3Sf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious food, excellent service and beautiful building. Waiters were attentive and regularly refilled water and snacking chips and salsa. Everyone loved what they got. I got the house salad (which was delicious and light) and the 3 fish enchiladas: shrimp, lobster and crab.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAesy7WUHuzJsU1OeNkpKBq&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Mrinalini Mishra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUg5Va6ivy2mu4bLfDlyRphh_69aTa5yHRp1qfqrGxI0GK0Zsfz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here to celebrate our anniversary and had an amazing experience!
Absolutely loved the ambience and the food. Our servers, Gio and Juan, were fantastic — Gio was especially attentive and friendly, making our evening extra special.

I ordered the vegetarian enchilada, which was delicious, and their esquites are hands down the best I’ve ever had!

Pro tip: Make reservations in advance, especially on weekends — they get busy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBA9MBOkM9Sfa72flV4yDR4&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"philboytano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlVGjs9jpLQeh4CWCahN1lY8r-XsO08T_jyFXLWA9PQQ-w8c3y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time coming here with my gf.  My first impression was the interior design of the restaurant, very classy and beautifully decorated.  Was expecting the menu to be really expensive but to my surprise it was fairly priced and the food and service were 👌.  I give this place an A+.  Our total meal with alcohol drinks totalled to less than 150 for 2 people, not including tip.  Not bad at all.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCuMQDT082fri-a_QfJ2AH4&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Jajjj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIh8CbvwsdeGKmxmUe5x05Q_IwRGk6iKVEX9ThW92KWY-5XSw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Why is no one being honest about this place? I came here yesterday for a birthday dinner and was completely disappointed. It’s a really loud atmosphere (think club music in a fine dining setting) you literally have to shout to hear each other speak. The overall vibe was confusing - one part of the restaurant was like a sports bar with TVs, another was like a networking event with people in suits & the other part had people in sweatpants? The decor is beautiful but the food was below average & certainly not worth the price. I ordered lamb chops medium but they came out rare. The steak was under seasoned & the chicken in the taquito was dry as hell. For a $250 meal it felt subpar at best. Overall would not go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwvG_NV8nliku7rkh97f76&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2026-1-29"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Gustavo Pena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHd7XsJtBw1Y12_oRPAyoUkSSK8fOnih_o69EsPxwTuCYqKEE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am still savoring the magic of my NYE dinner at Fleurette. The service was impeccable, with attentive and knowledgeable staff who made us feel like esteemed guests. Every detail was meticulously handled, from the amuse-bouche to the final dessert course.

The wine pairings were a true highlight, expertly crafted to elevate each dish. The sommelier's recommendations added depth and complexity to the already stunning food.

The food was nothing short of extraordinary, with each dish showcasing the chef's creativity and skill. The Gnocchi course with white truffles was a standout a sublime marriage of flavors and textures that left us wanting more. The presentation was equally impressive, with each plate a work of art.

Fleurette delivered an unforgettable dining experience, making it the perfect way to ring in the New Year. The atmosphere was elegant and sophisticated, with a warm and inviting ambiance that made us feel right at home.

If you're looking for a truly exceptional  dinner in San Diego, look no further than Fleurette. Bravo!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_teglgnfhitBeImwb2Hp9&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Softwave","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIlQtTs_skDyOf-cFiVGqWvl-zA0nmt7cGBteodJHRRepfmMUZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the very first cocktails, James immediately had our trust. We asked him to guide us through the evening, and every recommendation was spot on. His attention and awareness set the tone for the entire experience.

Chef Travis’s talent was showcased in every single bite. Every course was bright, light, rich, decadent, savory, thoughtful, precise, and full of flavor. The lobster and bouillabaisse were exceptional, and the black truffle hazelnut gnocchi is easily the best thing I’ve ever eaten. Our citrus dessert was ohhh too good!
Also valet was very accommodating, thank you Tyler.

If you haven’t made a reservation yet, I can’t recommend it enough. Thank you to everyone who made this Sunday night one of the best dining experiences I’ve had in a very long time, the entire evening was incredible and I can’t wait to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZk1jo8is4EbtFunDIq4CY&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Adriana Tzalel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjuJf84hoqytSocE0a4e2evDZsrwHZaOn4Qa6058Uw89zEpg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I’ll start by saying that the service was incredible, as was the ambience. However, we were really disappointed in the food. Our hopes were high as each dish was set on our table — we were wow’d by the stunning presentation each time. Unfortunately, we found each dish to lack flavor (some more than others).

The leeks was our favorite savory dish that we ordered, but it still left us wanting a bit more in terms of flavor. The caviar added some much needed saltiness. The kanpachi was stunning, and the fish was very fresh, but it didn’t pack much flavor. The Oeufs was the dish we were most looking forward to, and it unfortunately let us down the most. Very little truffle flavor, if at all. The uni was good, but it got lost in everything else.

The special of the night was a gnocchi with a hazelnut pesto, covered in a gruyere sauce with shaved truffle. Sounds incredible, right? We thought so too, which is why we ordered it. Once again, we found it had little flavor, which seems impossible! The best part of the dish was the soft, pillowy texture of the gnocchi. We had our hopes set high with the egg yolk fettuccine, which smelled incredible. Unfortunately, once again, we were left wanting more in terms of flavor.

We ordered the Mille-Feuille for dessert, which was personally my favorite dish of the night. The textures were fun and the hazelnut flavor went perfectly with the rich chocolate. Delicious!

Overall, very impressed with the presentation of each dish and the service (extremely attentive and knowledgeable), but disappointed in the food itself (especially at such a high price point).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgHtjnwx7iSAt4zhq8Jyzn&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Hal Jurgensen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMeWjn7kJrkhuuuHiK8AIs-KWnMLy3iiAtjVOXDD0orYLywXxpYg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fleurette is an absolute gem. Chef-Owner Travis Swikard delivers exceptional French Mediterranean cuisine that’s as refined as it is inviting. Every dish bursts with creativity, balance, and care. The service is equally outstanding — professional, attentive, and genuinely warm. From the elegant atmosphere to the flawless execution, Fleurette sets a new standard for dining excellence. Oeuf's and Eggs may be the most viral dish in the next coming months,  the presentation and taste is out of this world - you have to get it. Cocktails were also great, we got the "Del Mar" solely because that's where we're from and it tasted like cucumbers on your eyelids at a health and wellness spa drink - so refreshing. Harris Ranch Beef was our main, the NY strip was perfectly cooked and the beef cheek may be the softest meat I've ever had in my life. I had extremely high expectations with Fleurette and I'm so glad you completely blew us away last night. Can't wait to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAl7bx-sL2mQAbj1fkyJlm_&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Sama Skye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWad2MzhGaFA9KNDv0Ql5giEcIAGuCR0tBtewCT8HuyMH-mJEY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I will update this review if I see a change upon my next visit.

The good:
Ambiance, service, theme and decor, presentation, food creativity, cocktails were great! My favorite dish was the bolognese pasta and the Oeufs and Eggs, both were delightful!

The bad:
We had 2 cocktails, 5 dishes (some were apps and a side) and it was $250. Seems a little overpriced to me.

2/5 dishes we had were way too salty
I did politely bring it to chef’s attention when he was making his rounds. It seems I’m also not the first person to complain about this. For a girl that likes salt, this was actually so bad that I had to chug water to offset the saltiness because we were too embarrassed to send it back. Dishes that were salty were Steak Tartare and the Chicken entree.

Hoping these are just growing pains, and that they adjust accordingly. Might help to see which chef has a heavy hand back there.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB-opQeZMb9OTkr0NFsrWht&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Ray Ehscheid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6x9jdLVRCrBUzrrIn0QUrfbtDtW50OA7tFgBIymgE2UCGrWOF7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Flew in from New York for an unforgettable evening and it delivered on every level. Every dish was absolutely delicious, beautifully presented, and thoughtfully balanced from start to finish. Highlights included a playful take on a dirty martini, crisp barbajuans, winter pumpkin and chestnut doppio agnolotti, and a standout bacon-wrapped California sturgeon. The precision, flavor clarity, and restraint across the menu were exceptional. Even on a cool evening, a brief walk through the garden hinted at what will be a special outdoor experience come spring. Thrilled for the chef and excited to watch his continued growth and impact on the San Diego dining scene.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCGt7CxAzWy3fUf-cS1b9AV&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Justin Schwartz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhsv0A44FzFPN5iGrc9NlIWiaMJBEjNmpowvhyrTbr7YVSSbalBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible. It feels special to be this early to the opening to a restaurant like Fleurette. My wife and I love its sister restaurant, Callie, and we’ve been waiting for Fleurette to open for quite some time.

Service
A few kinks to be worked out, but this restaurant has been open for 6 days, so some grace is needed. Overall, very knowledgeable staff armed with recommendations, professionalism, and kindness. They’re very attentive with water refills and changing out plates and silverware. They weren’t able to recognize my birthday because they opened so recently and didn’t have cards ready, but that’s not a big deal.

Drinks
We had the Del Mar and the Provence. Both were light, refreshing, and unique.

Food
Overall, very impressive. It’s a nice spin on French food that doesn’t feel as inaccessible as purely French restaurants because of the Mediterranean element. The absolute standout menu item is the Oeufs & Eggs. We were blown away. None of the other menu items were regrets, but they also weren’t nearly as show-stopping as the Oeufs & Eggs, which is both beautifully presented and delicious. See my photos for what else we got, but in short, other great items were the Garganelli alla Genovese, the pissaladière, and the roast golden chicken. The chicken does have a bit of a rosemary flavor, but I happen to love rosemary. The sauce and the crispy skin are amazing.

Fleurette vs Callie
It’s inevitable to compare sister restaurants. I do enjoy Mediterranean food more than French food, so overall Callie is the winner, but even at its early stages, Fleurette holds its own. The astounding Aleppo Chicken at Callie is hard to beat, but you could say the same about the Oeufs & Eggs at Fleurette. Ultimately, they’re different, and they’re both worth it.

Recommended?
Yes. I will be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOApbKs2oAdHc7lEtQB6ah&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Ashley Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMhq1_U5gzX5p_C6by-I7armWFnX8X2T0DeBp2Dfr0mfz2Bo1R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Atmosphere was lovely. Waitstaff were all wonderful!

However, the food is on the saltier side and unfortunately, the main dish of Tagliolini was far too salty and it was increasingly difficult to ingest with each bite. Vacherin dessert was light and refreshing.

Be aware for the 4% automatic surcharge to the bill.

Will come back again to give it another try in a year","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmRqxs2p6VcF4Tcftegmdh&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-29"}]

[{"Name":"Frank C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAtWSVz_BQwXGvcPhvZC_0oVjRkjrnXaxLpZj5eTj5ABQ8SQlpJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow!  Amazing fish and shrimp tacos. Fish and shrimp were fried in the spot. Cabbage and pico looked and tasted fresh. Very well priced and amazing tacos. The fries were also fresh and light (were not burnt or soggy.). A must try in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDc1t7KVg&fid=0x0:0xe988d8f13d0cc6e6"],"When":"2020-6-10"},{"Name":"Andrea Naranjo Soledad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAnr4TmcRTkf-hFpIYPUMZIPKvQX3kGzwWUN_nU1v0fNsJQzbB5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The food truck is in front of a bar, which is good if you would like to pair food with some drinks. People were nice too. However, the tacos were O.K. I got two fish tacos for $14. I definitely would not pay $7 per taco. There are better tacos out there and for a better price...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caleb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGcAY1q-3_Tt2PU7_zlFRTrvZWrQV27PDDm3QPypF9c3hDYHcZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"After ordering a Shrimp Burrito, I was not impressed. Almost thought I was served a fish burrito as the shrimp is served fried. I expected larger portions for the price which was disappointing as my total came out to around $20 for one burrito. All orders to my understanding are dine-in only which I wanted to take mine to go. Unless you are in the area, I would not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Humphreys","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3tKliDOKL3ApaAHJJ0RoSeSsSDQE7UUu2tzlscN-RmUofP_EUbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Waited over 60 minutes to get a side of normal, basic fries.  When I ordered they did not mention the wait would be over an hour.  Rather than prioritize ease & speed over, they only did a first in first out system.  I had to wait for an order of 30 tacos before my fries when all they literally had to do was take the fries from the frier basket and put into a bowl.  No meat, no sauce, no toppings.  Just basic fries in a bowl.  Finally had to get a refund because my entire group already left after drinking a few beers.

Someone drove to Taco Bell and back quicker than ordering here.  Food MIGHT be decent but good luck getting any.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZTHu0T-OVUkDayJYSS3i4SbsLPNBYe9-F_Wuybf9oCKDY524=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Tried this food truck when visiting Duck Foot Brewing on Friday. Fish tacos - not good, weirdly they chose arugula for the veg and the fish didn't taste fresh (had that heavy frozen taste). The breading and tortillas were also subpar. The 8 lemon pepper wings were much better and the redeeming factor in this meal - very salty but flavorful and full of crunch. tldr; Overpriced and quite slooooow, considering we were the only customer. The guy working was kind, but I'd pass on this vendor in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Will Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLk2QO8CqNZamu3pp9ZIjh95D2yz-sJqjMK3F-EImqvqU6MEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So good!!! It can take awhile if they are busy but quality is always top notch, always has new things on the menu.  Shrimp fries are probably our favorite.  Duck foot + Mariscos is brilliant.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alina Duran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpHgbpQT3gWR2eBdS0A02OhcfqpSXzo3isjh1iq_0u0Jkmhs7n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Customer service is top chart. They are on point when it comes to exceptional service for their customers.

My favorite items are the shrimp cocktail (best one I've ever had, if you love lemon, you'll love this cocktail), the shrimp fries and the aguachile.

Keep up the great work!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"chuntiris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhpxcuCoAweMx3jORLw7bf_siqKoqgQGrWrTUh6izcIMUASQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chef Emre has an excellent attitude and cares very much about your experience with his food.

I had the opportunity to try tacos from chef em mariscos truck and honestly they where very yummy.
My family and friends loved all the tacos but the Fish, surf & turf and Gobernador tacos stood out a little extra and they where so delicious !!!! I highly recommend.
Everything was made to order with fresh ingredients. All of the sauces are made fresh in house and the tortillas are made by a local tortilleria.

Great little gem.!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Patrick Woodall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxHUX1rdt4VL4-T0cqBTm-Mu_nhZxQNGA9SC-8qXYpuvXtRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was really something special. The WW1 vibe was done with such attention to detail. The ambience and food was just incredible. The pictures of the exterior really don't do it justice. The tri-plane is worth a close inspection. I have never had a brunch that had such a variety of outstanding food. 94th Aero should be on your list of places to visit for a unique dining experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbafUMRZimhAQT_z9QZMqo&fid=0x0:0x948ccc316397855d"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"marjon farz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFxOn2m_6_nyv5Kbv-mHhjD5lC2X8rdxSkV7nelEepYjqkDzVgvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Overall sadly I would have to say I didn't love this place. We went here with a couple of friends for Sunday brunch we had a reservation but still had to wait almost 30 minutes in line. We got sat in the back with a ton of big tables I felt like I was in a work banquet hall and I honestly hated it. It really tainted my dining experience. I felt like I was in a motel brunch. The food quality is fairly decent but the layout of the restaurant and Buffet is not appealing at all. And for $86 per person it's definitely not worth the price. I think it's just not my vibe or type of restaurant I would enjoy. I will say the service and everyone who works there is very nice in hospitable but does not offset the overall experience feels very cheap.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJ6z3IOeru2KkAE&fid=0x0:0x948ccc316397855d"],"When":"2025-5-19"},{"Name":"Jason Flores","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyOm3SKvX5iBGKvutHkr0rGMg7G6cVwDagJJWyiTRxMxvmdEIw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The theming was great.  Amazing world war I artifacts.  Awesome atmosphere! Be aware that the food was not good at all.  What appeared to be all the same exact shaped round meatloaf slices like what you buy in the frozen section of your grocery store freezer aisle.   Just be aware before you go.  If you like great theming, interested in World War I, and don’t care as much about the food… then definitely worth a visit.  If you are Weston’s the hefty price to Include good food, then definitely skip it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5EvGkZdDQ2kox0mOAZY3ZD05cAH5rAt8BkS1v_ue9YbmihQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Love the weekend brunches here. Been coming each January for many many years and never disappointed. So much to choose from. There is plenty for every diet and/or taste preference.

Have also been here for some nightclub events that I have enjoyed as well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great brunch at 94th Aero Squadron Restaurant! Went on a Saturday at around noon and paid at the entry and got a seat on the dog friendly patio with a great view of the air field. We were able to see many helicopters and planes land and take off on the field. The price for the buffet is $65 per person ($70 after tax, not including tip), so pretty pricey but a great atmosphere. A lot of great choices at the buffet, breakfast foods, seafood, sushi, meat, pretty much everything. The waffles were my favorite. They also come around with champagne (included) which is really nice. Friendly service. Recommend for a special occasion and you want to stay a while, great place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICvm-SJRg&fid=0x0:0x948ccc316397855d"],"When":"2024-12-14"},{"Name":"Michael","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZbZr1VEKU-Iu7keGMc4RDgqc-9XC1Hpk7z07QyfOIWKt7vQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome! Great service, Leticia was Fantastic. Good food. Good drinks. I got the Manhattan.
Manhattans
Early Flight Dinner Special $48
French Onion Soup
8oz Prime Rib
W/ Mashed Potatoes
Vanilla Ice Cream
Old work food and just the right amount of home. Love the honor of those few who fight hard so the rest can benefit. It’s fun to watch the small planes take off & land as well.
They even have the step & pull things so you don’t have to touch the door handle leaving the restroom.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw7telYg&fid=0x0:0x948ccc316397855d"],"When":"2025-3-19"},{"Name":"Jose Contreras","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJHZEF5W7KIg8iQq--m94238M_B2vpnt-FZCV636Xio3QalqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Too many people either don't know about this franchise or have forgotten how good their food is. We had a great Valentine's Day lunch here at their buffet. Main course is beef, chicken,  pork, fish, vegetarian tofu curry or stir fry w vegetables, mashed potatoes, LOBSTER mac & cheese or rice. HUGE salad bar w all the fixings, charcuterie meats & cheeses, nacho bar, noodle bar & desserts galore! Very affordable for such quality servings. If course, tea, coffee, water & lemonade are also included. You can watch small planes & helicopters just a few feet out of the window. Great place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgnPz9zAE&fid=0x0:0x948ccc316397855d"],"When":"2025-2-15"},{"Name":"Alexandro Vega","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVf31aqnGcnGRzpVxKgEnw63s53pO4HReoQbV0FfW8MORIiEPOibQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was fresh and flavorful. Service was very attentive and friendly, location is great options to sit i door or outdoors to watch planes take off the runway is awesome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBJgWUIreknObedE-TMq163&fid=0x0:0x948ccc316397855d"],"When":"2025-12-11"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Ashley Lozano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsGzMa3mUBEZu6njZ1fZ98JOo7NI3FwI8u2BRwzg8jSnYhZ6pPPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It definitely grew on me even tho I don't live in base. I was shocked to see the price difference for everything compared to how much groceries cost now, even at Walmart. Their meat has one of the most affordable prices for the quality, how much they give you, and how thick they are. They even got frozen meats that are slowly expiring and they're discounted even more. I'm willing to make the drive to go over and shop there or even make an online order and have my husband pick it up. I didn't think the commissary prices would be lower compared to Lejuene where they're pretty pricey.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXgNzBtwE\u0026fid=0x0:0x2abae2c7528c726"],"When":"2024-10-12"},{"Name":"William Kamm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVk9BvUd4CfTLQjmdEjmcZwaiKc5lRS67Vi85W9KnUrLXJryhKj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Overall one of the better commissaries that I've been to. They have a large selection of food and produce at pretty good prices. They also have loose packed MREs at a discount price which is fun and brings back memories every once in a while. The only down side is the baggers bit, Id rather pay 1-2% more and have them actually pay the baggers rather than guilt trip me into tipping them since they hav signs up saying \"baggers are only paid in tips\".","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MILA D.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNX0BLN9cTPl2_LzYP2eDEDZXtejDpjwL5fiVAk5H2XuxvZPaf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love grocery shopping here. Not too big of a store but it’s enough to get what we need or want. They always have the freshest fruits and vegetables! I also like that it’s closer to home and it may get busy but I do not feel dizzy. On the side of the building is the Food Court so it is a great convenience for both.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4nLaFoAE\u0026fid=0x0:0x2abae2c7528c726"],"When":"2018-11-29"},{"Name":"Joseph Innecken","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKAXZP6_QsRAvWdHtmOPieDG6oEfIXnRdDffR6a-I2Z6AV-ZZP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great selection.
